import { useState } from 'react';
import { 
  Scale, Trash2, CheckCircle2, Circle, Ghost, Plus, Search, X, 
  Settings, Zap, Crown, AlertTriangle, 
  Crosshair, Shield, Package, Bomb, ShoppingBag, Calculator, Book, Filter,
  Power, Edit2
} from 'lucide-react';
import { useCharacter } from '../../context/CharacterContext';
import { EQUIPMENT_LIST, MODIFICATIONS, CURSES, RANKS, DAMAGE_TYPES_INFO } from '../../data/referenceData';
import type { Effect, EffectCategory, Formula, FormulaTerm, Operation, ItemType, Attribute, ElementType, TargetType, DamageType, AnyUserItem } from '../../types/systemData';


const SKILL_OPTIONS = ["Acrobacia", "Adestramento", "Artes", "Atletismo", "Atualidades", "Ciências", "Crime", "Diplomacia", "Enganação", "Fortitude", "Furtividade", "Iniciativa", "Intimidação", "Intuição", "Investigação", "Luta", "Medicina", "Ocultismo", "Percepção", "Pilotagem", "Pontaria", "Profissão", "Reflexos", "Religião", "Sobrevivência", "Tática", "Tecnologia", "Vontade"];
const ELEMENTS: ElementType[] = ['Sangue', 'Morte', 'Conhecimento', 'Energia', 'Medo'];
const PROFICIENCIES = ["Armas Simples", "Armas Táticas", "Armas Pesadas", "Proteções Leves", "Proteções Pesadas"];
const CONDITIONS = ["Agarrado", "Alquebrado", "Apavorado", "Atordoado", "Cego", "Debilitado", "Doente", "Em Chamas", "Enjoado", "Enredado", "Exausto", "Fatigado", "Fraco", "Imóvel", "Inconsciente", "Indefeso", "Lento", "Machucado", "Morrendo", "Ofuscado", "Paralisado", "Petrificado", "Sangrando", "Surdo", "Surpreso", "Vulnerável"];

const generateId = () => Date.now().toString() + Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 9);

const ITEM_TYPES: { id: ItemType; label: string; icon: any; color: string }[] = [
  { id: 'weapon', label: 'Arma', icon: Crosshair, color: 'text-red-400 border-red-500' },
  { id: 'protection', label: 'Proteção', icon: Shield, color: 'text-emerald-400 border-emerald-500' },
  { id: 'ammo', label: 'Munição', icon: Package, color: 'text-yellow-400 border-yellow-500' },
  { id: 'accessory', label: 'Acessório', icon: Crown, color: 'text-cyan-400 border-cyan-500' },
  { id: 'explosive', label: 'Explosivo', icon: Bomb, color: 'text-orange-400 border-orange-500' },
  { id: 'general', label: 'Geral', icon: ShoppingBag, color: 'text-zinc-400 border-zinc-500' },
  { id: 'cursed', label: 'Amaldiçoado', icon: Ghost, color: 'text-purple-400 border-purple-500' },
];

const getElementStyle = (element?: string) => {
  switch (element) {
    case 'Sangue': return { color: 'text-red-500', border: 'border-red-500', bg: 'bg-red-500/10' };
    case 'Morte': return { color: 'text-zinc-400', border: 'border-zinc-500', bg: 'bg-zinc-500/10' };
    case 'Conhecimento': return { color: 'text-amber-400', border: 'border-amber-500', bg: 'bg-amber-500/10' };
    case 'Energia': return { color: 'text-violet-400', border: 'border-violet-500', bg: 'bg-violet-500/10' };
    case 'Medo': return { color: 'text-white', border: 'border-white', bg: 'bg-white/10' };
    default: return { color: 'text-eden-100', border: 'border-eden-700', bg: 'bg-eden-800' };
  }
};

const getTypeStyle = (item: any) => {
    if (item.type === 'cursed') return `border-purple-500/50 bg-purple-500/5 text-purple-200`;
    switch (item.type) {
      case 'weapon': 
      case 'explosive': return `border-red-500/50 bg-red-500/5 text-red-200`;
      case 'ammo': return `border-yellow-500/50 bg-yellow-500/5 text-yellow-200`;
      case 'protection': return `border-emerald-500/50 bg-emerald-500/5 text-emerald-200`;
      case 'accessory': return `border-cyan-500/50 bg-cyan-500/5 text-cyan-200`;
      default: return `border-zinc-500/50 bg-zinc-500/5 text-zinc-200`;
    }
};




function FormulaBuilder({ formula, onChange }: { formula: Formula, onChange: (f: Formula) => void }) {
    const addTerm = () => {
      if (formula.terms.length >= 10) return;
      onChange({ terms: [...formula.terms, { id: Date.now().toString(), type: 'fixed', value: 0 }], operations: formula.terms.length > 0 ? [...formula.operations, 'soma'] : [...formula.operations] });
    };
    const removeTerm = (idx: number) => {
        const newTerms = formula.terms.filter((_, i) => i !== idx);
        const newOps = formula.operations.filter((_, i) => i !== (idx === 0 ? 0 : idx - 1));
        onChange({ terms: newTerms, operations: newOps.slice(0, newTerms.length - 1) });
    };
    const updateTerm = (idx: number, field: keyof FormulaTerm, value: any) => {
        const n = [...formula.terms]; n[idx] = { ...n[idx], [field]: value };
        onChange({ ...formula, terms: n });
    };
    const updateOp = (idx: number, op: Operation) => {
        const n = [...formula.operations]; n[idx] = op;
        onChange({ ...formula, operations: n });
    };

    const renderTermExtras = (term: FormulaTerm, index: number) => {
        switch (term.type) {
            case 'fixed': return <input type="number" value={term.value} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'value', Number(e.target.value))} className="w-16 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white" placeholder="0" />;
            case 'dice': return (
                <div className="flex items-center gap-1"><input type="number" value={term.value || 1} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'value', Number(e.target.value))} className="w-10 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white text-center" /><span className="text-white text-xs">d</span><select value={term.diceFace || 20} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'diceFace', Number(e.target.value))} className="w-12 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white">{[4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 20, 100].map(d => <option key={d} value={d}>{d}</option>)}</select></div>
            );
            case 'attribute': return <select value={term.attribute || 'AGI'} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'attribute', e.target.value)} className="w-20 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white">{['AGI', 'FOR', 'INT', 'PRE', 'VIG'].map(a => <option key={a} value={a}>{a}</option>)}</select>;
            case 'skill_total': case 'skill_training': return <select value={term.skill || SKILL_OPTIONS[0]} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'skill', e.target.value)} className="w-24 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white">{SKILL_OPTIONS.map(s => <option key={s} value={s}>{s}</option>)}</select>;
            case 'stat_max': case 'stat_current': case 'stat_temp': return <select value={term.stat || 'pv'} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'stat', e.target.value)} className="w-16 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white"><option value="pv">PV</option><option value="pe">PE</option><option value="san">SAN</option></select>;
            case 'count_paranormal_powers': case 'count_rituals': return <select value={term.element || 'Conhecimento'} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'element', e.target.value)} className="w-24 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white">{ELEMENTS.map(el => <option key={el} value={el}>{el}</option>)}</select>;
            case 'dr_value': return <select value={term.damageType || 'balistico'} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'damageType', e.target.value)} className="w-24 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white">{DAMAGE_TYPES_INFO.map(d => <option key={d.id} value={d.name}>{d.name}</option>)}</select>;
            default: return null;
        }
    };

    return (
      <div className="bg-eden-950/50 p-4 rounded-xl border border-eden-700 space-y-3">
          <div className="flex justify-between items-center"><label className="text-xs font-bold text-energia flex gap-2"><Calculator size={14}/> Fórmula</label><button onClick={addTerm} className="text-xs bg-eden-800 px-2 py-1 rounded hover:bg-eden-700"><Plus size={12}/> Add</button></div>
          {formula.terms.map((t, i) => (
              <div key={t.id} className="flex gap-2 items-center bg-eden-900/30 p-2 rounded border border-eden-700/50 flex-wrap">
                  {i > 0 && <select value={formula.operations[i-1]} onChange={e=>updateOp(i-1, e.target.value as Operation)} className="bg-eden-800 text-[10px] p-1 rounded text-white"><option value="soma">+</option><option value="subtracao">-</option><option value="multiplicacao">*</option><option value="divisao">/</option></select>}
                  <select value={t.type} onChange={e=>updateTerm(i, 'type', e.target.value)} className="bg-eden-800 text-xs p-1.5 rounded text-white max-w-[100px]">
                      <option value="fixed">Fixo</option><option value="dice">Dados</option><option value="attribute">Atributo</option><option value="skill_total">Perícia (Total)</option><option value="skill_training">Perícia (Treino)</option><option value="nex">NEX</option><option value="stat_max">Pontos Máx</option><option value="stat_current">Pontos Atuais</option><option value="defense">Defesa</option><option value="dr_value">Valor RD</option>
                  </select>
                  {renderTermExtras(t, i)}
                  <button onClick={()=>removeTerm(i)} className="ml-auto text-red-400"><Trash2 size={14}/></button>
              </div>
          ))}
      </div>
    )
}




function LearnedEntityBuilder({ data, onChange }: { data: any, onChange: (d: any) => void }) {
    const [showEffectModal, setShowEffectModal] = useState(false);
    const [editingEffect, setEditingEffect] = useState<Effect | null>(null);

    const handleSaveEffect = (eff: Effect) => {
        const effects = data.effects || [];
        const exists = effects.find((e: Effect) => e.id === eff.id);
        const newEffects = exists ? effects.map((e: Effect) => e.id === eff.id ? eff : e) : [...effects, eff];
        onChange({ ...data, effects: newEffects });
        setShowEffectModal(false);
        setEditingEffect(null);
    };

    const removeEffect = (id: string) => {
        onChange({ ...data, effects: (data.effects || []).filter((e: Effect) => e.id !== id) });
    };

    return (
        <div className="bg-eden-950/50 p-4 rounded-xl border border-eden-700 space-y-4 animate-in fade-in">
            <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100 uppercase border-b border-eden-700 pb-2 flex items-center gap-2"><Book size={14}/> Dados da Habilidade/Ritual</h4>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                <div className="space-y-1"><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/50">Tipo</label><select value={data.type || 'ability'} onChange={e => onChange({...data, type: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white"><option value="ability">Habilidade</option><option value="ritual">Ritual</option></select></div>
                <div className="space-y-1"><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/50">Nome</label><input type="text" value={data.name || ''} onChange={e => onChange({...data, name: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white" placeholder="Nome..."/></div>
            </div>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-2">
                <input type="text" placeholder="Execução" value={data.execution} onChange={e => onChange({...data, execution: e.target.value})} className="bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1.5 text-xs text-white"/>
                <input type="text" placeholder="Alcance" value={data.range} onChange={e => onChange({...data, range: e.target.value})} className="bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1.5 text-xs text-white"/>
                <input type="text" placeholder="Alvo" value={data.target} onChange={e => onChange({...data, target: e.target.value})} className="bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1.5 text-xs text-white"/>
                <input type="text" placeholder="Duração" value={data.duration} onChange={e => onChange({...data, duration: e.target.value})} className="bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1.5 text-xs text-white"/>
            </div>
            {data.type === 'ritual' && (
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
                    <select value={data.element || 'Conhecimento'} onChange={e => onChange({...data, element: e.target.value})} className="bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1.5 text-xs text-white">{ELEMENTS.map(el => <option key={el} value={el}>{el}</option>)}</select>
                    <select value={data.circle || 1} onChange={e => onChange({...data, circle: Number(e.target.value)})} className="bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1.5 text-xs text-white">{[1,2,3,4].map(c => <option key={c} value={c}>{c}º</option>)}</select>
                </div>
            )}
            <div className="space-y-1"><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/50">Descrição / Regras</label><textarea value={data.description || ''} onChange={e => onChange({...data, description: e.target.value})} className="w-full h-16 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white resize-none" placeholder="Descrição completa..."/></div>
            <div className="bg-eden-950/30 p-2 rounded border border-eden-700/50">
                <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-2"><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/50 uppercase">Efeitos (Recursivo)</label><button onClick={() => { setEditingEffect(null); setShowEffectModal(true); }} className="text-[10px] bg-eden-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-white flex items-center gap-1">+ Efeito</button></div>
                {data.effects?.map((eff: Effect) => (
                    <div key={eff.id} className="flex justify-between items-center bg-eden-900 p-1.5 rounded mb-1 border border-eden-700"><span className="text-[10px] text-white font-bold">{eff.name}</span><div className="flex gap-1"><button onClick={() => { setEditingEffect(eff); setShowEffectModal(true); }} className="text-eden-100/50 hover:text-white"><Edit2 size={12}/></button><button onClick={() => removeEffect(eff.id)} className="text-eden-100/50 hover:text-red-400"><Trash2 size={12}/></button></div></div>
                ))}
            </div>
            {showEffectModal && <EffectEditor effect={editingEffect} onSave={handleSaveEffect} onCancel={() => setShowEffectModal(false)} />}
        </div>
    );
}




function EffectEditor({ effect, onSave, onCancel }: { effect: Effect | null, onSave: (e: Effect) => void, onCancel: () => void }) {
  const { character } = useCharacter(); 
  const [data, setData] = useState<Effect>(effect || {
    id: generateId(), name: '', category: 'add_fixed', value: { terms: [{ id: '1', type: 'fixed', value: 0 }], operations: [] }, targets: [], description: '', generalChangeMode: '' 
  });

  const CATEGORIES: {val: EffectCategory, label: string}[] = [
    { val: 'add_fixed', label: 'Adição Fixa' }, { val: 'add_damage', label: 'Adição de Dano' }, { val: 'add_action', label: 'Adição de Ações' }, { val: 'add_dr', label: 'Adição de RD' },
    { val: 'add_immunity', label: 'Imunidade' }, { val: 'add_vulnerability', label: 'Vulnerabilidade' }, { val: 'change_dice', label: 'Mudança de Dados' }, { val: 'change_step', label: 'Mudança de Passo' },
    { val: 'change_general', label: 'Mudança Geral' }, { val: 'proficiency', label: 'Proficiência' }, { val: 'learning', label: 'Aprendizado' }, { val: 'affinity', label: 'Afinidade' }, { val: 'manual', label: 'Manual' }
  ];

  const userWeapons = character.inventory.filter(i => i.type === 'weapon');
  const userRituals = character.rituals || [];
  
  const userAbilities = character.abilities || []; 
  
  const userItems = character.inventory || [];

  const getValidTargets = (category: EffectCategory) => {
      switch(category) {
          case 'add_fixed': return [
              { val: 'test_attribute', label: 'Teste Atributo' }, { val: 'test_skill', label: 'Teste Perícia' }, { val: 'test_attack', label: 'Ataque' }, { val: 'heal', label: 'Cura' },
              { val: 'item_category', label: 'Categoria Item' }, { val: 'item_bonus', label: 'Bônus Item' }, { val: 'item_space', label: 'Espaço Item' }, { val: 'displacement', label: 'Deslocamento' }, 
              { val: 'pv_max', label: 'PV Máx' }, { val: 'pv_current', label: 'PV Atual' }, { val: 'pv_temp', label: 'PV Temp' },
              { val: 'pe_max', label: 'PE Máx' }, { val: 'pe_current', label: 'PE Atual' }, { val: 'pe_temp', label: 'PE Temp' },
              { val: 'san_max', label: 'SAN Máx' }, { val: 'san_current', label: 'SAN Atual' }, { val: 'san_temp', label: 'SAN Temp' },
              { val: 'defense', label: 'Defesa' }, { val: 'ritual_dt', label: 'DT Ritual' }, { val: 'load_max', label: 'Carga Máx' }
          ];
          case 'add_damage': return [{ val: 'damage_roll', label: 'Rolagem Dano' }];
          case 'add_action': return [{ val: 'action_move', label: 'Ação Movimento' }, { val: 'action_std', label: 'Ação Padrão' }];
          case 'change_dice': return [{ val: 'test_attribute', label: 'Teste Atributo' }, { val: 'test_skill', label: 'Teste Perícia' }, { val: 'test_attack', label: 'Ataque' }];
          case 'change_step': return [{ val: 'range_standard', label: 'Alcance (Padrão)' }, { val: 'range_ritual', label: 'Alcance (Ritual)' }, { val: 'credit_limit', label: 'Limite de Crédito' }];
          case 'change_general': return [{ val: 'ritual_duration', label: 'Duração Ritual' }, { val: 'ritual_target', label: 'Alvo/Área Ritual' }, { val: 'weapon_dice', label: 'Dado Arma' }];
          default: return [];
      }
  };

  const validTargets = getValidTargets(data.category);
  const showTargetsList = validTargets.length > 0;
  const hideFormula = ['manual', 'affinity', 'proficiency', 'learning', 'change_general', 'add_immunity', 'add_vulnerability'].includes(data.category);

  const addTarget = () => setData(prev => ({ ...prev, targets: [...prev.targets, { id: Date.now().toString(), type: validTargets[0]?.val as TargetType }] }));
  const addSpecialTarget = () => setData(prev => ({ ...prev, targets: [...prev.targets, { id: Date.now().toString(), type: 'dr', damageType: 'balistico' }] }));
  
  const getMeta = () => { try { return data.generalChangeMode ? JSON.parse(data.generalChangeMode) : {} } catch { return {} } };
  const setMeta = (obj: any) => setData({...data, generalChangeMode: JSON.stringify({...getMeta(), ...obj})});

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[90] flex items-center justify-center bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-sm p-4 overflow-y-auto">
      <div className="bg-eden-900 w-full max-w-4xl rounded-2xl border border-eden-600 shadow-2xl flex flex-col max-h-[95vh]">
        <div className="p-4 border-b border-eden-700 flex justify-between items-center bg-eden-800 rounded-t-2xl">
          <h3 className="font-bold text-lg text-white flex items-center gap-2"><Zap className="text-energia"/> Editor de Efeito</h3>
          <button onClick={onCancel}><X /></button>
        </div>
        <div className="p-6 space-y-6 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar flex-1">
          <div className="space-y-1"><label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Nome do Efeito</label><input type="text" value={data.name} onChange={e => setData({...data, name: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded-lg p-2 text-white font-bold" placeholder="Ex: Aumento de Força..."/></div>
          <div className="space-y-2"><label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Categoria</label><select value={data.category} onChange={(e) => setData({...data, category: e.target.value as EffectCategory, targets: [], generalChangeMode: ''})} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded-lg p-3 text-white">{CATEGORIES.map(c => <option key={c.val} value={c.val}>{c.label}</option>)}</select></div>

          {data.category === 'add_damage' && (
              <div className="space-y-2 animate-in fade-in">
                  <label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Tipo do Dano Adicional</label>
                  <select value={getMeta().damageType || 'balistico'} onChange={e => setMeta({damageType: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-3 text-white capitalize">{DAMAGE_TYPES_INFO.map(d => <option key={d.id} value={d.name}>{d.name}</option>)}</select>
                  <div className="flex gap-2 items-center text-xs text-eden-100/50"><input type="checkbox" checked={!!getMeta().multipliable} onChange={e => setMeta({multipliable: e.target.checked})}/> Multiplicável no Crítico?</div>
              </div>
          )}
          {data.category === 'affinity' && (
              <div className="space-y-2 animate-in fade-in"><label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Elemento</label><select value={getMeta().element || 'Conhecimento'} onChange={e => setMeta({element: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-3 text-white">{ELEMENTS.map(el => <option key={el} value={el}>{el}</option>)}</select></div>
          )}
          {data.category === 'proficiency' && (
              <div className="space-y-2 animate-in fade-in"><label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Proficiência em:</label><select value={getMeta().proficiency || PROFICIENCIES[0]} onChange={e => setMeta({proficiency: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-3 text-white">{PROFICIENCIES.map(p => <option key={p} value={p}>{p}</option>)}</select></div>
          )}
          {data.category === 'learning' && <LearnedEntityBuilder data={getMeta().learnedEntity || {}} onChange={(d) => setMeta({learnedEntity: d})}/>}
          
          {data.category === 'change_general' && (
              <div className="space-y-4 animate-in fade-in bg-eden-950/30 p-4 rounded-xl border border-eden-700">
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                      <div className="space-y-1"><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Tipo do Alvo</label><select value={getMeta().targetType || 'ritual'} onChange={e => setMeta({targetType: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-white text-xs"><option value="ritual">Ritual</option><option value="weapon">Arma</option><option value="ability">Habilidade</option></select></div>
                      <div className="space-y-1"><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Nome do Alvo</label><select value={getMeta().targetId || ''} onChange={e => setMeta({targetId: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-white text-xs"><option value="" disabled>Selecione...</option>{getMeta().targetType === 'ritual' && userRituals.map((r: any) => <option key={r.id} value={r.id}>{r.name}</option>)}{getMeta().targetType === 'weapon' && userWeapons.map((w: any) => <option key={w.id} value={w.id}>{w.name}</option>)}{getMeta().targetType === 'ability' && userAbilities.map((a: any) => <option key={a.id} value={a.id}>{a.name}</option>)}</select></div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                      <div className="space-y-1"><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Campo</label><select value={getMeta().field || ''} onChange={e => setMeta({field: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-white text-xs"><option value="duration">Duração</option><option value="range">Alcance</option><option value="damage_dice">Dado de Dano</option><option value="resistance">Resistência</option><option value="target">Alvo/Área</option><option value="execution">Execução</option></select></div>
                      <div className="space-y-1"><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Novo Valor</label><input type="text" value={getMeta().newValue || ''} onChange={e => setMeta({newValue: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-white text-xs"/></div>
                  </div>
              </div>
          )}

          {!hideFormula && <FormulaBuilder formula={data.value} onChange={(f) => setData({...data, value: f})} />}
          {(data.category === 'manual') && <div className="space-y-2"><label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Descrição</label><textarea value={data.description || ''} onChange={(e) => setData({...data, description: e.target.value})} className="w-full h-24 bg-eden-950 border border-eden-700 rounded-lg p-3 text-eden-100 focus:border-energia" placeholder="Descreva o efeito..."/></div>}

          {showTargetsList && (
              <div className="space-y-3 p-4 bg-eden-950/30 rounded-xl border border-eden-700/50">
                 <div className="flex justify-between items-center"><label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Onde aplicar?</label><button onClick={addTarget} className="text-[10px] bg-eden-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-white flex items-center gap-1">+ Alvo</button></div>
                 {data.targets.map((target, idx) => (
                   <div key={target.id} className="flex gap-2 items-center bg-eden-900 p-2 rounded border border-eden-700">
                      <select value={target.type} onChange={(e) => { const n = [...data.targets]; n[idx].type = e.target.value as TargetType; setData({...data, targets: n}); }} className="bg-eden-800 text-xs p-2 rounded text-white border border-eden-700 flex-1">{validTargets.map(t => <option key={t.val} value={t.val}>{t.label}</option>)}</select>
                      {['test_skill'].includes(target.type) && <select value={target.skill} onChange={e => {const n=[...data.targets]; n[idx].skill=e.target.value; setData({...data, targets: n})}} className="bg-eden-800 text-xs p-2 rounded border border-eden-600 text-white flex-1">{SKILL_OPTIONS.map(s => <option key={s} value={s}>{s}</option>)}</select>}
                      {['test_attribute'].includes(target.type) && <select value={target.attribute} onChange={e => {const n=[...data.targets]; n[idx].attribute=e.target.value as Attribute; setData({...data, targets: n})}} className="bg-eden-800 text-xs p-2 rounded border border-eden-600 text-white flex-1">{['AGI','FOR','INT','PRE','VIG'].map(a => <option key={a} value={a}>{a}</option>)}</select>}
                      {['test_attack', 'damage_roll'].includes(target.type) && <select value={target.weaponId || ''} onChange={e => {const n=[...data.targets]; n[idx].weaponId=e.target.value; setData({...data, targets: n})}} className="bg-eden-800 text-xs p-2 rounded border border-eden-600 text-white flex-1"><option value="">Tudo / Qualquer</option>{userWeapons.map((w: any) => <option key={w.id} value={w.id}>{w.name}</option>)}</select>}
                      {['heal', 'ritual_dt'].includes(target.type) && <select value={target.ritualId || ''} onChange={e => {const n=[...data.targets]; n[idx].ritualId=e.target.value; setData({...data, targets: n})}} className="bg-eden-800 text-xs p-2 rounded border border-eden-600 text-white flex-1"><option value="">Tudo / Qualquer</option>{userRituals.map((r: any) => <option key={r.id} value={r.id}>{r.name}</option>)}{userAbilities.map((a: any) => <option key={a.id} value={a.id}>{a.name}</option>)}</select>}
                      {['item_category', 'item_bonus', 'item_space'].includes(target.type) && <select value={target.itemId || ''} onChange={e => {const n=[...data.targets]; n[idx].itemId=e.target.value; setData({...data, targets: n})}} className="bg-eden-800 text-xs p-2 rounded border border-eden-600 text-white flex-1"><option value="">Tudo / Qualquer</option>{userItems.map((i: any) => <option key={i.id} value={i.id}>{i.name}</option>)}</select>}
                      <button onClick={() => setData(prev => ({...prev, targets: prev.targets.filter((_, i) => i !== idx)}))} className="text-red-400 p-2"><Trash2 size={14}/></button>
                   </div>
                 ))}
              </div>
          )}

          {['add_dr', 'add_immunity', 'add_vulnerability'].includes(data.category) && (
              <div className="space-y-3 p-4 bg-eden-950/30 rounded-xl border border-eden-700/50">
                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center"><label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">{data.category === 'add_dr' ? 'Resistências' : data.category === 'add_immunity' ? 'Imunidades' : 'Vulnerabilidades'}</label><button onClick={addSpecialTarget} type="button" className="text-[10px] bg-eden-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-eden-100 hover:bg-eden-600 flex items-center gap-1"><Plus size={12}/> Adicionar</button></div>
                 {data.targets.map((target, idx) => {
                     const isCondition = !!target.condition;
                     return (
                        <div key={target.id} className="flex gap-2 items-center bg-eden-900 p-2 rounded border border-eden-700 animate-in slide-in-from-left-2">
                            {data.category !== 'add_dr' && <button onClick={() => {const n = [...data.targets]; if (isCondition) { delete n[idx].condition; n[idx].damageType = 'balistico'; } else { delete n[idx].damageType; n[idx].condition = CONDITIONS[0]; } setData({...data, targets: n});}} className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold px-2 py-1 bg-eden-800 rounded border border-eden-600 text-white min-w-[70px]">{isCondition ? 'Condição' : 'Dano'}</button>}
                            {isCondition ? <select value={target.condition} onChange={e => {const n=[...data.targets]; n[idx].condition=e.target.value; setData({...data, targets: n})}} className="bg-eden-800 text-xs p-2 rounded border border-eden-600 text-white flex-1">{CONDITIONS.map(c => <option key={c} value={c}>{c}</option>)}</select> : <select value={target.damageType || 'balistico'} onChange={e => {const n=[...data.targets]; n[idx].damageType=e.target.value as DamageType; setData({...data, targets: n})}} className="bg-eden-800 text-xs p-2 rounded border border-eden-600 text-white flex-1">{DAMAGE_TYPES_INFO.map(d => <option key={d.id} value={d.name}>{d.name}</option>)}</select>}
                            <button onClick={() => setData(prev => ({...prev, targets: prev.targets.filter((_, i) => i !== idx)}))} className="text-red-400 p-2"><Trash2 size={14}/></button>
                        </div>
                     );
                 })}
              </div>
          )}
        </div>
        <div className="p-4 border-t border-eden-700 bg-eden-800 flex justify-end gap-3 rounded-b-2xl">
          <button onClick={onCancel} className="px-4 py-2 text-white hover:bg-eden-700 rounded-lg">Cancelar</button>
          <button onClick={() => onSave(data)} disabled={!data.name} className="px-6 py-2 bg-energia text-eden-900 rounded-lg font-black hover:bg-yellow-400">SALVAR</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}




const ItemForm = ({ initialData, onSave, onCancel }: { initialData?: any, onSave: (item: any) => void, onCancel: () => void }) => {
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState<any>(initialData || {
    id: '', name: '', type: 'general', category: 1, space: 1, description: '', 
    isCustom: true, effects: [], modifications: [], curses: [], quantity: 1, isActive: true
  });
  
  const [showEffectModal, setShowEffectModal] = useState(false);
  const [editingEffect, setEditingEffect] = useState<Effect | null>(null);

  const handleChange = (field: string, value: any) => setFormData((prev: any) => ({ ...prev, [field]: value }));
  const updateNested = (parent: string, field: string, value: any) => setFormData((prev: any) => ({ ...prev, [parent]: { ...prev[parent], [field]: value } }));
  const updateLimit = (field: 'type' | 'max', value: any) => setFormData((prev: any) => ({ ...prev, limit: { ...prev.limit, [field]: value } }));

  const toggleMod = (mod: any) => {
      const current = formData.modifications || [];
      const exists = current.some((m: any) => m.id === mod.id);
      handleChange('modifications', exists ? current.filter((m: any) => m.id !== mod.id) : [...current, mod]);
  };

  const toggleCurse = (curse: any) => {
      const current = formData.curses || [];
      const exists = current.some((c: any) => c.id === curse.id);
      handleChange('curses', exists ? current.filter((c: any) => c.id !== curse.id) : [...current, curse]);
  };

  
  const toggleEffectActive = (effId: string) => {
      const current = formData.effects || [];
      const updated = current.map((eff: Effect) => {
          if (eff.id === effId) {
              
              
              return { ...eff, isActive: eff.isActive === false ? true : false }; 
          }
          return eff;
      });
      handleChange('effects', updated);
  };

  const removeEffect = (itemId: string, effectId: string) => {
  if (!character || !updateCharacter) return; 

  
  const updatedInventory = character.inventory.map((item: AnyUserItem) => {
    if (item.id === itemId) {
      
      return {
        ...item,
        effects: item.effects.filter((effect: Effect) => effect.id !== effectId)
      };
    }
    return item;
  });

  
  updateCharacter({ inventory: updatedInventory });
};

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[80] flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm animate-in fade-in">
      <div className="bg-eden-900 w-full max-w-6xl max-h-[95vh] rounded-2xl border border-eden-600 shadow-2xl flex flex-col">
        <div className="p-4 border-b border-eden-700 bg-eden-800 rounded-t-2xl flex justify-between items-center">
          <h3 className="font-bold text-xl text-eden-100">{initialData ? 'Editar Item' : 'Criar Novo Item'}</h3>
          <button onClick={onCancel}><X size={24} className="text-eden-100/50 hover:text-white"/></button>
        </div>

        <div className="p-6 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar flex-1 space-y-6">
            <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-6">
                
                {}
                <div className="flex-1 space-y-5">
                    <div className="space-y-1">
                        <label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/50 uppercase">Nome</label>
                        <input value={formData.name} onChange={e => handleChange('name', e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-eden-950 border border-eden-700 rounded-lg p-3 text-white font-bold text-lg focus:border-energia outline-none" placeholder="Nome do Item" />
                    </div>
                    
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
                        {ITEM_TYPES.map(t => (
                            <button
                                key={t.id}
                                onClick={() => handleChange('type', t.id)}
                                className={`flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-3 rounded-xl border h-20 transition-all ${
                                formData.type === t.id 
                                    ? `bg-eden-800 ${t.color} shadow-md scale-105` 
                                    : 'bg-eden-950 border-eden-800 text-eden-100/40 hover:bg-eden-900'
                                }`}
                            >
                                <t.icon size={20} className="mb-1" />
                                <span className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase">{t.label}</span>
                            </button>
                        ))}
                    </div>

                    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 bg-eden-950/30 p-4 rounded-xl border border-eden-700/50">
                        <div className="space-y-1">
                            <label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/50 uppercase">Categoria</label>
                            <select 
                                value={formData.category} onChange={(e) => handleChange('category', Number(e.target.value))}
                                className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded-lg p-2.5 text-sm text-white"
                            >
                                {[0,1,2,3,4].map(c => <option key={c} value={c}>{c === 0 ? '0' : ['I','II','III','IV'][c-1]}</option>)}
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        <div className="space-y-1">
                            <label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/50 uppercase">Espaço</label>
                            <input type="number" value={formData.space} onChange={e => handleChange('space', Number(e.target.value))} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded-lg p-2.5 text-sm text-white" />
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    {}
                    {formData.type === 'cursed' && (
                        <div className="bg-purple-500/10 border border-purple-500/30 rounded-xl p-4 space-y-2 animate-in slide-in-from-top-2">
                            <h4 className="text-sm font-bold text-purple-300 uppercase flex items-center gap-2"><Ghost size={16}/> Detalhes da Maldição</h4>
                            <div className="space-y-1">
                                <label className="text-[10px] text-purple-200/60 uppercase font-bold">Elemento Principal</label>
                                <select 
                                    value={formData.element || 'Medo'} onChange={(e) => handleChange('element', e.target.value)}
                                    className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-purple-500/30 rounded-lg p-2.5 text-sm text-purple-100"
                                >
                                    {ELEMENTS.map(el => <option key={el} value={el}>{el}</option>)}
                                </select>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    )}

                    {(formData.type === 'weapon' || formData.type === 'explosive') && (
                        <div className="bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/30 rounded-xl p-4 space-y-4 animate-in slide-in-from-top-2">
                            <h4 className="text-sm font-bold text-red-300 uppercase flex items-center gap-2"><Crosshair size={16}/> Estatísticas de Combate</h4>
                            
                            {formData.type === 'weapon' && (
                                <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
                                    <div className="space-y-1">
                                        <label className="text-[10px] text-red-200/60 uppercase font-bold">Tipo</label>
                                        <select value={formData.weaponType || 'melee'} onChange={(e) => handleChange('weaponType', e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-red-900/50 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white">
                                            <option value="melee">Corpo a Corpo</option><option value="ranged">Distância</option>
                                        </select>
                                    </div>
                                    <div className="space-y-1">
                                        <label className="text-[10px] text-red-200/60 uppercase font-bold">Empunhadura</label>
                                        <select value={formData.hand || 'one'} onChange={(e) => handleChange('hand', e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-red-900/50 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white">
                                            <option value="light">Leve</option><option value="one">Uma Mão</option><option value="two">Duas Mãos</option>
                                        </select>
                                    </div>
                                    <div className="space-y-1">
                                        <label className="text-[10px] text-red-200/60 uppercase font-bold">Crítico</label>
                                        <div className="flex gap-1">
                                            <input type="number" value={formData.critical?.range || 20} onChange={e => updateNested('critical', 'range', Number(e.target.value))} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-red-900/50 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white text-center" placeholder="Mg"/>
                                            <span className="self-center text-red-400">/</span>
                                            <input type="number" value={formData.critical?.multiplier || 2} onChange={e => updateNested('critical', 'multiplier', Number(e.target.value))} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-red-900/50 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white text-center" placeholder="Mult"/>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            )}

                            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                                <div className="space-y-1">
                                    <label className="text-[10px] text-red-200/60 uppercase font-bold">Dano</label>
                                    <div className="flex gap-1 items-center bg-eden-900 border border-red-900/50 rounded p-1">
                                        <input type="number" value={formData.damage?.diceCount || 1} onChange={e => updateNested('damage', 'diceCount', Number(e.target.value))} className="w-10 bg-transparent text-center text-sm text-white font-bold outline-none"/>
                                        <span className="text-xs text-red-400 font-bold">d</span>
                                        <select value={formData.damage?.diceFace || 6} onChange={e => updateNested('damage', 'diceFace', Number(e.target.value))} className="bg-transparent text-sm text-white font-bold outline-none flex-1">
                                            {[4,6,8,10,12,20].map(d => <option key={d} value={d}>{d}</option>)}
                                        </select>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div className="space-y-1">
                                    <label className="text-[10px] text-red-200/60 uppercase font-bold">Tipo</label>
                                    <select value={formData.damage?.type || 'balistico'} onChange={e => updateNested('damage', 'type', e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-red-900/50 rounded p-2 text-sm text-white capitalize">
                                        {DAMAGE_TYPES_INFO.map(d => <option key={d.id} value={d.id}>{d.name}</option>)}
                                    </select>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            {formData.type === 'explosive' && (
                                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 border-t border-red-500/20 pt-2">
                                    <div className="space-y-1"><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-red-300">Área</label><input type="text" value={formData.area} onChange={e => handleChange('area', e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-red-900/50 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white"/></div>
                                    <div className="space-y-1"><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-red-300">DT Resistência</label><input type="number" value={formData.dt || 0} onChange={e => handleChange('dt', Number(e.target.value))} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-red-900/50 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white"/></div>
                                </div>
                            )}
                        </div>
                    )}

                    {formData.type === 'protection' && (
                        <div className="bg-emerald-500/10 border border-emerald-500/30 rounded-xl p-4 space-y-4 animate-in slide-in-from-top-2">
                            <h4 className="text-sm font-bold text-emerald-300 uppercase flex items-center gap-2"><Shield size={16}/> Estatísticas de Defesa</h4>
                            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                                <div className="space-y-1">
                                    <label className="text-[10px] text-emerald-200/60 uppercase font-bold">Defesa (+)</label>
                                    <input type="number" value={formData.defenseBonus || 0} onChange={e => handleChange('defenseBonus', Number(e.target.value))} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-emerald-900/50 rounded p-2 text-sm text-white font-bold"/>
                                </div>
                                <div className="space-y-1">
                                    <label className="text-[10px] text-emerald-200/60 uppercase font-bold">Penalidade (-)</label>
                                    <input type="number" value={formData.penalty || 0} onChange={e => handleChange('penalty', Number(e.target.value))} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-emerald-900/50 rounded p-2 text-sm text-white font-bold"/>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 pt-2 border-t border-emerald-500/20">
                                <input type="checkbox" id="isHeavy" checked={formData.isHeavy || false} onChange={e => handleChange('isHeavy', e.target.checked)} className="w-4 h-4 rounded border-emerald-500 bg-eden-900"/>
                                <label htmlFor="isHeavy" className="text-xs text-emerald-100 cursor-pointer font-bold">Proteção Pesada?</label>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    )}

                    <div className="space-y-1 h-full flex flex-col">
                        <label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/50 uppercase">Descrição & Regras</label>
                        <textarea value={formData.description} onChange={e => handleChange('description', e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-eden-950 border border-eden-700 rounded-lg p-3 text-sm text-eden-100 focus:border-energia outline-none resize-none flex-1 min-h-[100px]" placeholder="Descreva os detalhes do item..."/>
                    </div>
                </div>

                {}
                <div className="w-full lg:w-[450px] space-y-6 border-l border-eden-700 lg:pl-6">
                    
                    {}
                    <div className="bg-black/20 rounded-xl border border-eden-700/50 p-4 space-y-3 shadow-inner">
                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center border-b border-eden-700/50 pb-2">
                            <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/50 uppercase flex items-center gap-2"><Zap size={14}/> Efeitos & Automação</h4>
                            <button onClick={() => { setEditingEffect(null); setShowEffectModal(true); }} className="text-xs bg-eden-800 text-energia px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-1 hover:bg-eden-700 transition-colors shadow-sm border border-eden-700"><Plus size={12}/> Novo</button>
                        </div>
                        <div className="space-y-2 max-h-[250px] overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar pr-1">
                            {(formData.effects || []).map((eff: Effect) => (
                                <div key={eff.id} className={`p-3 rounded-lg border flex justify-between items-center group transition-all ${eff.isActive !== false ? 'bg-eden-900/80 border-eden-700/50' : 'bg-eden-950/50 border-eden-800 opacity-60'}`}>
                                    <div className="flex flex-col max-w-[200px]">
                                        <span className={`text-xs font-bold truncate ${eff.isActive !== false ? 'text-eden-100' : 'text-eden-100/50 line-through'}`}>{eff.name || 'Sem nome'}</span>
                                        <span className="text-[10px] text-eden-100/50">{eff.category} • {eff.targets.length} alvos</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <div className="flex gap-1">
                                        <button onClick={() => toggleEffectActive(eff.id)} className={`p-1.5 rounded hover:bg-white/10 ${eff.isActive !== false ? 'text-green-400' : 'text-eden-100/20'}`} title={eff.isActive !== false ? "Desativar" : "Ativar"}><Power size={14}/></button>
                                        <button onClick={() => { setEditingEffect(eff); setShowEffectModal(true); }} className="text-eden-100/50 hover:text-white p-1.5 hover:bg-white/10 rounded"><Edit2 size={14}/></button>
                                        <button onClick={() => removeEffect(eff.id)} className="text-eden-100/50 hover:text-red-400 p-1.5 hover:bg-red-500/10 rounded"><Trash2 size={14}/></button>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            ))}
                            {(!formData.effects || formData.effects.length === 0) && <p className="text-[10px] text-eden-100/30 italic text-center py-4 border border-dashed border-eden-800 rounded-lg">Sem efeitos configurados.</p>}
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    {}
                    <div>
                        <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-conhecimento mb-3 uppercase border-b border-eden-700 pb-1">Modificações</h4>
                        <div className="space-y-2 max-h-[250px] overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar pr-2">
                            {MODIFICATIONS.filter(m => m.targetType === 'any' || m.targetType === formData.type).map(mod => {
                                const active = formData.modifications?.some((m: any) => m.id === mod.id);
                                return (
                                    <button 
                                        key={mod.id} 
                                        onClick={() => toggleMod(mod)} 
                                        className={`group w-full text-left p-2.5 rounded-lg border transition-all relative flex flex-col gap-1 ${active ? 'bg-conhecimento/10 border-conhecimento shadow-sm' : 'bg-eden-950 border-eden-800 text-eden-100/50 hover:bg-eden-900'}`}
                                    >
                                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center w-full">
                                            <span className={`text-xs font-bold ${active ? 'text-white' : ''}`}>{mod.name}</span>
                                            {active && <span className="text-[8px] bg-conhecimento text-eden-900 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-bold uppercase">+1 Cat</span>}
                                        </div>
                                        <p className="text-[10px] opacity-70 line-clamp-2">{mod.effects?.[0]?.description || "Sem descrição."}</p>
                                    </button>
                                )
                            })}
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    {}
                    <div>
                        <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-purple-400 mb-3 uppercase border-b border-eden-700 pb-1">Maldições</h4>
                        <div className="space-y-2 max-h-[250px] overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar pr-2">
                            {CURSES.map(curse => {
                                const active = formData.curses?.some((c: any) => c.id === curse.id);
                                const elemStyle = getElementStyle(curse.element);
                                return (
                                    <button 
                                        key={curse.id} 
                                        onClick={() => toggleCurse(curse)} 
                                        className={`w-full text-left p-2.5 rounded-lg border transition-all flex flex-col gap-1 ${active ? 'bg-purple-500/10 border-purple-500 shadow-sm' : 'bg-eden-950 border-eden-800 text-eden-100/50 hover:bg-eden-900'}`}
                                    >
                                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center w-full">
                                            <span className={`text-xs font-bold ${active ? 'text-white' : ''}`}>{curse.name}</span>
                                            <span className={`text-[8px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded border uppercase font-bold ${elemStyle.border} ${elemStyle.color} ${elemStyle.bg}`}>{curse.element}</span>
                                        </div>
                                        <p className="text-[10px] opacity-70 line-clamp-2">{curse.effects?.[0]?.description || "Sem descrição."}</p>
                                    </button>
                                )
                            })}
                        </div>
                    </div>

                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div className="p-4 border-t border-eden-700 bg-eden-800 rounded-b-2xl flex justify-end gap-3">
            <button onClick={onCancel} className="px-6 py-2.5 text-eden-100 hover:bg-eden-700 rounded-lg text-sm font-bold">Cancelar</button>
            <button onClick={() => onSave(formData)} disabled={!formData.name} className="px-8 py-2.5 bg-energia text-eden-900 rounded-lg text-sm font-black hover:bg-yellow-400 shadow-lg disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed">SALVAR ITEM</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      
      {showEffectModal && (
          <EffectEditor 
            effect={editingEffect} 
            onSave={(eff) => {
                const newEffects = editingEffect 
                    ? formData.effects.map((e: Effect) => e.id === eff.id ? eff : e)
                    : [...(formData.effects || []), eff];
                handleChange('effects', newEffects);
                setShowEffectModal(false);
            }} 
            onCancel={() => setShowEffectModal(false)} 
          />
      )}
    </div>
  );
};





export default function SheetInventory() {
  const { character, vars, updateCharacter, toggleItem } = useCharacter();
  const items = character.inventory || [];

  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
  const [isCreating, setIsCreating] = useState(false);
  const [editingItem, setEditingItem] = useState<any | null>(null);
  const [showCatalog, setShowCatalog] = useState(false);

  
  const currentLoad = items.reduce((acc, item) => acc + ((item as any).space || 0) * (item.quantity || 1), 0);
  const maxLoad = vars.CARGA?.max || 10;
  
  const prestige = character.personal.prestigePoints || 0;
  const rank = [...RANKS].reverse().find(r => prestige >= r.minPP) || RANKS[0];

  const categoryCounts = items.reduce((acc, item) => {
    let cat = item.category;
    if (item.modifications?.length) cat += item.modifications.length;
    if (item.curses?.length) cat += 2; 
    if (cat > 0) acc[cat] = (acc[cat] || 0) + item.quantity;
    return acc;
  }, {} as Record<number, number>);

  
  const handleSaveItem = (item: any) => {
      const finalItem = { ...item, isActive: item.isActive ?? true };
      if (editingItem) {
          updateCharacter(prev => ({ ...prev, inventory: prev.inventory.map(i => i.id === item.id ? finalItem : i) }));
      } else {
          updateCharacter(prev => ({ ...prev, inventory: [...prev.inventory, { ...finalItem, id: generateId() }] }));
      }
      setIsCreating(false);
      setEditingItem(null);
  };

  const handleDelete = (id: string) => {
      if(confirm("Remover item do inventário?")) {
          updateCharacter(prev => ({ ...prev, inventory: prev.inventory.filter(i => i.id !== id) }));
      }
  };

  const handleDuplicate = (item: any) => {
      const copy = { ...item, id: generateId(), name: `${item.name} (Cópia)` };
      updateCharacter(prev => ({ ...prev, inventory: [...prev.inventory, copy] }));
  };

  const addItemFromCatalog = (baseItem: any) => {
      const newItem = {
          ...baseItem,
          id: generateId(),
          quantity: 1,
          isActive: true,
          modifications: [],
          curses: [],
          effects: baseItem.effects || [],
          isCustom: false,
          space: baseItem.space || 1 
      };
      updateCharacter(prev => ({ ...prev, inventory: [...prev.inventory, newItem] }));
      setShowCatalog(false);
  };

  const filteredItems = items.filter(i => i.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()));
  const filteredCatalog = EQUIPMENT_LIST.filter(i => i.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()));

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col gap-4 animate-in fade-in h-full pb-20">
      
      {}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 shrink-0">
         <div className="bg-eden-800 border border-eden-700 rounded-xl p-4 flex items-center justify-between shadow-sm">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
               <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-eden-900 flex items-center justify-center border border-eden-600 text-energia"><Crown size={20} /></div>
               <div>
                   <div className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-eden-100/50">Patente</div>
                   <div className="text-lg font-black text-eden-100 leading-none">{rank.name}</div>
               </div>
            </div>
            <div className="text-right">
                <div className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-eden-100/50">Crédito</div>
                <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-1 text-conhecimento font-mono font-bold">{rank.credit}</div>
            </div>
         </div>
         
         <div className={`border rounded-xl p-4 flex items-center justify-between transition-colors shadow-sm ${currentLoad > maxLoad ? 'bg-red-900/20 border-red-500' : 'bg-eden-800 border-eden-700'}`}>
             <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
               <div className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center border ${currentLoad > maxLoad ? 'bg-red-900 text-red-200 border-red-500' : 'bg-eden-900 text-eden-100 border-eden-600'}`}><Scale size={20} /></div>
               <div>
                  <div className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-eden-100/50">Carga</div>
                  <div className={`text-lg font-black leading-none ${currentLoad > maxLoad ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-eden-100'}`}>{currentLoad} <span className="text-sm font-normal text-eden-100/40">/ {maxLoad}</span></div>
               </div>
            </div>
            {currentLoad > maxLoad && (<div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-red-400 text-xs font-bold animate-pulse"><AlertTriangle size={14} /> Sobrepeso</div>)}
         </div>
      </div>

      {}
      <div className="flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto pb-2 shrink-0 no-scrollbar">
          {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(cat => {
              const key = ['I', 'II', 'III', 'IV'][cat - 1] as keyof typeof rank.limit;
              const limit = rank.limit[key] || 0;
              const current = categoryCounts[cat] || 0;
              const isFull = current > limit; 
              return (
                  <div key={cat} className={`flex-1 min-w-[80px] bg-eden-900/40 border rounded-lg p-2 text-center flex flex-col justify-center ${isFull ? 'border-red-500/50 bg-red-500/5' : 'border-eden-700'}`}>
                      <span className="text-[9px] text-eden-100/40 font-bold uppercase">Cat {key}</span>
                      <span className={`text-sm font-mono font-bold ${isFull ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-eden-100'}`}>{current} / {limit}</span>
                  </div>
              )
          })}
      </div>

      {}
      <div className="flex-1 bg-eden-800 border border-eden-700 rounded-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden min-h-[500px] shadow-sm">
          <div className="p-4 border-b border-eden-700 flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4 items-center justify-between bg-eden-900/30">
              <h3 className="font-bold text-eden-100 flex items-center gap-2"><ShoppingBag size={18} className="text-energia" /> Inventário <span className="text-xs bg-eden-900 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-eden-100/50">{items.length}</span></h3>
              <div className="flex gap-2 w-full md:w-auto">
                 <div className="relative flex-1 md:w-48">
                    <Search className="absolute left-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-eden-100/30 w-4 h-4"/>
                    <input type="text" placeholder="Filtrar..." value={searchTerm} onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-eden-950 border border-eden-700 rounded-lg pl-8 pr-3 py-1.5 text-sm text-eden-100 focus:border-energia outline-none"/>
                 </div>
                 <button onClick={() => setShowCatalog(true)} className="bg-eden-700 text-eden-100 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg font-bold text-xs hover:bg-eden-600 flex items-center gap-1 transition-all"><Book size={14} /> <span className="hidden md:inline">Catálogo</span></button>
                 <button onClick={() => { setEditingItem(null); setIsCreating(true); }} className="bg-energia text-eden-900 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg font-bold text-xs hover:bg-yellow-400 flex items-center gap-1 shadow-lg hover:shadow-energia/20 transition-all"><Plus size={14} /> <span className="hidden md:inline">Criar Item</span></button>
              </div>
          </div>

          <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar p-4 space-y-3">
              {filteredItems.length === 0 ? (
                  <div className="h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-eden-100/20 gap-4"><ShoppingBag size={48} strokeWidth={1} /><p className="text-sm">Inventário vazio.</p></div>
              ) : (
                  filteredItems.map(item => {
                      const typeInfo = ITEM_TYPES.find(t => t.id === item.type) || ITEM_TYPES[5];
                      const styleClass = getTypeStyle(item);
                      const isEquipped = item.isActive;
                      
                      let displayCat = item.category;
                      if(item.modifications?.length) displayCat += item.modifications.length;
                      if(item.curses?.length) displayCat += 2;
                      const displayElem = (item as any).element && (item as any).type === 'cursed' ? getElementStyle((item as any).element) : null;

                      return (
                          <div key={item.id} className={`group relative rounded-xl border p-3 flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-3 items-start md:items-center transition-all ${isEquipped ? `bg-eden-800 shadow-md ${styleClass}` : 'bg-eden-900/40 border-eden-700/30 opacity-60 grayscale-[0.8] hover:grayscale-0 hover:opacity-100'}`}>
                              
                              {}
                              <button 
                                onClick={() => toggleItem(item.id)} 
                                className={`shrink-0 p-2 rounded-full transition-all ${isEquipped ? 'text-energia bg-energia/10' : 'text-eden-100/20 hover:text-eden-100 hover:bg-white/5'}`}
                                title={isEquipped ? "Desequipar (Desativa Efeitos)" : "Equipar (Ativa Efeitos)"}
                              >
                                  {isEquipped ? <CheckCircle2 size={24} /> : <Circle size={24} />}
                              </button>

                              <div className="flex items-center gap-3 flex-1 min-w-0">
                                  <div className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center border shrink-0 bg-eden-900/50 ${isEquipped ? 'border-current opacity-80' : 'border-eden-700 text-eden-100/30'}`}>
                                      <typeInfo.icon size={20} />
                                  </div>
                                  <div className="min-w-0">
                                      <h4 className={`font-bold text-sm truncate flex items-center gap-2 ${isEquipped ? 'text-eden-100' : 'text-eden-100/70'}`}>
                                          {item.name} 
                                          {item.quantity > 1 && <span className="text-xs bg-black/20 px-1.5 rounded">x{item.quantity}</span>}
                                          {displayElem && <span className={`text-[9px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded border ${displayElem.border} ${displayElem.color} ${displayElem.bg} uppercase font-black`}>{(item as any).element}</span>}
                                      </h4>
                                      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wide font-bold opacity-60 mt-0.5">
                                          <span>{typeInfo.label}</span>
                                          <span>•</span>
                                          <span>Cat {['0', 'I', 'II', 'III', 'IV'][Math.min(displayCat, 4)]}</span>
                                          <span>•</span>
                                          <span>{(item as any).space || 1} Esp</span>
                                          <div className="flex gap-1 ml-1">
                                              {item.curses?.length > 0 && <Ghost size={12} className="text-purple-400" />}
                                              {item.modifications?.length > 0 && <Zap size={12} className="text-blue-400" />}
                                              {}
                                              {item.effects?.length > 0 && <Filter size={12} className="text-energia" />}
                                          </div>
                                      </div>
                                  </div>
                              </div>

                              <div className="flex gap-1 ml-auto border-t md:border-none border-white/10 pt-2 md:pt-0 w-full md:w-auto justify-end">
                                  <button onClick={() => { setEditingItem(item); setIsCreating(true); }} className="p-2 text-eden-100/40 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg transition-colors" title="Editar"><Settings size={16}/></button>
                                  <button onClick={() => handleDuplicate(item)} className="p-2 text-eden-100/40 hover:text-energia hover:bg-energia/10 rounded-lg transition-colors" title="Duplicar"><Package size={16}/></button>
                                  <button onClick={() => handleDelete(item.id)} className="p-2 text-eden-100/40 hover:text-red-400 hover:bg-red-500/10 rounded-lg transition-colors" title="Excluir"><Trash2 size={16}/></button>
                              </div>
                          </div>
                      )
                  })
              )}
          </div>
      </div>

      {}
      {(isCreating || editingItem) && (
        <ItemForm initialData={editingItem || undefined} onSave={handleSaveItem} onCancel={() => { setIsCreating(false); setEditingItem(null); }} />
      )}

      {}
      {showCatalog && (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm flex items-center justify-center z-[90] p-4">
              <div className="bg-eden-900 border border-eden-600 rounded-2xl w-full max-w-2xl max-h-[80vh] flex flex-col shadow-2xl animate-in zoom-in-95">
                  <div className="p-4 border-b border-eden-700 flex justify-between items-center bg-eden-800 rounded-t-2xl">
                      <h3 className="font-bold text-eden-100">Catálogo de Referência</h3>
                      <button onClick={() => setShowCatalog(false)}><X size={20}/></button>
                  </div>
                  <div className="p-4 border-b border-eden-700 bg-eden-900">
                      <input type="text" placeholder="Buscar no catálogo..." value={searchTerm} onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-eden-950 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-sm text-white focus:border-energia outline-none"/>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar p-4 space-y-2">
                      {filteredCatalog.map((item, idx) => (
                          <div key={idx} className="p-3 rounded border border-eden-700 bg-eden-800/50 flex justify-between items-center hover:border-eden-500 transition-colors">
                              <div>
                                  <div className="font-bold text-sm text-eden-100">{item.name}</div>
                                  <div className="text-[10px] text-eden-100/50">Cat {item.category} • {item.space} Esp • {item.type}</div>
                              </div>
                              <button onClick={() => addItemFromCatalog(item)} className="bg-eden-700 hover:bg-eden-600 text-white px-3 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold">Adicionar</button>
                          </div>
                      ))}
                  </div>
              </div>
          </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

FILE: SheetNotes.tsx

import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';
import { 
  Pen, Highlighter, Eraser, Type, PaintBucket, Image as ImageIcon,
  Undo, Redo, Trash2, Download, X, Minus, Plus, Save, 
  AlignLeft, AlignCenter, AlignRight, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Ban, Move, Maximize2
} from 'lucide-react';
import type { NotePage, TextObject, ImageObject } from '../../types/characterSchema';
import { useCharacter } from '../../context/CharacterContext';


interface HistoryStep {
    base: ImageData;
    highlight: ImageData;
    pen: ImageData;
}


interface ExtendedNotePage extends Omit<NotePage, 'drawing'> {
  drawing: string;
  layerBase?: string;
  layerHighlight?: string;
  layerPen?: string;
  texts: TextObject[];  
  images: ImageObject[]; 
}


const ColorPalette = ({ selectedColor, onSelect, label, allowTransparent = false }: { selectedColor: string, onSelect: (c: string) => void, label?: string, allowTransparent?: boolean }) => {
    const COLORS = ['#000000', '#ef4444', '#3b82f6', '#22c55e', '#eab308', '#a855f7', '#f97316', '#ffffff'];
    return (
        <div className="flex flex-col gap-1 min-w-[120px]">
            {label && <span className="text-[9px] uppercase font-bold text-eden-100/40 ml-1">{label}</span>}
            <div className="flex gap-1 p-1 bg-eden-900/80 rounded-lg border border-eden-700/50 items-center overflow-x-auto custom-scrollbar pb-1">
                {COLORS.map(c => (
                    <button 
                        key={c} 
                        onClick={() => onSelect(c)}
                        className={`w-4 h-4 md:w-5 md:h-5 rounded-full border-2 transition-transform shrink-0 ${selectedColor === c ? 'border-white scale-110 shadow-lg' : 'border-transparent'}`}
                        style={{ backgroundColor: c }}
                        title={c}
                    />
                ))}
                
                <label className={`w-4 h-4 md:w-5 md:h-5 rounded-full border-2 flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-700 to-gray-900 shrink-0 ${!COLORS.includes(selectedColor) && selectedColor !== 'transparent' ? 'border-white scale-110' : 'border-transparent'}`}>
                    <input type="color" className="opacity-0 w-full h-full cursor-pointer" value={selectedColor !== 'transparent' ? selectedColor : '#000000'} onChange={e => onSelect(e.target.value)} />
                </label>

                {allowTransparent && (
                    <>
                        <div className="w-px bg-eden-700 mx-0.5 h-3 md:h-4 shrink-0"></div>
                        <button onClick={() => onSelect('transparent')} className={`w-4 h-4 md:w-5 md:h-5 rounded-full border-2 flex items-center justify-center bg-eden-950 shrink-0 ${selectedColor === 'transparent' ? 'border-white' : 'border-eden-600'}`} title="Transparente">
                            <Ban size={10} className="text-red-400"/>
                        </button>
                    </>
                )}
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

export default function SheetNotes() {
  const { character, updateCharacter } = useCharacter(); 

  
  const canvasBaseRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);
  const canvasHighlightRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);
  const canvasPenRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);
  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);

  
  const [activePage, setActivePage] = useState(0);
  const [pageTitle, setPageTitle] = useState('');
  const [hasChanges, setHasChanges] = useState(false);

  
  const [tool, setTool] = useState<'pen' | 'highlighter' | 'eraser' | 'bucket' | 'text' | 'image'>('pen');

  
  const [color, setColor] = useState('#000000');
  const [brushSize, setBrushSize] = useState(3);
  const [fontSize, setFontSize] = useState(16);
  const [textAlign, setTextAlign] = useState<'left' | 'center' | 'right'>('left');
  
  const [textBg, setTextBg] = useState<string>('transparent');
  const [textBorder, setTextBorder] = useState<string>('transparent');

  
  const [isDrawing, setIsDrawing] = useState(false);
  const [history, setHistory] = useState<HistoryStep[]>([]);
  const [historyStep, setHistoryStep] = useState(-1);
  
  const [texts, setTexts] = useState<TextObject[]>([]);
  const [images, setImages] = useState<ImageObject[]>([]);
  const [editingTextId, setEditingTextId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  
  const [draggingId, setDraggingId] = useState<{ type: 'text' | 'image', id: string, startX: number, startY: number, initialObjX: number, initialObjY: number } | null>(null);
  const [resizingId, setResizingId] = useState<{ id: string, startX: number, startY: number, startW: number, startH: number } | null>(null);
  const [pendingImage, setPendingImage] = useState<string | null>(null);
  
  const A4_WIDTH = 794;
  const A4_HEIGHT = 1123;
  const MAX_PAGES = 20;

  useEffect(() => {
      if (editingTextId) {
          const txt = texts.find(t => t.id === editingTextId);
          if (txt) {
              setColor(txt.color);
              setFontSize(txt.fontSize);
              setTextAlign(txt.align);
              setTextBg(txt.backgroundColor || 'transparent');
              setTextBorder(txt.borderColor || 'transparent');
          }
      }
  }, [editingTextId]);

  
  useEffect(() => {
      const handleGlobalMove = (e: MouseEvent) => {
          if (resizingId) {
              e.preventDefault();
              e.stopPropagation(); 
              const deltaX = e.clientX - resizingId.startX;
              const deltaY = e.clientY - resizingId.startY;
              
              setImages(prev => prev.map(img => 
                  img.id === resizingId.id 
                  ? { 
                      ...img, 
                      width: Math.max(50, resizingId.startW + deltaX), 
                      height: Math.max(50, resizingId.startH + deltaY) 
                    } 
                  : img
              ));
              return;
          }

          if (draggingId) {
              e.preventDefault();
              const deltaX = e.clientX - draggingId.startX;
              const deltaY = e.clientY - draggingId.startY;
              
              if (draggingId.type === 'image') {
                  setImages(prev => prev.map(img => img.id === draggingId.id ? { ...img, x: draggingId.initialObjX + deltaX, y: draggingId.initialObjY + deltaY } : img));
              } else {
                  setTexts(prev => prev.map(txt => txt.id === draggingId.id ? { ...txt, x: draggingId.initialObjX + deltaX, y: draggingId.initialObjY + deltaY } : txt));
              }
          }
      };

      const handleGlobalUp = () => {
          if (resizingId || draggingId) {
              setResizingId(null); 
              setDraggingId(null); 
              setHasChanges(true);
          }
      };

      if (resizingId || draggingId) {
          window.addEventListener('mousemove', handleGlobalMove);
          window.addEventListener('mouseup', handleGlobalUp);
      }
      return () => {
          window.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleGlobalMove);
          window.removeEventListener('mouseup', handleGlobalUp);
      };
  }, [resizingId, draggingId]);

  useEffect(() => { loadPage(activePage); }, [activePage]);

  const loadPage = (pageIndex: number) => {
    const ctxBase = canvasBaseRef.current?.getContext('2d');
    const ctxHigh = canvasHighlightRef.current?.getContext('2d');
    const ctxPen = canvasPenRef.current?.getContext('2d');
    if (!ctxBase || !ctxHigh || !ctxPen) return;

    [ctxBase, ctxHigh, ctxPen].forEach(ctx => ctx.clearRect(0, 0, A4_WIDTH, A4_HEIGHT));
    ctxBase.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
    ctxBase.fillRect(0, 0, A4_WIDTH, A4_HEIGHT);

    const savedNote = character.notes?.find(n => n.id === pageIndex) as unknown as ExtendedNotePage | undefined;

    if (savedNote) {
        setTexts(savedNote.texts || []);
        setImages(savedNote.images || []);
        setPageTitle(savedNote.title || `Anotação ${pageIndex + 1}`);

        const loadLayer = (src: string | undefined, ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D) => new Promise<void>((resolve) => {
            if (!src) return resolve();
            const img = new Image();
            img.onload = () => { ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0); resolve(); };
            img.src = src;
        });

        Promise.all([
            loadLayer(savedNote.layerBase, ctxBase),
            loadLayer(savedNote.layerHighlight, ctxHigh),
            loadLayer(savedNote.layerPen || savedNote.drawing, ctxPen)
        ]).then(() => saveHistoryState());
    } else {
        setTexts([]); setImages([]); setPageTitle(`Anotação ${pageIndex + 1}`);
        saveHistoryState();
    }
    setHasChanges(false);
  };

  const saveCurrentPage = () => {
      const baseData = canvasBaseRef.current?.toDataURL() || '';
      const highData = canvasHighlightRef.current?.toDataURL() || '';
      const penData = canvasPenRef.current?.toDataURL() || '';
      const currentNotes = [...(character.notes || [])];
      const existingIndex = currentNotes.findIndex(n => n.id === activePage);

      const newNoteData: ExtendedNotePage = {
          id: activePage,
          title: pageTitle,
          layerBase: baseData,
          layerHighlight: highData,
          layerPen: penData,
          drawing: penData, 
          texts: texts,
          images: images
      };

      if (existingIndex >= 0) {
          currentNotes[existingIndex] = newNoteData as unknown as NotePage;
      } else {
          currentNotes.push(newNoteData as unknown as NotePage);
      }

      updateCharacter(prev => ({ ...prev, notes: currentNotes }));
      setHasChanges(false);
      alert(`"${pageTitle}" salva com sucesso!`);
  };

  
  
  const colorsMatch = (r1: number, g1: number, b1: number, r2: number, g2: number, b2: number) => {
      return Math.abs(r1 - r2) < 10 && Math.abs(g1 - g2) < 10 && Math.abs(b1 - b2) < 10;
  };

  const floodFill = (startX: number, startY: number, fillColor: string) => {
      const ctxBase = canvasBaseRef.current?.getContext('2d');
      const ctxPen = canvasPenRef.current?.getContext('2d');
      if (!ctxBase || !ctxPen) return;

      const w = A4_WIDTH; const h = A4_HEIGHT;
      const baseData = ctxBase.getImageData(0,0,w,h).data;
      const penData = ctxPen.getImageData(0,0,w,h).data;

      let r = 0, g = 0, b = 0;
      if (fillColor.startsWith('#')) {
          const hex = fillColor.slice(1);
          if (hex.length === 3) {
             r = parseInt(hex[0]+hex[0], 16);
             g = parseInt(hex[1]+hex[1], 16);
             b = parseInt(hex[2]+hex[2], 16);
          } else {
             r = parseInt(hex.slice(0, 2), 16);
             g = parseInt(hex.slice(2, 4), 16);
             b = parseInt(hex.slice(4, 6), 16);
          }
      }
      
      const startPos = (startY * w + startX) * 4;
      const startR = baseData[startPos], startG = baseData[startPos + 1], startB = baseData[startPos + 2];
      
      if (startR === r && startG === g && startB === b) return;

      const output = ctxBase.createImageData(w, h);
