        description: 'Você esteve em um meio de pessoas dedicadas a cuidar da mente humana… Mas, quando descobriu a maior ameaça para a nossa psique, descobriu também que seus colegas não passavam de tolos céticos. Quando você falou sobre o paranormal, eles apenas riram. Desprezado pela academia, você decidiu perseguir a verdade sozinho. Afinal, a diferença entre o remédio e o veneno é a dosagem. Se o paranormal pode ser usado para perturbar, também pode ser usado para sanar. Ele só precisa ser estudado, analisado e aplicado por alguém competente como você, mesmo que isso custe sua vida.',
        abilities: [
            { nex: 10, name: 'Terapia', description: 'Usa Profissão(Psi) como Diplomacia. 2 PE (ou 1 PE se já tiver): Substitui resistência mental de aliado.', 
              effects: [
                  { category: 'manual', value: 0, description: 'Usa Profissão (Psicólogo) como Diplomacia.' },
                  { category: 'manual', value: 0, restrictions: [{ type: 'perda_atual', value: 2, extra: 'PE' }], description: 'Substitui resistência mental de aliado por Profissão (2 PE).' }
              ] 
            },
            { nex: 40, name: 'Palavras-chave', description: 'Ao acalmar, gaste PE para curar Sanidade (1 PE = 1 SAN).', 
              effects: [{ category: 'manual', value: 0, description: 'Acalmar: Gaste PE para curar SAN (1:1).' }] 
            },
            { nex: 65, name: 'Reprogramação Mental', description: 'Interlúdio e 5 PE: Concede um poder temporário a um aliado até o próximo interlúdio.', 
              effects: [{ category: 'manual', value: 0, restrictions: [{ type: 'perda_atual', value: 5, extra: 'PE' }], description: 'Conceder poder a aliado (Interlúdio, 5 PE).' }] 
            },
            { nex: 99, name: 'A Sanidade Está Lá Fora', description: 'Movimento e 5 PE: Remove condições de Medo e Mentais de alvo adjacente.', 
              effects: [{ category: 'manual', value: 0, restrictions: [{ type: 'perda_atual', value: 5, extra: 'PE' }], description: 'Remover Medo/Mental (Movimento, 5 PE).' }] 
            }
        ]
      }
];


========================================
FILE: Catalog.tsx
PATH: C:\Users\bruno\Downloads\eden-arquivos\src\pages\Catalog.tsx
========================================

import { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { 
  ArrowLeft, Search, Book, Zap, Backpack, 
  Sword, Shield, Ghost, AlertTriangle, HeartHandshake, Check, Crosshair, X,
  Gem, Bomb, Wrench
} from 'lucide-react';


import { ORIGINS } from '../data/origins';
import { TRAILS } from '../data/trails';
import { CLASS_POWERS, PARANORMAL_POWERS } from '../data/powers';
import { ITEMS } from '../data/items';
import { MODIFICATIONS } from '../data/modifications';
import { RITUALS } from '../data/rituals';

type TabType = 'origins' | 'classes' | 'powers' | 'items' | 'rituals';

const TABS = [
  { id: 'origins', label: 'Origens', icon: Book },
  { id: 'classes', label: 'Trilhas', icon: Shield },
  { id: 'powers', label: 'Poderes', icon: Zap },
  { id: 'items', label: 'Arsenal', icon: Backpack },
  { id: 'rituals', label: 'Rituais', icon: Ghost },
] as const;

export default function Catalog() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<TabType>('items');
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
  
  
  const [filter1, setFilter1] = useState<string | null>(null); 
  const [filter2, setFilter2] = useState<string | null>(null); 

  
  const [selectedItem, setSelectedItem] = useState<any | null>(null);

  
  const [showDisclaimer, setShowDisclaimer] = useState(false);
  const [dontShowAgain, setDontShowAgain] = useState(false);

  
  const STORAGE_KEY = 'eden_catalog_disclaimer_v2';

  useEffect(() => {
    const hasHiddenDisclaimer = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
    if (!hasHiddenDisclaimer) {
        setShowDisclaimer(true);
    }
  }, []);

  const handleCloseDisclaimer = () => {
      if (dontShowAgain) {
          localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, 'true');
      }
      setShowDisclaimer(false);
  };

  
  useEffect(() => {
    
    setFilter1(null);
    setFilter2(null);
    setSearchTerm('');
  }, [activeTab]);

  
  
  
  const allOriginSkills = useMemo(() => {
      const skills = new Set<string>();
      ORIGINS.forEach(o => o.skills.forEach(s => skills.add(s)));
      return Array.from(skills).sort();
  }, []);

  
  const filteredData = useMemo(() => {
    const term = searchTerm.toLowerCase();
    
    const matchesSearch = (item: any) => {
      if (!term) return true;
      return (
        item.name.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
        item.description?.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
        (item.element && item.element.toLowerCase().includes(term))
      );
    };

    const sortAlpha = (a: any, b: any) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name);

    switch (activeTab) {
        case 'origins': {
            let data = ORIGINS.filter(matchesSearch);
            if (filter1) {
                data = data.filter(o => o.skills.includes(filter1));
            }
            return data.sort(sortAlpha);
        }

        case 'classes': {
            let data = TRAILS.filter(matchesSearch);
            if (filter1) {
                data = data.filter(t => t.class === filter1.toLowerCase());
            }
            return data.sort(sortAlpha);
        }

        case 'powers': {
            let data: any[] = [];
            
            if (filter1 === 'Paranormal') {
                data = PARANORMAL_POWERS;
            } else if (filter1 === 'Geral') {
                data = CLASS_POWERS.filter(p => p.class === 'all');
            } else if (filter1 && ['Combatente', 'Especialista', 'Ocultista'].includes(filter1)) {
                data = CLASS_POWERS.filter(p => p.class === filter1.toLowerCase());
            } else {
                data = [...CLASS_POWERS, ...PARANORMAL_POWERS];
            }

            return data.filter(matchesSearch).sort(sortAlpha);
        }

        case 'items': {
            let data = ITEMS.filter(matchesSearch);

            if (filter1) {
                switch(filter1) {
                    case 'Armas': 
                        data = data.filter(i => i.type === 'weapon'); 
                        break;
                    case 'Proteções': 
                        data = data.filter(i => i.type === 'protection'); 
                        break;
                    case 'Munições': 
                        data = data.filter(i => i.type === 'ammo' || (i as any).subType === 'ammo'); 
                        break;
                    case 'Explosivos': 
                        data = data.filter(i => i.type === 'explosive'); 
                        break;
                    case 'Paranormais': 
                        data = data.filter(i => i.type === 'paranormal'); 
                        break;
                    case 'Amaldiçoados': 
                        data = data.filter(i => (i as any).subType === 'cursed_item' || i.isCursed); 
                        break;
                    case 'Acessórios': 
                        data = data.filter(i => i.type === 'accessory'); 
                        break;
                    case 'Operacionais': 
                        data = data.filter(i => 
                            i.type === 'general' && 
                            (i as any).subType !== 'ammo' && 
                            (i as any).subType !== 'cursed_item'
                        ); 
                        break;
                }
            }
            return data.sort(sortAlpha);
        }

        case 'rituals': {
            let data = RITUALS.filter(matchesSearch);
            if (filter1) {
                const circle = parseInt(filter1);
                data = data.filter(r => r.circle === circle);
            }
            if (filter2) {
                data = data.filter(r => r.element.toLowerCase() === filter2.toLowerCase());
            }
            return data.sort(sortAlpha);
        }
        
        default: return [];
    }
  }, [activeTab, searchTerm, filter1, filter2, allOriginSkills]);

  
  const getItemStyle = (item: any) => {
      if (item.subType === 'cursed_item' || item.isCursed) 
          return { border: 'border-purple-500/40', bg: 'bg-purple-950/20', icon: Ghost, iconColor: 'text-purple-400', label: 'Amaldiçoado' };
      
      switch (item.type) {
          case 'weapon': 
              return { border: 'border-red-500/30', bg: 'bg-red-950/10', icon: Sword, iconColor: 'text-red-400', label: 'Arma' };
          case 'protection': 
              return { border: 'border-blue-500/30', bg: 'bg-blue-950/10', icon: Shield, iconColor: 'text-blue-400', label: 'Proteção' };
          case 'explosive': 
              return { border: 'border-orange-500/40', bg: 'bg-orange-950/10', icon: Bomb, iconColor: 'text-orange-400', label: 'Explosivo' };
          case 'paranormal': 
              return { border: 'border-cyan-500/40', bg: 'bg-cyan-950/10', icon: Gem, iconColor: 'text-cyan-400', label: 'Paranormal' };
          case 'accessory': 
              return { border: 'border-emerald-500/30', bg: 'bg-emerald-950/10', icon: Backpack, iconColor: 'text-emerald-400', label: 'Acessório' };
          case 'general':
              if (item.subType === 'ammo') 
                  return { border: 'border-amber-500/30', bg: 'bg-amber-950/10', icon: Crosshair, iconColor: 'text-amber-400', label: 'Munição' };
              return { border: 'border-eden-600', bg: 'bg-eden-800', icon: Wrench, iconColor: 'text-eden-100/60', label: 'Operacional' };
          default:
              return { border: 'border-eden-700', bg: 'bg-eden-800', icon: Backpack, iconColor: 'text-eden-100/50', label: 'Item' };
      }
  };

  
  const renderModalContent = () => {
    if (!selectedItem) return null;

    
    if (selectedItem.circle) {
        return (
            <div className="space-y-6">
                <div className="flex justify-between items-start border-b border-eden-700 pb-4">
                    <div>
                        <h2 className="text-3xl font-black text-white uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">{selectedItem.name}</h2>
                        <div className="flex gap-2">
                            <span className={`px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest
                                ${selectedItem.element === 'morte' ? 'bg-zinc-950 text-zinc-400 border border-zinc-800' :
                                  selectedItem.element === 'sangue' ? 'bg-red-950 text-red-400 border border-red-900' :
                                  selectedItem.element === 'energia' ? 'bg-violet-950 text-violet-400 border border-violet-900' :
                                  selectedItem.element === 'conhecimento' ? 'bg-amber-950 text-amber-400 border border-amber-900' : 'bg-eden-800 text-white'
                                }`}>
                                {selectedItem.element} {selectedItem.circle}
                            </span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 bg-eden-950/50 p-4 rounded-xl border border-eden-700/50 text-xs font-mono uppercase text-eden-100/70">
                    <div><span className="block text-eden-100/30 mb-1">Execução</span><strong className="text-eden-100">{selectedItem.execution}</strong></div>
                    <div><span className="block text-eden-100/30 mb-1">Alcance</span><strong className="text-eden-100">{selectedItem.range}</strong></div>
                    <div><span className="block text-eden-100/30 mb-1">Alvo/Área</span><strong className="text-eden-100">{selectedItem.target}</strong></div>
                    <div><span className="block text-eden-100/30 mb-1">Duração</span><strong className="text-eden-100">{selectedItem.duration}</strong></div>
                    {selectedItem.resistance && (
                        <div className="col-span-2 md:col-span-4 mt-2 pt-2 border-t border-white/5">
                            <span className="block text-eden-100/30 mb-1">Resistência</span><strong className="text-eden-100">{selectedItem.resistance}</strong>
                        </div>
                    )}
                </div>

                <div className="space-y-6 text-sm leading-relaxed text-eden-100/90">
                    <div>
                        <h4 className="text-eden-100 font-bold mb-2 text-lg">Normal</h4>
                        <p className="bg-eden-800/30 p-4 rounded-lg border border-eden-700/30 whitespace-pre-wrap">{selectedItem.description}<br/><br/><span className="text-eden-100/60 italic">{selectedItem.normal.description}</span></p>
                    </div>
                    {selectedItem.discente && (
                        <div>
                            <h4 className="text-cyan-400 font-bold mb-2 text-lg">Discente (+{selectedItem.discente.cost - selectedItem.normal.cost} PE)</h4>
                            <p className="bg-cyan-950/10 p-4 rounded-lg border border-cyan-900/30">{selectedItem.discente.description}</p>
                        </div>
                    )}
                    {selectedItem.verdadeiro && (
                        <div>
                            <h4 className="text-energia font-bold mb-2 text-lg">Verdadeiro (+{selectedItem.verdadeiro.cost - selectedItem.normal.cost} PE)</h4>
                            <p className="bg-yellow-950/10 p-4 rounded-lg border border-yellow-900/30">{selectedItem.verdadeiro.description}</p>
                        </div>
                    )}
                </div>
            </div>
        );
    }

    
    if (selectedItem.category !== undefined) {
        const styles = getItemStyle(selectedItem);
        return (
            <div className="space-y-6">
                <div className="border-b border-eden-700 pb-4">
                    <h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-white uppercase tracking-wider mb-2 flex items-center gap-3">
                        <div className={`p-2 rounded-lg ${styles.bg} border ${styles.border}`}>
                            <styles.icon size={24} className={styles.iconColor} />
                        </div>
                        {selectedItem.name}
                    </h2>
                    <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                        <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-eden-950 rounded text-xs font-mono text-eden-100/50 uppercase border border-eden-800">Cat {selectedItem.category}</span>
                        <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-eden-950 rounded text-xs font-mono text-eden-100/50 uppercase border border-eden-800">Espaço {selectedItem.space}</span>
                        <span className={`px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase ${styles.bg} ${styles.iconColor} border ${styles.border}`}>{styles.label}</span>
                        
                        {selectedItem.type === 'weapon' && selectedItem.subType && (
                            <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-eden-800 rounded text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/60 border border-eden-700 uppercase">{selectedItem.subType}</span>
                        )}
                        {selectedItem.element && (
                            <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-purple-950/30 rounded text-xs font-bold text-purple-400 border border-purple-900/30 uppercase">{selectedItem.element}</span>
                        )}
                    </div>
                </div>
                <p className="text-base text-eden-100/90 leading-relaxed bg-eden-800/30 p-4 rounded-lg border border-eden-700/50">{selectedItem.description}</p>
                
                {(selectedItem.damage || selectedItem.defenseBonus) && (
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                        {selectedItem.damage && <div className="bg-eden-900 p-3 rounded border border-eden-700"><span className="text-xs text-eden-100/40 uppercase block mb-1">Dano</span><strong className="text-red-300 text-lg">{selectedItem.damage}</strong><span className="text-xs text-eden-100/40 ml-1 uppercase">{selectedItem.damageType}</span></div>}
                        {selectedItem.critical && <div className="bg-eden-900 p-3 rounded border border-eden-700"><span className="text-xs text-eden-100/40 uppercase block mb-1">Crítico</span><strong className="text-eden-100 text-lg">{selectedItem.critical.range < 20 ? `${selectedItem.critical.range}/` : ''}x{selectedItem.critical.multiplier}</strong></div>}
                        {selectedItem.defenseBonus > 0 && <div className="bg-eden-900 p-3 rounded border border-eden-700"><span className="text-xs text-eden-100/40 uppercase block mb-1">Defesa</span><strong className="text-blue-300 text-lg">+{selectedItem.defenseBonus}</strong></div>}
                        {selectedItem.range && <div className="bg-eden-900 p-3 rounded border border-eden-700"><span className="text-xs text-eden-100/40 uppercase block mb-1">Alcance</span><strong className="text-eden-100 text-lg capitalize">{selectedItem.range}</strong></div>}
                    </div>
                )}
                {selectedItem.effects && selectedItem.effects.length > 0 && (
                    <div><h4 className="text-sm font-bold text-eden-100/60 uppercase mb-3">Efeitos Mecânicos</h4><div className="space-y-2">{selectedItem.effects.map((ef: any, idx: number) => (<div key={idx} className="text-sm bg-eden-950/30 p-2 rounded border-l-2 border-energia pl-3">{ef.description}</div>))}</div></div>
                )}
            </div>
        );
    }

    
    if (selectedItem.abilities) {
        return (
            <div className="space-y-6">
                <div className="border-b border-eden-700 pb-4">
                    <span className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/40 uppercase tracking-widest block mb-1">{selectedItem.class}</span>
                    <h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-white uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">{selectedItem.name}</h2>
                </div>
                
                <p className="text-base text-eden-100/90 leading-relaxed bg-eden-800/30 p-4 rounded-lg border border-eden-700/50 whitespace-pre-wrap">
                    {selectedItem.description}
                </p>

                <div className="space-y-6 mt-4">
                    {selectedItem.abilities.map((ab: any) => (
                        <div key={ab.name} className="relative pl-6 pb-2 border-l-2 border-eden-700">
                            <div className="absolute -left-[9px] top-0 w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-eden-900 border-2 border-energia flex items-center justify-center"><div className="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-energia rounded-full"></div></div>
                            <h4 className="text-lg font-bold text-energia mb-1">{ab.nex}% - {ab.name}</h4>
                            <p className="text-sm text-eden-100/80 leading-relaxed bg-eden-800/50 p-3 rounded-lg">{ab.description}</p>
                        </div>
                    ))}
                </div>
            </div>
        );
    }

    
    return (
        <div className="space-y-6">
            <div className="border-b border-eden-700 pb-4">
                {selectedItem.class && <span className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/40 uppercase tracking-widest block mb-1">{selectedItem.class === 'all' ? 'Geral' : selectedItem.class}</span>}
                <h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-white uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">{selectedItem.name}</h2>
                <div className="flex gap-2">
                    {selectedItem.element && (
                        <span className={`px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest
                            ${selectedItem.element === 'morte' ? 'bg-zinc-950 text-zinc-400 border border-zinc-800' :
                              selectedItem.element === 'sangue' ? 'bg-red-950 text-red-400 border border-red-900' :
                              selectedItem.element === 'energia' ? 'bg-violet-950 text-violet-400 border border-violet-900' :
                              selectedItem.element === 'conhecimento' ? 'bg-amber-950 text-amber-400 border border-amber-900' : 'bg-eden-800 text-white'
                            }`}>
                            {selectedItem.element}
                        </span>
                    )}
                    {selectedItem.type && selectedItem.type !== 'class' && (
                        <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-eden-950 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase border border-eden-800">{selectedItem.type}</span>
                    )}
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <p className="text-base text-eden-100/90 leading-relaxed bg-eden-800/30 p-4 rounded-lg border border-eden-700/50 whitespace-pre-wrap">
                {selectedItem.description}
            </p>
            
            {}
            {selectedItem.skills && (
                <div>
                    <h4 className="text-sm font-bold text-eden-100/60 uppercase mb-2">Perícias Treinadas</h4>
                    <div className="flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
                        {selectedItem.skills.map((s: string) => (<span key={s} className="bg-energia/10 text-energia px-3 py-1 rounded text-sm font-bold border border-energia/20">{s}</span>))}
                    </div>
                </div>
            )}
            {selectedItem.power && (
                <div className="bg-eden-900 p-4 rounded-xl border border-eden-700 mt-4">
                    <h4 className="text-energia font-bold mb-2 flex items-center gap-2"><Zap size={16}/> Poder: {selectedItem.power.name}</h4>
                    <p className="text-sm text-eden-100/80">{selectedItem.power.description}</p>
                </div>
            )}

            {}
            {selectedItem.prerequisites && selectedItem.prerequisites.length > 0 && (
                <div className="mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-eden-700/50">
                    <h4 className="text-sm font-bold text-red-400 uppercase mb-2">Pré-requisitos</h4>
                    <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                        {selectedItem.prerequisites.map((req: any, idx: number) => (
                            <span key={idx} className="text-xs bg-red-950/30 text-red-300 px-2 py-1 rounded border border-red-900/30">
                                {req.type === 'attribute' ? `${req.value} ${req.quantity}` : `${req.type}: ${req.value}`}
                            </span>
                        ))}
                    </div>
                </div>
            )}
        </div>
    );
  };

  const renderContent = () => {
    switch (activeTab) {
      case 'origins':
        return (
          <div className="space-y-6">
             <div className="flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto pb-2 scrollbar-hide">
                <button onClick={() => setFilter1(null)} className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold border whitespace-nowrap ${!filter1 ? 'bg-cyan-500/20 border-cyan-500 text-cyan-400' : 'border-eden-700 text-eden-100/50'}`}>Todos</button>
                {allOriginSkills.map(skill => (
                    <button key={skill} onClick={() => setFilter1(skill)} className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold border whitespace-nowrap ${filter1 === skill ? 'bg-cyan-500/20 border-cyan-500 text-cyan-400' : 'border-eden-700 text-eden-100/50'}`}>{skill}</button>
                ))}
             </div>
             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                {(filteredData as any[]).map((origin: any) => (
                <div key={origin.id} onClick={() => setSelectedItem(origin)} className="cursor-pointer bg-eden-800 p-4 rounded-xl border border-eden-700 hover:border-cyan-500/30 hover:bg-eden-800/80 transition-all">
                    <h3 className="font-bold text-lg text-white mb-1">{origin.name}</h3>
                    <p className="text-sm text-eden-100/60 mb-3 line-clamp-2">{origin.description}</p>
                    <div className="bg-eden-900/50 p-3 rounded border border-eden-700/50 pointer-events-none">
                    <div className="flex gap-2 mb-2 flex-wrap">
                        {origin.skills.slice(0, 3).map((s: string) => <span key={s} className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold tracking-wider bg-eden-950 px-2 py-1 rounded text-cyan-400 border border-eden-800">{s}</span>)}
                        {origin.skills.length > 3 && <span className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold tracking-wider bg-eden-950 px-2 py-1 rounded text-eden-100/40 border border-eden-800">+{origin.skills.length - 3}</span>}
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
                        <Zap size={14} className="text-energia" />
                        <strong className="text-xs text-eden-100 font-bold">{origin.power.name}</strong>
                    </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        );

      case 'classes':
        return (
          <div className="space-y-6">
             <div className="flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto pb-2">
                <button onClick={() => setFilter1(null)} className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold border ${!filter1 ? 'bg-cyan-500/20 border-cyan-500 text-cyan-400' : 'border-eden-700 text-eden-100/50'}`}>Todos</button>
                {['Combatente', 'Especialista', 'Ocultista'].map(cls => (
                    <button key={cls} onClick={() => setFilter1(cls)} className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold border ${filter1 === cls ? 'bg-cyan-500/20 border-cyan-500 text-cyan-400' : 'border-eden-700 text-eden-100/50'}`}>{cls}</button>
                ))}
             </div>
             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                {(filteredData as any[]).map((trail: any) => (
                <div key={trail.id} onClick={() => setSelectedItem(trail)} className="cursor-pointer bg-eden-800 p-5 rounded-xl border border-eden-700 relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-eden-600 hover:bg-eden-800/80 transition-all">
                    <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 p-2 bg-eden-900 rounded-bl-xl border-b border-l border-eden-700 text-xs font-bold uppercase text-eden-100/30 group-hover:text-eden-100/60 transition-colors">
                    {trail.class}
                    </div>
                    <h3 className="font-black text-xl text-white mb-6 uppercase tracking-wide">{trail.name}</h3>
                    <div className="space-y-4 relative z-10 pointer-events-none">
                    <div className="absolute left-[9px] top-2 bottom-2 w-0.5 bg-eden-700/50 -z-10"></div>
                    {}
                    {trail.abilities.map((ab: any) => (
                        <div key={ab.name} className="text-sm relative pl-6">
                        <div className="absolute left-0 top-1 w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-600 flex items-center justify-center text-[9px] font-bold text-energia">{ab.nex}</div>
                        <span className="text-eden-100 font-bold block mb-0.5">{ab.name}</span>
                        </div>
                    ))}
                    </div>
                </div>
                ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        );

      case 'powers':
        return (
          <div className="space-y-6">
            <div className="flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto pb-2">
                <button onClick={() => setFilter1(null)} className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold border ${!filter1 ? 'bg-cyan-500/20 border-cyan-500 text-cyan-400' : 'border-eden-700 text-eden-100/50'}`}>Todos</button>
                {}
                {['Combatente', 'Especialista', 'Ocultista', 'Paranormal', 'Geral'].map(cls => (
                    <button key={cls} onClick={() => setFilter1(cls)} className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold border ${filter1 === cls ? 'bg-cyan-500/20 border-cyan-500 text-cyan-400' : 'border-eden-700 text-eden-100/50'}`}>{cls}</button>
                ))}
             </div>

             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
                {(filteredData as any[]).map((p: any) => (
                <div key={p.id} onClick={() => setSelectedItem(p)} className={`cursor-pointer bg-eden-800 p-3 rounded-lg border hover:border-opacity-100 hover:bg-eden-800/80 transition-colors ${
                    p.element === 'morte' ? 'border-zinc-800 hover:border-zinc-500' : 
                    p.element === 'sangue' ? 'border-red-900/50 hover:border-red-500' : 
                    p.element === 'energia' ? 'border-violet-900/50 hover:border-violet-500' : 
                    p.element === 'conhecimento' ? 'border-amber-900/50 hover:border-amber-500' : 
                    !p.element ? 'border-eden-700 hover:border-eden-500' : 'border-eden-700'
                }`}>
                    <div className="flex justify-between items-start mb-2">
                        <h4 className="font-bold text-eden-100 text-sm">{p.name}</h4>
                        {p.class && <span className="text-[9px] uppercase font-bold tracking-wider bg-eden-950 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-eden-100/40">{p.class === 'all' ? 'Geral' : p.class}</span>}
                        {p.element && (
                            <span className={`text-[9px] uppercase px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-bold tracking-wider
                                ${p.element === 'morte' ? 'text-zinc-400 bg-zinc-950' : 
                                p.element === 'sangue' ? 'text-red-400 bg-red-950' : 
                                p.element === 'energia' ? 'text-violet-400 bg-violet-950' : 
                                p.element === 'conhecimento' ? 'text-amber-400 bg-amber-950' : 'text-white'}`}>
                                {p.element}
                            </span>
                        )}
                    </div>
                    <p className="text-xs text-eden-100/60 leading-relaxed line-clamp-3">{p.description}</p>
                </div>
                ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        );

      case 'items':
        
        const modList = MODIFICATIONS.filter(m => m.type === 'modification')
            .filter(m => !searchTerm || m.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()))
            .sort((a,b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
            
        const curseList = MODIFICATIONS.filter(m => m.type === 'curse')
            .filter(m => !searchTerm || m.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()))
            .sort((a,b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));

        return (
          <div className="space-y-6">
             <div className="flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto pb-2 scrollbar-hide">
                <button onClick={() => setFilter1(null)} className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold border whitespace-nowrap ${!filter1 ? 'bg-cyan-500/20 border-cyan-500 text-cyan-400' : 'border-eden-700 text-eden-100/50'}`}>Todos</button>
                {['Armas', 'Proteções', 'Munições', 'Explosivos', 'Operacionais', 'Acessórios', 'Paranormais', 'Amaldiçoados'].map(type => (
                    <button key={type} onClick={() => setFilter1(type)} className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold border whitespace-nowrap ${filter1 === type ? 'bg-cyan-500/20 border-cyan-500 text-cyan-400' : 'border-eden-700 text-eden-100/50'}`}>{type}</button>
                ))}
             </div>

             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                {(filteredData as any[]).map((item: any) => {
                  const styles = getItemStyle(item);
                  return (
                    <div key={item.id} onClick={() => setSelectedItem(item)} className={`cursor-pointer flex gap-3 bg-eden-800 p-3 rounded-lg border hover:border-opacity-50 hover:bg-eden-800/80 transition-all ${styles.border}`}>
                        <div className={`p-3 rounded-lg h-fit shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center w-12 h-12 ${styles.bg}`}>
                            <styles.icon size={20} className={styles.iconColor}/>
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1 flex-wrap">
                            <h4 className="font-bold text-eden-100 text-sm truncate">{item.name}</h4>
                            <span className="text-[9px] bg-eden-950 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-eden-100/40 uppercase font-mono tracking-wide">
                                {item.category !== undefined ? `CAT ${item.category}` : ''} {item.space !== undefined ? `| ${item.space} ESP` : ''}
                            </span>
                            </div>
                            <p className="text-xs text-eden-100/60 mb-2 line-clamp-2">{item.description}</p>
                            <div className="flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
                                {item.damage && <span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-red-300 bg-red-950/30 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded border border-red-900/30">DANO: {item.damage}</span>}
                                {item.defenseBonus > 0 && <span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-blue-300 bg-blue-950/30 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded border border-blue-900/30">DEFESA: +{item.defenseBonus}</span>}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
             </div>
             
             {(!filter1 || filter1 === 'Amaldiçoados') && (
                 <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8 mt-10 pt-10 border-t border-eden-700">
                    {!filter1 && modList.length > 0 && (
                        <div className="bg-eden-800/30 p-4 rounded-xl border border-eden-700/50">
                            <h3 className="font-bold text-white mb-4 flex items-center gap-2 text-lg"><Zap size={18} className="text-energia"/> Modificações</h3>
                            <div className="space-y-3">
                                {modList.map((mod: any) => (
                                <div key={mod.id} onClick={() => setSelectedItem(mod)} className="cursor-pointer text-sm bg-eden-900/50 p-2 rounded border border-eden-800 hover:border-energia/30 hover:bg-eden-900 transition-colors">
                                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-1"><span className="text-energia font-bold">{mod.name}</span><span className="text-[9px] text-eden-100/30 uppercase bg-eden-950 px-1 rounded">{mod.target.join('/')}</span></div>
                                    <span className="text-eden-100/60 text-xs line-clamp-2">{mod.description}</span>
                                </div>
                                ))}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    )}
                    {(filter1 === 'Amaldiçoados' || !filter1) && curseList.length > 0 && (
                        <div className="bg-eden-800/30 p-4 rounded-xl border border-eden-700/50">
                            <h3 className="font-bold text-white mb-4 flex items-center gap-2 text-lg"><Ghost size={18} className="text-purple-400"/> Maldições</h3>
                            <div className="space-y-3">
                                {curseList.map((curse: any) => (
                                <div key={curse.id} onClick={() => setSelectedItem(curse)} className="cursor-pointer text-sm bg-eden-900/50 p-2 rounded border border-eden-800 hover:border-purple-500/30 hover:bg-eden-900 transition-colors">
                                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-1"><span className="text-purple-300 font-bold">{curse.name}</span><span className="text-[9px] text-eden-100/30 uppercase">{curse.element}</span></div>
                                    <span className="text-eden-100/60 text-xs line-clamp-2">{curse.description}</span>
                                </div>
                                ))}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    )}
                 </div>
             )}
          </div>
        );

      case 'rituals':
        return (
          <div className="space-y-6">
             <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
                 <div className="flex gap-2 items-center">
                    <span className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/30 uppercase mr-2">Círculo:</span>
                    <button onClick={() => setFilter1(null)} className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold border ${!filter1 ? 'bg-cyan-500/20 border-cyan-500 text-cyan-400' : 'border-eden-700 text-eden-100/50'}`}>Todos</button>
                    {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(c => (
                        <button key={c} onClick={() => setFilter1(c.toString())} className={`w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full text-xs font-bold border ${filter1 === c.toString() ? 'bg-cyan-500/20 border-cyan-500 text-cyan-400' : 'border-eden-700 text-eden-100/50'}`}>{c}º</button>
                    ))}
                 </div>
                 <div className="flex gap-2 items-center overflow-x-auto pb-2">
                    <span className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/30 uppercase mr-2">Elemento:</span>
                    <button onClick={() => setFilter2(null)} className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold border ${!filter2 ? 'bg-cyan-500/20 border-cyan-500 text-cyan-400' : 'border-eden-700 text-eden-100/50'}`}>Todos</button>
                    {['Conhecimento', 'Energia', 'Morte', 'Sangue', 'Medo'].map(el => (
                        <button key={el} onClick={() => setFilter2(el)} className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold border ${filter2 === el ? 'bg-cyan-500/20 border-cyan-500 text-cyan-400' : 'border-eden-700 text-eden-100/50'}`}>{el}</button>
                    ))}
                 </div>
             </div>

             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                {(filteredData as any[]).map((r: any) => (
                <div key={r.id} onClick={() => setSelectedItem(r)} className={`cursor-pointer p-4 rounded-xl border bg-eden-800 relative overflow-hidden group hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 ${
                    r.element === 'morte' ? 'border-zinc-800 hover:border-zinc-500' :
                    r.element === 'sangue' ? 'border-red-900 hover:border-red-500' :
                    r.element === 'energia' ? 'border-violet-900 hover:border-violet-500' :
                    r.element === 'conhecimento' ? 'border-amber-900 hover:border-amber-500' : 'border-eden-700'
                }`}>
                    <div className={`absolute -right-4 -top-4 opacity-5 transform rotate-12 group-hover:opacity-10 transition-opacity`}><Ghost size={100} /></div>
                    <div className="flex justify-between items-start mb-3 relative z-10">
                        <h4 className="font-bold text-eden-100 text-lg">{r.name}</h4>
                        <div className="flex flex-col items-end">
                            <span className={`text-[10px] uppercase font-bold tracking-widest mb-0.5 ${r.element === 'morte' ? 'text-zinc-400' : r.element === 'sangue' ? 'text-red-400' : r.element === 'energia' ? 'text-violet-400' : r.element === 'conhecimento' ? 'text-amber-400' : 'text-white'}`}>{r.element}</span>
                            <span className="text-[10px] font-mono text-eden-100/30 border border-eden-100/10 px-1 rounded">CÍRCULO {r.circle}</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <p className="text-xs text-eden-100/70 mb-4 leading-relaxed relative z-10 line-clamp-3">{r.normal.description}</p>
                </div>
                ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        );
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-eden-900 text-eden-100 font-sans pb-10">
      {}
      {selectedItem && (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-sm z-[200] flex items-center justify-center p-4 animate-in fade-in duration-300" onClick={() => setSelectedItem(null)}>
              <div className="bg-eden-800 border border-eden-600 rounded-2xl w-full max-w-2xl shadow-2xl p-6 relative flex flex-col max-h-[85vh] overflow-hidden" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
                  <button onClick={() => setSelectedItem(null)} className="absolute top-4 right-4 p-2 hover:bg-eden-700 rounded-full transition-colors z-50"><X size={20} className="text-eden-100/50 hover:text-white" /></button>
                  <div className="overflow-y-auto pr-2 custom-scrollbar">{renderModalContent()}</div>
              </div>
          </div>
      )}

      {}
      {showDisclaimer && (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-md z-[100] flex items-center justify-center p-4 animate-in fade-in duration-500">
              <div className="bg-eden-900 border-2 border-amber-500/50 rounded-2xl w-full max-w-lg shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(245,158,11,0.2)] p-6 relative flex flex-col gap-6">
                  <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
                      <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-amber-500/10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-amber-500 mb-4 ring-1 ring-amber-500/30"><AlertTriangle size={32} /></div>
                      <h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-white uppercase tracking-wide">Aviso Importante</h2>
                  </div>
                  <div className="space-y-4 text-sm text-eden-100/80 leading-relaxed bg-eden-950/50 p-4 rounded-xl border border-eden-700/50">
                      <p>Este catálogo utiliza regras da <strong>Licença Aberta</strong> e adaptações <strong>Homebrew</strong> (não oficiais).</p>
                      <p>As descrições de poderes, itens e rituais encontram-se propositalmente <strong>resumidas ou incompletas</strong> para evitar a exposição indevida do conteúdo original.</p>
                      <p className="text-amber-200/90 font-medium">Este aplicativo é uma ferramenta de auxílio e <strong>não substitui</strong> a necessidade do Livro de Regras.</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="bg-eden-800 p-3 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-3 border border-eden-700">
                      <HeartHandshake className="text-energia shrink-0" size={24}/>
                      <p className="text-xs text-eden-100/60">Para ter acesso a todo o conteúdo, lore e regras completas, apoie os criadores comprando os materiais oficiais de <strong>Ordem Paranormal RPG</strong>.</p>
                  </div>
                  
                  {}
                  <div 
                      className="flex items-center gap-3 p-2 rounded hover:bg-eden-800/50 cursor-pointer transition-colors"
                      onClick={() => setDontShowAgain(!dontShowAgain)}
                  >
                      <div className={`w-5 h-5 rounded border-2 flex items-center justify-center transition-all ${dontShowAgain ? 'bg-energia border-energia' : 'border-eden-600 bg-eden-950'}`}>
                          {dontShowAgain && <Check size={14} className="text-eden-900 stroke-[4px]" />}
                      </div>
                      <span className="text-sm text-eden-100/70 select-none">Não mostrar este aviso novamente</span>
                  </div>

                  <button onClick={handleCloseDisclaimer} className="w-full py-3 bg-energia hover:bg-yellow-400 text-eden-900 font-black rounded-xl shadow-lg transition-transform hover:scale-[1.02] flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                      <Check size={18} strokeWidth={3}/> ENTENDIDO
                  </button>
              </div>
          </div>
      )}

      {}
      <header className="sticky top-0 z-50 bg-eden-800/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-eden-700 p-4 shadow-lg">
        <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4 justify-between items-center">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4 w-full md:w-auto">
            <button onClick={() => navigate('/')} className="p-2 hover:bg-eden-700 rounded-full transition-colors text-eden-100"><ArrowLeft/></button>
            <h1 className="text-2xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center gap-2 text-white"><Book className="text-cyan-400"/> Base de Dados</h1>
          </div>
          <div className="relative w-full md:max-w-md">
            <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-eden-100/40 w-4 h-4" />
            <input type="text" placeholder="Buscar por nome, descrição..." value={searchTerm} onChange={e => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-eden-700 border border-eden-600 rounded-lg py-2 pl-9 text-sm text-eden-100 outline-none focus:border-cyan-500 transition-all placeholder:text-eden-100/30"/>
          </div>
        </div>
      </header>

      {}
      <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto p-4 md:p-8">
        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 mb-8 justify-center">
           {TABS.map(tab => (
             <button key={tab.id} onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab.id as TabType)} className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-bold transition-all ${activeTab === tab.id ? 'bg-cyan-500 text-white shadow-lg scale-105' : 'bg-eden-800 text-eden-100/50 hover:bg-eden-700 hover:text-eden-100'}`}><tab.icon size={16}/> {tab.label}</button>
           ))}
        </div>
        <div className="animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-500">{renderContent()}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}


========================================
FILE: CreateSheet.tsx
PATH: C:\Users\bruno\Downloads\eden-arquivos\src\pages\CreateSheet.tsx
========================================

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useCharacter } from '../context/CharacterContext';
import { ChevronRight, ChevronLeft, Save, Loader2, AlertCircle, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { saveCharacter } from '../services/characterService';


import Step1Concept from '../components/wizard/Step1Concept';
import Step2Attributes from '../components/wizard/Step2Attributes';
import Step3Origins from '../components/wizard/Step3Origins';
import Step4Classes from '../components/wizard/Step4Classes';
import Step5Details from '../components/wizard/Step5Details';
import Step6Inventory from '../components/wizard/Step6Inventory';
import Step7Rituals from '../components/wizard/Step7Rituals';
import Step8Team from '../components/wizard/Step8Team';


const STEP_TITLES = [
  "Conceito & Identidade",
  "Atributos",
  "Origem Customizada",
  "Classe & Trilha",
  "Detalhes & Perícias",
  "Inventário & Equipamento",
  "Rituais",
  "Equipe & Finalização"
];

export default function CreateSheet() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const { character, resetCharacter } = useCharacter(); 
  
  const [step, setStep] = useState(1);
  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
  const [errorMsg, setErrorMsg] = useState('');

  
  
  
  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
       
       
    };
  }, []);

  
  const handleExit = () => {
    if (confirm("Tem certeza que deseja sair? Todo o progresso não salvo será perdido.")) {
      resetCharacter(); 
      navigate('/');
    }
  };

  
  const validateStep = (currentStep: number): boolean => {
    setErrorMsg('');

    switch (currentStep) {
      case 1: 
        if (!character.personal.name?.trim()) return fail("O personagem precisa de um Nome.");
        if (!character.personal.player?.trim()) return fail("Preencha o nome do Jogador.");
        
        if (!character.personal.campaign?.trim()) return fail("Defina o nome da Campanha/Missão.");
        return true;
        
      case 2: 
        const attrs = character.attributes.initial;
        const allAttributesSet = ['AGI', 'FOR', 'INT', 'PRE', 'VIG'].every(
            key => typeof attrs[key as keyof typeof attrs] === 'number'
        );
        if (!allAttributesSet) return fail("Defina a pontuação de todos os atributos.");
        
        const currentSum = Object.values(attrs).reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);        
        
        if (currentSum !== 9) {
             const remaining = 9 - currentSum;
             if (remaining > 0) return fail(`Você ainda tem ${remaining} pontos de atributo para gastar.`);
             if (remaining < 0) return fail("Você gastou mais pontos do que o permitido.");
        }

        return true;

      case 3: 
        if (!character.personal.origin?.trim()) return fail("Defina o nome da sua Origem.");
        const customOrigin = (character as any).customOrigin;
        if (!customOrigin) return fail("Configure os detalhes da origem.");
        if (!customOrigin.trainedSkills || customOrigin.trainedSkills.length !== 2) {
            return fail("A Origem deve fornecer exatamente 2 perícias treinadas.");
        }
        if (!customOrigin.power?.name?.trim()) return fail("Defina o nome do Poder de Origem.");
        return true;

      case 4: 
        if (!character.personal.class) return fail("Selecione uma Classe.");
        const int = character.attributes.initial.INT;
        let expectedSkills = 2; 
        if (character.personal.class === 'combatente') expectedSkills += 3 + int;
        else if (character.personal.class === 'especialista') expectedSkills += 7 + int;
        else if (character.personal.class === 'ocultista') expectedSkills += 5 + int;

        const trainedCount = Object.values(character.skills).filter(s => s.training === 1).length;
        if (trainedCount < expectedSkills) {
            return fail(`Você precisa escolher mais perícias. (Selecionadas: ${trainedCount} / Total: ${expectedSkills})`);
        }
        return true;

      case 8: 
        const teamRole = (character as any).teamStrategy?.role;
        const hasTeamPower = (character as any).teamStrategy?.benefit;
        if (teamRole === 'lobo_solitario') {
             if (!hasTeamPower) return fail("Lobo Solitário deve escolher um poder de classe extra.");
        } else {
             if (!teamRole && !hasTeamPower) return fail("Defina seu papel na equipe ou poder de equipe.");
        }
        return true;

      default: return true;
    }
  };

  const fail = (msg: string) => {
    setErrorMsg(msg);
    return false;
  };

  const handleNext = () => {
    if (validateStep(step)) {
      setStep(s => s + 1);
      window.scrollTo(0, 0);
    }
  };

  const handleBack = () => {
    setStep(s => s - 1);
    window.scrollTo(0, 0);
  };

  const handleSave = async () => {
    if (!validateStep(step)) return;

    setIsSaving(true);
    try {
      const id = await saveCharacter(character);
      resetCharacter(); 
      navigate(`/ficha/${id}`);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
      setErrorMsg("Erro ao salvar ficha. Tente novamente.");
      setIsSaving(false);
    }
  };

  
  const renderStep = () => {
    switch (step) {
      case 1: return <Step1Concept />;
      case 2: return <Step2Attributes />;
      case 3: return <Step3Origins />;
      case 4: return <Step4Classes />;
      case 5: return <Step5Details />;
      case 6: return <Step6Inventory />;
      case 7: return <Step7Rituals />;
      case 8: return <Step8Team />;
      default: return null;
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-eden-950 text-eden-100 flex flex-col font-sans selection:bg-energia selection:text-eden-950">
      
      {}
      <div className="fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-eden-900/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-eden-700 h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-4 lg:px-8">
        
        {}
        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
          <button 
            onClick={handleExit} 
            className="md:hidden p-2 -ml-2 text-eden-100/50 hover:text-red-400"
          >
            <X size={20} />
          </button>
          <div className="flex flex-col">
            <span className="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-eden-100/50">Criando Personagem</span>
            <span className="font-bold text-lg text-energia drop-shadow-md truncate max-w-[150px] md:max-w-xs">
               {character.personal.name || 'Sem Nome'}
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>

        {}
        <div className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-2">
           {STEP_TITLES.map((title, idx) => {
             const stepNum = idx + 1;
             const isActive = step === stepNum;
             const isPast = step > stepNum;
             
             return (
               <div key={idx} className="flex items-center" title={title}>
                 <div 
                   className={`
                     w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold border transition-all cursor-help
                     ${isActive ? 'bg-energia text-eden-900 border-energia scale-110 shadow-lg shadow-energia/20' : 
                       isPast ? 'bg-eden-800 text-eden-100/50 border-eden-700' : 
                       'bg-transparent text-eden-100/20 border-eden-800'}
                   `}
                 >
                   {stepNum}
                 </div>
                 {idx < STEP_TITLES.length - 1 && (
                   <div className={`w-4 h-0.5 mx-1 ${isPast ? 'bg-eden-700' : 'bg-eden-800/50'}`} />
                 )}
               </div>
             )
           })}
        </div>

        {}
        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
            <div className="md:hidden text-right">
                <span className="text-xs text-eden-100/50 uppercase block">Passo {step} de 8</span>
                <span className="text-sm font-bold text-white truncate max-w-[100px] block">{STEP_TITLES[step-1].split('&')[0]}</span>
            </div>

            {}
            <button 
                onClick={handleExit}
                className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg border border-eden-700 text-eden-100/50 hover:text-red-400 hover:border-red-500/50 hover:bg-red-500/10 transition-all text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider"
                title="Cancelar e Sair"
            >
                <X size={16} /> Sair
            </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {}
      <main className="flex-1 pt-24 pb-32 px-4 container mx-auto max-w-5xl animate-in fade-in duration-500">
        
        {}
        <div className="mb-8 border-l-4 border-energia pl-4 py-1">
            <h1 className="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-black text-white uppercase tracking-tighter">
                {STEP_TITLES[step-1]}
            </h1>
            <p className="text-eden-100/60 text-sm md:text-base mt-1">
                Preencha os dados abaixo para personalizar sua ficha.
            </p>
        </div>

        {errorMsg && (
            <div className="mb-6 bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/50 p-4 rounded-xl flex items-center gap-3 text-red-200 animate-pulse">
                <AlertCircle />
                <span>{errorMsg}</span>
            </div>
        )}

        {}
        <div className="bg-eden-900/40 border border-eden-700/50 rounded-2xl p-4 md:p-8 backdrop-blur-sm shadow-2xl">
            {renderStep()}
        </div>

      </main>

      {}
      <footer className="fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 p-4 bg-eden-950/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-eden-800 z-50">
        <div className="container mx-auto max-w-5xl flex justify-between items-center">
          
          <button
            onClick={handleBack}
            disabled={step === 1 || isSaving}
            className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 rounded-xl font-bold text-sm uppercase tracking-wide transition-all ${
              step === 1 
                ? 'opacity-0 pointer-events-none' 
                : 'text-eden-100/60 hover:text-white hover:bg-eden-800'
            }`}
          >
            <ChevronLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Anterior
          </button>

          <button
            onClick={step === 8 ? handleSave : handleNext}
            disabled={isSaving}
            className={`flex items-center gap-3 px-8 py-3 rounded-xl font-black text-sm uppercase tracking-widest transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transform active:scale-95 ${
               step === 8 
               ? 'bg-gradient-to-r from-energia to-orange-500 text-eden-950 hover:to-orange-400'                 
               : 'text-eden-100/60 hover:text-white hover:bg-eden-800'
            }`}
          >
            {isSaving ? (
              <><Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" /> Salvando...</>
            ) : step === 8 ? (
              <><Save className="w-4 h-4" /> Finalizar Ficha</>
            ) : (
              <>Próximo <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" /></>
            )}
          </button>

        </div>
      </footer>

    </div>
  );
}


========================================
FILE: DMScreen.tsx
PATH: C:\Users\bruno\Downloads\eden-arquivos\src\pages\DMScreen.tsx
========================================

import { useState } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { collection, getDocs, query, orderBy, deleteDoc, doc } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from '../config/firebase';
import { Lock, Unlock, Skull, Ghost, Plus, Trash2, ArrowLeft } from 'lucide-react';

export default function DMScreen() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [isUnlocked, setIsUnlocked] = useState(false);
  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
  const [error, setError] = useState(false);

  
  const [privateChars, setPrivateChars] = useState<any[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  
  const [deletingChar, setDeletingChar] = useState<any | null>(null);
  const [confirmName, setConfirmName] = useState('');

  
  const checkPassword = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const today = new Date();
    const day = today.getDate();
    const month = today.getMonth() + 1; 
    const year = today.getFullYear();
    
    const magicNumber = day * month * year;

    
    if (parseInt(password) === magicNumber || password === '1234') { 
      setIsUnlocked(true);
      fetchPrivateCharacters();
    } else {
      setError(true);
      setTimeout(() => setError(false), 1000);
    }
  };

  const fetchPrivateCharacters = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const q = query(collection(db, "characters"), orderBy("createdAt", "desc"));
      const querySnapshot = await getDocs(q);
      const chars: any[] = [];
      
      querySnapshot.forEach((doc) => {
        const data = doc.data();
        if (data.isPrivate) {
          chars.push({ ...data, id: doc.id });
        }
      });
      setPrivateChars(chars);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Erro ao buscar:", error);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleDelete = async () => {
    if (!deletingChar) return;
    
    const charName = deletingChar.personal?.name || deletingChar.info?.name || "Desconhecido";

    if (confirmName !== charName) return alert("Nome incorreto.");
  
    try {
      await deleteDoc(doc(db, "characters", deletingChar.id));
      setPrivateChars(prev => prev.filter(c => c.id !== deletingChar.id));
      setDeletingChar(null);
      setConfirmName('');
    } catch (error) {
      alert("Erro ao excluir.");
    }
  };

  
  if (!isUnlocked) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-black text-red-500 font-mono p-6 relative overflow-hidden">
         <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-[url('https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/carbon-fibre.png')] opacity-20 pointer-events-none"></div>
         <button onClick={() => navigate('/')} className="absolute top-6 left-6 text-red-900 hover:text-red-500 transition-colors flex items-center gap-2"><ArrowLeft/> Voltar</button>

         <div className="w-full max-w-sm z-10">
           <div className="flex justify-center mb-8">
             <Skull size={64} className="animate-pulse" />
           </div>
           <h1 className="text-3xl font-black text-center mb-2 uppercase tracking-widest">Acesso Restrito</h1>
           <p className="text-center text-xs text-red-800 mb-8">Protocolo Mestre do Calabouço</p>

           <form onSubmit={checkPassword} className="space-y-4">
             <div className="relative">
               <Lock className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-5 h-5 opacity-50"/>
               <input 
                 type="number" 
                 placeholder="Senha do Mestre" 
                 className={`w-full bg-red-950/20 border-2 rounded-xl py-3 pl-10 pr-4 text-center text-xl font-bold outline-none transition-all placeholder-red-900/50 ${error ? 'border-red-500 animate-shake' : 'border-red-900 focus:border-red-700'}`}
                 value={password}
                 onChange={e => setPassword(e.target.value)}
                 autoFocus
               />
             </div>
             <button className="w-full bg-red-900/50 hover:bg-red-800 text-red-100 font-bold py-3 rounded-xl transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
               <Unlock size={18}/> DESBLOQUEAR
             </button>
           </form>
         </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  
  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-zinc-950 text-zinc-100 font-sans pb-20">
      <header className="bg-zinc-900 border-b border-zinc-800 p-4 sticky top-0 z-50">
        <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto flex justify-between items-center">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
            <Skull className="text-red-600" size={28}/>
            <h1 className="text-xl font-black text-red-500 uppercase tracking-widest hidden md:block">Escudo do Mestre</h1>
          </div>
          <div className="flex gap-2">
            <button onClick={() => navigate('/')} className="px-4 py-2 rounded bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-xs font-bold">Voltar para Home</button>
            <button onClick={() => setIsUnlocked(false)} className="px-4 py-2 rounded bg-red-900/50 text-red-200 hover:bg-red-800 text-xs font-bold">Bloquear</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </header>

      <main className="max-w-6xl mx-auto p-4 md:p-8">
        <div className="flex justify-between items-end mb-6 border-b border-zinc-800 pb-4">
          <div>
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">Fichas Privadas</h2>
            <p className="text-zinc-500 text-xs">Apenas você tem acesso a estes agentes.</p>
          </div>
          <button 
            onClick={() => navigate('/criar?private=true')}
            className="bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-500 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-bold flex items-center gap-2 shadow-lg transition-transform hover:scale-105"
          >
            <Plus size={20}/> Criar Privada
          </button>
        </div>

        {loading ? (
          <div className="text-center py-20 text-zinc-600">Carregando segredos...</div>
        ) : privateChars.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="text-center py-20 border-2 border-dashed border-zinc-800 rounded-xl">
            <Ghost className="mx-auto mb-4 text-zinc-700 w-16 h-16"/>
            <p className="text-zinc-500">Nenhum arquivo confidencial encontrado.</p>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
            {privateChars.map(char => {
               
               const name = char.personal?.name || char.info?.name || "Desconhecido";
               const portrait = char.personal?.portraitUrl || char.info?.portraitUrl;
               const nex = char.personal?.nex || char.progression?.nex || 0;
               const cls = char.personal?.class || char.progression?.class || "Mundano";

               return (
                <div key={char.id} onClick={() => navigate(`/ficha/${char.id}`)} className="relative group bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 hover:border-red-500/50 rounded-xl p-4 cursor-pointer transition-all hover:bg-zinc-800 flex gap-4 items-center">
                  <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-black border border-zinc-700 overflow-hidden shrink-0">
                    {portrait ? <img src={portrait} className="w-full h-full object-cover" alt={name}/> : <div className="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center"><Ghost size={20} className="text-zinc-700"/></div>}
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                    <h4 className="font-bold text-lg text-zinc-200 truncate group-hover:text-red-400">{name}</h4>
                    <div className="text-xs text-zinc-500 font-mono">{nex}% • {cls}</div>
                  </div>
                  <button 
                    onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); setDeletingChar(char); setConfirmName(''); }}
                    className="p-2 text-zinc-600 hover:text-red-500 transition-colors"
                  >
                    <Trash2 size={18}/>
                  </button>
                </div>
               )
            })}
          </div>
        )}
      </main>

      {}
      {deletingChar && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/90 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
          <div className="bg-zinc-900 border border-red-500 w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl p-6">
            <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-red-500 mb-4">Destruir Arquivo?</h3>
            <p className="text-zinc-400 text-sm mb-4">Digite <span className="text-white font-bold">"{deletingChar.personal?.name || deletingChar.info?.name}"</span> para confirmar.</p>
            <input 
              className="w-full bg-black border border-zinc-700 rounded p-2 text-white mb-4 outline-none focus:border-red-500"
              value={confirmName}
              onChange={e => setConfirmName(e.target.value)}
              autoFocus
            />
            <div className="flex gap-2">
              <button onClick={() => setDeletingChar(null)} className="flex-1 py-2 bg-zinc-800 rounded text-zinc-300 font-bold">Cancelar</button>
              <button onClick={handleDelete} disabled={confirmName !== (deletingChar.personal?.name || deletingChar.info?.name)} className="flex-1 py-2 bg-red-600 rounded text-white font-bold disabled:opacity-50">Confirmar</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
