import { useState } from 'react';
import { useCharacter } from '../../context/CharacterContext';
import { 
  Trash2, Scale, Settings, X, Zap, 
  Shield, Crosshair, Package, Crown, AlertTriangle, 
  ShoppingBag, Plus, Ghost, Calculator, Edit2, Bomb, Info, Book
} from 'lucide-react';

import { RANKS } from '../../data/referenceData'; 
import type { 
  ItemType, DamageType, ElementType, Effect, Formula, FormulaTerm, Operation, EffectCategory, TargetType, Attribute
} from '../../types/systemData';


const generateId = () => Date.now().toString(36) + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2);

const ITEM_TYPES: { id: ItemType; label: string; icon: any; color: string }[] = [
  { id: 'weapon', label: 'Arma', icon: Crosshair, color: 'text-red-400 border-red-500' },
  { id: 'protection', label: 'Proteção', icon: Shield, color: 'text-emerald-400 border-emerald-500' },
  { id: 'ammo', label: 'Munição', icon: Package, color: 'text-yellow-400 border-yellow-500' },
  { id: 'accessory', label: 'Acessório', icon: Crown, color: 'text-cyan-400 border-cyan-500' },
  { id: 'explosive', label: 'Explosivo', icon: Bomb, color: 'text-orange-400 border-orange-500' },
  { id: 'general', label: 'Geral', icon: ShoppingBag, color: 'text-zinc-400 border-zinc-500' },
  { id: 'cursed', label: 'Amaldiçoado', icon: Ghost, color: 'text-purple-400 border-purple-500' },
];

const DAMAGE_TYPES: DamageType[] = [
  'balistico', 'corte', 'impacto', 'perfuracao', 
  'fogo', 'frio', 'eletricidade', 'quimico', 
  'conhecimento', 'energia', 'morte', 'sangue', 'medo', 'paranormal'
];

const ELEMENTS: ElementType[] = ['Sangue', 'Morte', 'Conhecimento', 'Energia', 'Medo'];
const SKILL_OPTIONS = ["Acrobacia", "Adestramento", "Artes", "Atletismo", "Atualidades", "Ciências", "Crime", "Diplomacia", "Enganação", "Fortitude", "Furtividade", "Iniciativa", "Intimidação", "Intuição", "Investigação", "Luta", "Medicina", "Ocultismo", "Percepção", "Pilotagem", "Pontaria", "Profissão", "Reflexos", "Religião", "Sobrevivência", "Tática", "Tecnologia", "Vontade"];
const CONDITIONS = ["Agarrado", "Alquebrado", "Apavorado", "Atordoado", "Cego", "Debilitado", "Doente", "Em Chamas", "Enjoado", "Enredado", "Exausto", "Fatigado", "Fraco", "Imóvel", "Inconsciente", "Indefeso", "Lento", "Machucado", "Morrendo", "Ofuscado", "Paralisado", "Petrificado", "Sangrando", "Surdo", "Surpreso", "Vulnerável"];
const PROFICIENCIES = ["Armas Simples", "Armas Táticas", "Armas Pesadas", "Proteções Leves", "Proteções Pesadas"];





function FormulaBuilder({ formula, onChange }: { formula: Formula, onChange: (f: Formula) => void }) {
    const addTerm = () => {
      if (formula.terms.length >= 10) return;
      onChange({ terms: [...formula.terms, { id: Date.now().toString(), type: 'fixed', value: 0 }], operations: formula.terms.length > 0 ? [...formula.operations, 'soma'] : [...formula.operations] });
    };
    const removeTerm = (idx: number) => {
        const newTerms = formula.terms.filter((_, i) => i !== idx);
        const newOps = formula.operations.filter((_, i) => i !== (idx === 0 ? 0 : idx - 1));
        onChange({ terms: newTerms, operations: newOps.slice(0, newTerms.length - 1) });
    };
    const updateTerm = (idx: number, field: keyof FormulaTerm, value: any) => {
        const n = [...formula.terms]; n[idx] = { ...n[idx], [field]: value };
        onChange({ ...formula, terms: n });
    };
    const updateOp = (idx: number, op: Operation) => {
        const n = [...formula.operations]; n[idx] = op;
        onChange({ ...formula, operations: n });
    };

    const renderTermExtras = (term: FormulaTerm, index: number) => {
        switch (term.type) {
            case 'fixed': return <input type="number" value={term.value} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'value', Number(e.target.value))} className="w-16 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white" placeholder="0" />;
            case 'dice': return (
                <div className="flex items-center gap-1"><input type="number" value={term.value || 1} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'value', Number(e.target.value))} className="w-10 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white text-center" /><span className="text-white text-xs">d</span><select value={term.diceFace || 20} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'diceFace', Number(e.target.value))} className="w-12 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white">{[4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 20, 100].map(d => <option key={d} value={d}>{d}</option>)}</select></div>
            );
            case 'attribute': return <select value={term.attribute || 'AGI'} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'attribute', e.target.value)} className="w-20 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white">{['AGI', 'FOR', 'INT', 'PRE', 'VIG'].map(a => <option key={a} value={a}>{a}</option>)}</select>;
            case 'skill_total': case 'skill_training': return <select value={term.skill || SKILL_OPTIONS[0]} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'skill', e.target.value)} className="w-24 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white">{SKILL_OPTIONS.map(s => <option key={s} value={s}>{s}</option>)}</select>;
            case 'stat_max': case 'stat_current': case 'stat_temp': return <select value={term.stat || 'pv'} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'stat', e.target.value)} className="w-16 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white"><option value="pv">PV</option><option value="pe">PE</option><option value="san">SAN</option></select>;
            case 'count_paranormal_powers': case 'count_rituals': return <select value={term.element || 'Conhecimento'} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'element', e.target.value)} className="w-24 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white">{ELEMENTS.map(el => <option key={el} value={el}>{el}</option>)}</select>;
            case 'dr_value': return <select value={term.damageType || 'balistico'} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'damageType', e.target.value)} className="w-24 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white">{DAMAGE_TYPES.map(d => <option key={d} value={d}>{d}</option>)}</select>;
            default: return null;
        }
    };

    return (
      <div className="bg-eden-950/50 p-4 rounded-xl border border-eden-700 space-y-3">
          <div className="flex justify-between items-center"><label className="text-xs font-bold text-energia flex gap-2"><Calculator size={14}/> Fórmula</label><button onClick={addTerm} className="text-xs bg-eden-800 px-2 py-1 rounded hover:bg-eden-700"><Plus size={12}/> Add</button></div>
          {formula.terms.map((t, i) => (
              <div key={t.id} className="flex gap-2 items-center bg-eden-900/30 p-2 rounded border border-eden-700/50 flex-wrap">
                  {i > 0 && <select value={formula.operations[i-1]} onChange={e=>updateOp(i-1, e.target.value as Operation)} className="bg-eden-800 text-[10px] p-1 rounded text-white"><option value="soma">+</option><option value="subtracao">-</option><option value="multiplicacao">*</option><option value="divisao">/</option></select>}
                  <select value={t.type} onChange={e=>updateTerm(i, 'type', e.target.value)} className="bg-eden-800 text-xs p-1.5 rounded text-white max-w-[100px]">
                      <option value="fixed">Fixo</option><option value="dice">Dados</option><option value="attribute">Atributo</option><option value="skill_total">Perícia (Total)</option><option value="skill_training">Perícia (Treino)</option><option value="nex">NEX</option><option value="stat_max">Pontos Máx</option><option value="stat_current">Pontos Atuais</option><option value="defense">Defesa</option><option value="dr_value">Valor RD</option>
                  </select>
                  {renderTermExtras(t, i)}
                  <button onClick={()=>removeTerm(i)} className="ml-auto text-red-400"><Trash2 size={14}/></button>
              </div>
          ))}
      </div>
    )
}

function LearnedEntityBuilder({ data, onChange }: { data: any, onChange: (d: any) => void }) {
    const [showEffectModal, setShowEffectModal] = useState(false);
    const [editingEffect, setEditingEffect] = useState<Effect | null>(null);

    const handleSaveEffect = (eff: Effect) => {
        const effects = data.effects || [];
        const exists = effects.find((e: Effect) => e.id === eff.id);
        const newEffects = exists ? effects.map((e: Effect) => e.id === eff.id ? eff : e) : [...effects, eff];
        onChange({ ...data, effects: newEffects });
        setShowEffectModal(false);
        setEditingEffect(null);
    };

    const removeEffect = (id: string) => {
        onChange({ ...data, effects: (data.effects || []).filter((e: Effect) => e.id !== id) });
    };

    return (
        <div className="bg-eden-950/50 p-4 rounded-xl border border-eden-700 space-y-4 animate-in fade-in">
            <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100 uppercase border-b border-eden-700 pb-2 flex items-center gap-2"><Book size={14}/> Dados da Habilidade/Ritual</h4>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                <div className="space-y-1"><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/50">Tipo</label><select value={data.type || 'ability'} onChange={e => onChange({...data, type: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white"><option value="ability">Habilidade</option><option value="ritual">Ritual</option></select></div>
                <div className="space-y-1"><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/50">Nome</label><input type="text" value={data.name || ''} onChange={e => onChange({...data, name: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white" placeholder="Nome..."/></div>
            </div>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-2">
                <input type="text" placeholder="Execução" value={data.execution} onChange={e => onChange({...data, execution: e.target.value})} className="bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1.5 text-xs text-white"/>
                <input type="text" placeholder="Alcance" value={data.range} onChange={e => onChange({...data, range: e.target.value})} className="bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1.5 text-xs text-white"/>
                <input type="text" placeholder="Alvo" value={data.target} onChange={e => onChange({...data, target: e.target.value})} className="bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1.5 text-xs text-white"/>
                <input type="text" placeholder="Duração" value={data.duration} onChange={e => onChange({...data, duration: e.target.value})} className="bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1.5 text-xs text-white"/>
            </div>
            {data.type === 'ritual' && (
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
                    <select value={data.element || 'Conhecimento'} onChange={e => onChange({...data, element: e.target.value})} className="bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1.5 text-xs text-white">{ELEMENTS.map(el => <option key={el} value={el}>{el}</option>)}</select>
                    <select value={data.circle || 1} onChange={e => onChange({...data, circle: Number(e.target.value)})} className="bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1.5 text-xs text-white">{[1,2,3,4].map(c => <option key={c} value={c}>{c}º</option>)}</select>
                </div>
            )}
            <div className="space-y-1"><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/50">Descrição / Regras</label><textarea value={data.description || ''} onChange={e => onChange({...data, description: e.target.value})} className="w-full h-16 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white resize-none" placeholder="Descrição completa..."/></div>
            <div className="bg-eden-950/30 p-2 rounded border border-eden-700/50">
                <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-2"><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/50 uppercase">Efeitos (Recursivo)</label><button onClick={() => { setEditingEffect(null); setShowEffectModal(true); }} className="text-[10px] bg-eden-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-white flex items-center gap-1">+ Efeito</button></div>
                {data.effects?.map((eff: Effect) => (
                    <div key={eff.id} className="flex justify-between items-center bg-eden-900 p-1.5 rounded mb-1 border border-eden-700"><span className="text-[10px] text-white font-bold">{eff.name}</span><div className="flex gap-1"><button onClick={() => { setEditingEffect(eff); setShowEffectModal(true); }} className="text-eden-100/50 hover:text-white"><Edit2 size={12}/></button><button onClick={() => removeEffect(eff.id)} className="text-eden-100/50 hover:text-red-400"><Trash2 size={12}/></button></div></div>
                ))}
            </div>
            {showEffectModal && <EffectEditor effect={editingEffect} onSave={handleSaveEffect} onCancel={() => setShowEffectModal(false)} />}
        </div>
    );
}

function EffectEditor({ effect, onSave, onCancel }: { effect: Effect | null, onSave: (e: Effect) => void, onCancel: () => void }) {
  const { character } = useCharacter(); 
  const [data, setData] = useState<Effect>(effect || {
    id: Date.now().toString(), name: '', category: 'add_fixed', value: { terms: [{ id: '1', type: 'fixed', value: 0 }], operations: [] }, targets: [], description: '', generalChangeMode: '' 
  });

  const CATEGORIES: {val: EffectCategory, label: string}[] = [
    { val: 'add_fixed', label: 'Adição Fixa' }, { val: 'add_damage', label: 'Adição de Dano' }, { val: 'add_action', label: 'Adição de Ações' }, { val: 'add_dr', label: 'Adição de RD' },
    { val: 'add_immunity', label: 'Imunidade' }, { val: 'add_vulnerability', label: 'Vulnerabilidade' }, { val: 'change_dice', label: 'Mudança de Dados' }, { val: 'change_step', label: 'Mudança de Passo' },
    { val: 'change_general', label: 'Mudança Geral' }, { val: 'proficiency', label: 'Proficiência' }, { val: 'learning', label: 'Aprendizado' }, { val: 'affinity', label: 'Afinidade' }, { val: 'manual', label: 'Manual' }
  ];

  const userWeapons = character.inventory.filter(i => i.type === 'weapon');
  const userRituals = character.rituals || [];
  
  const userAbilities = character.abilities || []; 
  
  const userItems = character.inventory || [];

  const getValidTargets = (category: EffectCategory) => {
      switch(category) {
          case 'add_fixed': return [
              { val: 'test_attribute', label: 'Teste Atributo' }, { val: 'test_skill', label: 'Teste Perícia' }, { val: 'test_attack', label: 'Ataque' }, { val: 'heal', label: 'Cura' },
              { val: 'item_category', label: 'Categoria Item' }, { val: 'item_bonus', label: 'Bônus Item' }, { val: 'item_space', label: 'Espaço Item' }, { val: 'displacement', label: 'Deslocamento' }, 
              { val: 'pv_max', label: 'PV Máx' }, { val: 'pv_current', label: 'PV Atual' }, { val: 'pv_temp', label: 'PV Temp' },
              { val: 'pe_max', label: 'PE Máx' }, { val: 'pe_current', label: 'PE Atual' }, { val: 'pe_temp', label: 'PE Temp' },
              { val: 'san_max', label: 'SAN Máx' }, { val: 'san_current', label: 'SAN Atual' }, { val: 'san_temp', label: 'SAN Temp' },
              { val: 'defense', label: 'Defesa' }, { val: 'ritual_dt', label: 'DT Ritual' }, { val: 'load_max', label: 'Carga Máx' }
          ];
          case 'add_damage': return [{ val: 'damage_roll', label: 'Rolagem Dano' }];
          case 'add_action': return [{ val: 'action_move', label: 'Ação Movimento' }, { val: 'action_std', label: 'Ação Padrão' }];
          case 'change_dice': return [{ val: 'test_attribute', label: 'Teste Atributo' }, { val: 'test_skill', label: 'Teste Perícia' }, { val: 'test_attack', label: 'Ataque' }];
          case 'change_step': return [{ val: 'range_standard', label: 'Alcance (Padrão)' }, { val: 'range_ritual', label: 'Alcance (Ritual)' }, { val: 'credit_limit', label: 'Limite de Crédito' }];
          case 'change_general': return [{ val: 'ritual_duration', label: 'Duração Ritual' }, { val: 'ritual_target', label: 'Alvo/Área Ritual' }, { val: 'weapon_dice', label: 'Dado Arma' }];
          default: return [];
      }
  };

  const validTargets = getValidTargets(data.category);
  const showTargetsList = validTargets.length > 0;
  const hideFormula = ['manual', 'affinity', 'proficiency', 'learning', 'change_general', 'add_immunity', 'add_vulnerability'].includes(data.category);

  const addTarget = () => setData(prev => ({ ...prev, targets: [...prev.targets, { id: Date.now().toString(), type: validTargets[0]?.val as TargetType }] }));
  const addSpecialTarget = () => setData(prev => ({ ...prev, targets: [...prev.targets, { id: Date.now().toString(), type: 'dr', damageType: 'balistico' }] }));
  const getMeta = () => { try { return data.generalChangeMode ? JSON.parse(data.generalChangeMode) : {} } catch { return {} } };
  const setMeta = (obj: any) => setData({...data, generalChangeMode: JSON.stringify({...getMeta(), ...obj})});

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[80] flex items-center justify-center bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-md p-4 overflow-y-auto">
      <div className="bg-eden-900 w-full max-w-4xl rounded-2xl border border-eden-600 shadow-2xl flex flex-col max-h-[95vh]">
        <div className="p-4 border-b border-eden-700 flex justify-between items-center bg-eden-800 rounded-t-2xl">
          <h3 className="font-bold text-lg text-white flex items-center gap-2"><Zap className="text-energia"/> Editor de Efeito</h3>
          <button onClick={onCancel}><X /></button>
        </div>
        <div className="p-6 space-y-6 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar flex-1">
          <div className="space-y-1"><label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Nome do Efeito</label><input type="text" value={data.name} onChange={e => setData({...data, name: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded-lg p-2 text-white font-bold" placeholder="Ex: Aumento de Força..."/></div>
          <div className="space-y-2"><label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Categoria</label><select value={data.category} onChange={(e) => setData({...data, category: e.target.value as EffectCategory, targets: [], generalChangeMode: ''})} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded-lg p-3 text-white">{CATEGORIES.map(c => <option key={c.val} value={c.val}>{c.label}</option>)}</select></div>

          {data.category === 'add_damage' && (
              <div className="space-y-2 animate-in fade-in">
                  <label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Tipo do Dano Adicional</label>
                  <select value={getMeta().damageType || 'balistico'} onChange={e => setMeta({damageType: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-950 border border-eden-700 rounded p-3 text-white capitalize">{DAMAGE_TYPES.map(d => <option key={d} value={d}>{d}</option>)}</select>
                  <div className="flex gap-2 items-center text-xs text-eden-100/50"><input type="checkbox" checked={!!getMeta().multipliable} onChange={e => setMeta({multipliable: e.target.checked})}/> Multiplicável no Crítico?</div>
              </div>
          )}
          {data.category === 'affinity' && (
              <div className="space-y-2 animate-in fade-in"><label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Elemento</label><select value={getMeta().element || 'Conhecimento'} onChange={e => setMeta({element: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-950 border border-eden-700 rounded p-3 text-white">{ELEMENTS.map(el => <option key={el} value={el}>{el}</option>)}</select></div>
          )}
          {data.category === 'proficiency' && (
              <div className="space-y-2 animate-in fade-in"><label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Proficiência em:</label><select value={getMeta().proficiency || PROFICIENCIES[0]} onChange={e => setMeta({proficiency: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-950 border border-eden-700 rounded p-3 text-white">{PROFICIENCIES.map(p => <option key={p} value={p}>{p}</option>)}</select></div>
          )}
          {data.category === 'learning' && <LearnedEntityBuilder data={getMeta().learnedEntity || {}} onChange={(d) => setMeta({learnedEntity: d})}/>}
          
          {data.category === 'change_general' && (
              <div className="space-y-4 animate-in fade-in bg-eden-950/30 p-4 rounded-xl border border-eden-700">
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                      <div className="space-y-1"><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Tipo do Alvo</label><select value={getMeta().targetType || 'ritual'} onChange={e => setMeta({targetType: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-white text-xs"><option value="ritual">Ritual</option><option value="weapon">Arma</option><option value="ability">Habilidade</option></select></div>
                      <div className="space-y-1"><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Nome do Alvo</label><select value={getMeta().targetId || ''} onChange={e => setMeta({targetId: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-white text-xs"><option value="" disabled>Selecione...</option>{getMeta().targetType === 'ritual' && userRituals.map((r: any) => <option key={r.id} value={r.id}>{r.name}</option>)}{getMeta().targetType === 'weapon' && userWeapons.map((w: any) => <option key={w.id} value={w.id}>{w.name}</option>)}{getMeta().targetType === 'ability' && userAbilities.map((a: any) => <option key={a.id} value={a.id}>{a.name}</option>)}</select></div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                      <div className="space-y-1"><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Campo</label><select value={getMeta().field || ''} onChange={e => setMeta({field: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-white text-xs"><option value="duration">Duração</option><option value="range">Alcance</option><option value="damage_dice">Dado de Dano</option><option value="resistance">Resistência</option><option value="target">Alvo/Área</option><option value="execution">Execução</option></select></div>
                      <div className="space-y-1"><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Novo Valor</label><input type="text" value={getMeta().newValue || ''} onChange={e => setMeta({newValue: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-white text-xs"/></div>
                  </div>
              </div>
          )}

          {!hideFormula && <FormulaBuilder formula={data.value} onChange={(f) => setData({...data, value: f})} />}
          {(data.category === 'manual') && <div className="space-y-2"><label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Descrição</label><textarea value={data.description || ''} onChange={(e) => setData({...data, description: e.target.value})} className="w-full h-24 bg-eden-950 border border-eden-700 rounded-lg p-3 text-eden-100 focus:border-energia" placeholder="Descreva o efeito..."/></div>}

          {showTargetsList && (
              <div className="space-y-3 p-4 bg-eden-950/30 rounded-xl border border-eden-700/50">
                 <div className="flex justify-between items-center"><label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Onde aplicar?</label><button onClick={addTarget} className="text-[10px] bg-eden-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-white flex items-center gap-1">+ Alvo</button></div>
                 {data.targets.map((target, idx) => (
                   <div key={target.id} className="flex gap-2 items-center bg-eden-900 p-2 rounded border border-eden-700">
                      <select value={target.type} onChange={(e) => { const n = [...data.targets]; n[idx].type = e.target.value as TargetType; setData({...data, targets: n}); }} className="bg-eden-800 text-xs p-2 rounded text-white border border-eden-700 flex-1">{validTargets.map(t => <option key={t.val} value={t.val}>{t.label}</option>)}</select>
                      {['test_skill'].includes(target.type) && <select value={target.skill} onChange={e => {const n=[...data.targets]; n[idx].skill=e.target.value; setData({...data, targets: n})}} className="bg-eden-800 text-xs p-2 rounded border border-eden-600 text-white flex-1">{SKILL_OPTIONS.map(s => <option key={s} value={s}>{s}</option>)}</select>}
                      {['test_attribute'].includes(target.type) && <select value={target.attribute} onChange={e => {const n=[...data.targets]; n[idx].attribute=e.target.value as Attribute; setData({...data, targets: n})}} className="bg-eden-800 text-xs p-2 rounded border border-eden-600 text-white flex-1">{['AGI','FOR','INT','PRE','VIG'].map(a => <option key={a} value={a}>{a}</option>)}</select>}
                      {['test_attack', 'damage_roll'].includes(target.type) && <select value={target.weaponId || ''} onChange={e => {const n=[...data.targets]; n[idx].weaponId=e.target.value; setData({...data, targets: n})}} className="bg-eden-800 text-xs p-2 rounded border border-eden-600 text-white flex-1"><option value="">Tudo / Qualquer</option>{userWeapons.map((w: any) => <option key={w.id} value={w.id}>{w.name}</option>)}</select>}
                      {['heal', 'ritual_dt'].includes(target.type) && <select value={target.ritualId || ''} onChange={e => {const n=[...data.targets]; n[idx].ritualId=e.target.value; setData({...data, targets: n})}} className="bg-eden-800 text-xs p-2 rounded border border-eden-600 text-white flex-1"><option value="">Tudo / Qualquer</option>{userRituals.map((r: any) => <option key={r.id} value={r.id}>{r.name}</option>)}{userAbilities.map((a: any) => <option key={a.id} value={a.id}>{a.name}</option>)}</select>}
                      {['item_category', 'item_bonus', 'item_space'].includes(target.type) && <select value={target.itemId || ''} onChange={e => {const n=[...data.targets]; n[idx].itemId=e.target.value; setData({...data, targets: n})}} className="bg-eden-800 text-xs p-2 rounded border border-eden-600 text-white flex-1"><option value="">Tudo / Qualquer</option>{userItems.map((i: any) => <option key={i.id} value={i.id}>{i.name}</option>)}</select>}
                      <button onClick={() => setData(prev => ({...prev, targets: prev.targets.filter((_, i) => i !== idx)}))} className="text-red-400 p-2"><Trash2 size={14}/></button>
                   </div>
                 ))}
              </div>
          )}

          {['add_dr', 'add_immunity', 'add_vulnerability'].includes(data.category) && (
              <div className="space-y-3 p-4 bg-eden-950/30 rounded-xl border border-eden-700/50">
                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center"><label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">{data.category === 'add_dr' ? 'Resistências' : data.category === 'add_immunity' ? 'Imunidades' : 'Vulnerabilidades'}</label><button onClick={addSpecialTarget} type="button" className="text-[10px] bg-eden-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-eden-100 hover:bg-eden-600 flex items-center gap-1"><Plus size={12}/> Adicionar</button></div>
                 {data.targets.map((target, idx) => {
                     const isCondition = !!target.condition;
                     return (
                        <div key={target.id} className="flex gap-2 items-center bg-eden-900 p-2 rounded border border-eden-700 animate-in slide-in-from-left-2">
                            {data.category !== 'add_dr' && <button onClick={() => {const n = [...data.targets]; if (isCondition) { delete n[idx].condition; n[idx].damageType = 'balistico'; } else { delete n[idx].damageType; n[idx].condition = CONDITIONS[0]; } setData({...data, targets: n});}} className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold px-2 py-1 bg-eden-800 rounded border border-eden-600 text-white min-w-[70px]">{isCondition ? 'Condição' : 'Dano'}</button>}
                            {isCondition ? <select value={target.condition} onChange={e => {const n=[...data.targets]; n[idx].condition=e.target.value; setData({...data, targets: n})}} className="bg-eden-800 text-xs p-2 rounded border border-eden-600 text-white flex-1">{CONDITIONS.map(c => <option key={c} value={c}>{c}</option>)}</select> : <select value={target.damageType || 'balistico'} onChange={e => {const n=[...data.targets]; n[idx].damageType=e.target.value as DamageType; setData({...data, targets: n})}} className="bg-eden-800 text-xs p-2 rounded border border-eden-600 text-white flex-1">{DAMAGE_TYPES.map(d => <option key={d} value={d}>{d}</option>)}</select>}
                            <button onClick={() => setData(prev => ({...prev, targets: prev.targets.filter((_, i) => i !== idx)}))} className="text-red-400 p-2"><Trash2 size={14}/></button>
                        </div>
                     );
                 })}
              </div>
          )}
        </div>
        <div className="p-4 border-t border-eden-700 bg-eden-800 flex justify-end gap-3 rounded-b-2xl">
          <button onClick={onCancel} className="px-4 py-2 text-white hover:bg-eden-700 rounded-lg">Cancelar</button>
          <button onClick={() => onSave(data)} disabled={!data.name} className="px-6 py-2 bg-energia text-eden-900 rounded-lg font-black hover:bg-yellow-400">SALVAR</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}




const ItemForm = ({ 
  initialData, 
  onSave, 
  onCancel 
}: { 
  initialData?: any, 
  onSave: (item: any) => void, 
  onCancel: () => void 
}) => {
  const defaultItem = {
    id: '', name: '', type: 'general', category: 1, space: 1, description: '', 
    isCustom: true, effects: [], modifications: [], curses: [], quantity: 1, 
    isActive: true, modifiers: [], element: 'Medo'
  };

  const [formData, setFormData] = useState<any>(initialData || defaultItem);
  
  
  const [editingEffect, setEditingEffect] = useState<Effect | null>(null);
  const [showEffectModal, setShowEffectModal] = useState(false);

  const handleChange = (field: string, value: any) => {
    setFormData((prev: any) => ({ ...prev, [field]: value }));
  };

  const updateNested = (parent: string, field: string, value: any) => {
    setFormData((prev: any) => ({
      ...prev,
      [parent]: { ...prev[parent], [field]: value }
    }));
  };

  const updateLimit = (field: 'type' | 'max', value: any) => {
      setFormData((prev: any) => ({
          ...prev,
          limit: { ...prev.limit, [field]: value }
      }));
  }

  const handleSaveEffect = (eff: Effect) => {
     setFormData((prev: any) => {
        const effects = prev.effects || [];
        const exists = effects.find((e: Effect) => e.id === eff.id);
        return {
           ...prev,
           effects: exists ? effects.map((e: Effect) => e.id === eff.id ? eff : e) : [...effects, eff]
        };
     });
     setShowEffectModal(false);
     setEditingEffect(null);
  };

  const removeEffect = (id: string) => {
     setFormData((prev: any) => ({
        ...prev,
        effects: prev.effects.filter((e: Effect) => e.id !== id)
     }));
  };

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[60] flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm animate-in fade-in duration-200">
      <div className="bg-eden-900 w-full max-w-2xl max-h-[90vh] rounded-2xl border border-eden-700 shadow-2xl flex flex-col relative">
        
        <div className="p-4 border-b border-eden-700 bg-eden-800 rounded-t-2xl flex justify-between items-center">
          <h3 className="font-bold text-lg text-eden-100 flex items-center gap-2">
            {initialData ? <Settings size={20} /> : <Plus size={20} />}
            {initialData ? 'Editar Item' : 'Novo Item'}
          </h3>
          <button onClick={onCancel} className="text-eden-100/50 hover:text-white"><X size={20}/></button>
        </div>

        <div className="p-6 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar space-y-6 flex-1">
          
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 justify-center">
            {ITEM_TYPES.map(t => (
              <button
                key={t.id}
                onClick={() => handleChange('type', t.id)}
                className={`flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-2 rounded-lg border w-24 h-20 transition-all ${
                  formData.type === t.id 
                    ? `bg-eden-800 ${t.color} ring-1 ring-offset-1 ring-offset-eden-900 ring-white/20` 
                    : 'bg-eden-950 border-eden-800 text-eden-100/40 hover:bg-eden-900'
                }`}
              >
                <t.icon size={20} className="mb-1" />
                <span className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase">{t.label}</span>
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
             <div className="space-y-1">
               <label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/60 uppercase">Nome do Item</label>
               <input 
                 type="text" value={formData.name} onChange={(e) => handleChange('name', e.target.value)}
                 className="w-full bg-eden-950 border border-eden-700 rounded-lg p-2.5 text-eden-100 focus:border-energia outline-none"
                 placeholder="Ex: Fuzil de Assalto..."
               />
             </div>
             <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
               <div className="space-y-1">
                 <label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/60 uppercase">Categoria</label>
                 <select 
                   value={formData.category} onChange={(e) => handleChange('category', Number(e.target.value))}
                   className="w-full bg-eden-950 border border-eden-700 rounded-lg p-2.5 text-eden-100 outline-none"
                 >
                   {[0,1,2,3,4].map(c => <option key={c} value={c}>{c === 0 ? '0' : ['I','II','III','IV'][c-1]}</option>)}
                 </select>
               </div>
               <div className="space-y-1">
                 <label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/60 uppercase">Espaço</label>
                 <input 
                   type="number" value={formData.space} onChange={(e) => handleChange('space', Number(e.target.value))}
                   className="w-full bg-eden-950 border border-eden-700 rounded-lg p-2.5 text-eden-100 outline-none"
                 />
               </div>
             </div>
          </div>

          {}

          {formData.type === 'cursed' && (
             <div className="bg-purple-500/5 border border-purple-500/20 rounded-xl p-4 space-y-4 animate-in slide-in-from-top-2">
                <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-purple-400 uppercase flex items-center gap-2"><Ghost size={14}/> Detalhes da Maldição</h4>
                <div className="space-y-1">
                   <label className="text-[10px] text-purple-200/60 uppercase font-bold">Elemento Principal</label>
                   <select 
                     value={formData.element || 'Medo'} onChange={(e) => handleChange('element', e.target.value)}
                     className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-purple-900/50 rounded-lg p-2.5 text-xs text-purple-100"
                   >
                     {ELEMENTS.map(el => <option key={el} value={el}>{el}</option>)}
                   </select>
                </div>
             </div>
          )}

          {(formData.type === 'weapon' || formData.type === 'explosive') && (
             <div className={`${formData.type === 'weapon' ? 'bg-red-500/5 border-red-500/20' : 'bg-orange-500/5 border-orange-500/20'} border rounded-xl p-4 space-y-4 animate-in slide-in-from-top-2`}>
                <h4 className={`text-xs font-bold ${formData.type === 'weapon' ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-orange-400'} uppercase flex items-center gap-2`}>
                    {formData.type === 'weapon' ? <Crosshair size={14}/> : <Zap size={14}/>} Estatísticas de {formData.type === 'weapon' ? 'Combate' : 'Explosão'}
                </h4>
                
                {formData.type === 'weapon' && (
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
                       <div className="space-y-1">
                          <label className="text-[10px] text-eden-100/60 uppercase font-bold">Tipo</label>
                          <select value={formData.weaponType || 'melee'} onChange={(e) => handleChange('weaponType', e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white">
                            <option value="melee">Corpo a Corpo</option><option value="ranged">Distância</option>
                          </select>
                       </div>
                       <div className="space-y-1">
                          <label className="text-[10px] text-eden-100/60 uppercase font-bold">Empunhadura</label>
                          <select value={formData.hand || 'one'} onChange={(e) => handleChange('hand', e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white">
                            <option value="light">Leve</option><option value="one">Uma Mão</option><option value="two">Duas Mãos</option>
                          </select>
                       </div>
                       <div className="space-y-1">
                          <label className="text-[10px] text-eden-100/60 uppercase font-bold">Crítico (Margem)</label>
                          <input type="number" value={formData.critical?.range || 20} onChange={(e) => updateNested('critical', 'range', Number(e.target.value))} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white" placeholder="20"/>
                       </div>
                       <div className="space-y-1">
                          <label className="text-[10px] text-eden-100/60 uppercase font-bold">Crítico (Mult)</label>
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-1"><span className="text-eden-100/60 font-bold text-xs">x</span><input type="number" value={formData.critical?.multiplier || 2} onChange={(e) => updateNested('critical', 'multiplier', Number(e.target.value))} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white" placeholder="2"/></div>
                       </div>
                    </div>
                )}

                <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
                   <div className="space-y-1">
                      <label className="text-[10px] text-eden-100/60 uppercase font-bold">Dados de Dano</label>
                      <div className="flex gap-1">
                          <input type="number" value={formData.damage?.diceCount || 1} onChange={(e) => updateNested('damage', 'diceCount', Number(e.target.value))} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white text-center"/>
                          <span className="self-center text-eden-100/50">d</span>
                          <select value={formData.damage?.diceFace || 6} onChange={(e) => updateNested('damage', 'diceFace', Number(e.target.value))} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white">
                              {[4,6,8,10,12,20].map(d => <option key={d} value={d}>{d}</option>)}
                          </select>
                      </div>
                   </div>
                   <div className="col-span-2 space-y-1">
                      <label className="text-[10px] text-eden-100/60 uppercase font-bold">Tipo de Dano</label>
                      <select value={formData.damage?.type || 'balistico'} onChange={(e) => updateNested('damage', 'type', e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white capitalize">
                        {DAMAGE_TYPES.map(d => <option key={d} value={d}>{d}</option>)}
                      </select>
                   </div>
                </div>

                {formData.type === 'explosive' && (
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                        <div className="space-y-1">
                            <label className="text-[10px] text-eden-100/60 uppercase font-bold">Área</label>
                            <input type="text" value={formData.area || ''} onChange={(e) => handleChange('area', e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white" placeholder="Ex: Raio de 6m"/>
                        </div>
                        <div className="space-y-1">
                            <label className="text-[10px] text-eden-100/60 uppercase font-bold">DT Resistência</label>
                            <div className="flex gap-1">
                                <select 
                                    value={typeof formData.dt === 'string' ? formData.dt : 'fixed'} 
                                    onChange={(e) => handleChange('dt', e.target.value === 'fixed' ? 0 : e.target.value)}
                                    className="w-20 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white"
                                >
                                    <option value="fixed">Fixo</option>
                                    <option value="AGI">AGI</option><option value="FOR">FOR</option><option value="INT">INT</option><option value="PRE">PRE</option><option value="VIG">VIG</option>
                                </select>
                                {typeof formData.dt !== 'string' && (
                                    <input type="number" value={formData.dt || 0} onChange={(e) => handleChange('dt', Number(e.target.value))} className="flex-1 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white"/>
                                )}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                )}
             </div>
          )}

          {formData.type === 'ammo' && (
              <div className="bg-yellow-500/5 border border-yellow-500/20 rounded-xl p-4 space-y-4 animate-in slide-in-from-top-2">
                  <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-yellow-400 uppercase flex items-center gap-2"><Package size={14}/> Munição Otimizada</h4>
                  
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                      <div className="space-y-1">
                          <label className="text-[10px] text-yellow-200/60 uppercase font-bold">Calibre</label>
                          <input type="text" value={formData.calibre || ''} onChange={(e) => handleChange('calibre', e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-yellow-900/50 rounded p-2 text-xs text-yellow-100" placeholder="Ex: Curta"/>
                      </div>
                      <div className="space-y-1">
                          <label className="text-[10px] text-yellow-200/60 uppercase font-bold">Limite / Duração</label>
                          <div className="flex gap-1">
                              <input 
                                  type="number" 
                                  value={formData.limit?.max || 1} 
                                  onChange={(e) => updateLimit('max', Number(e.target.value))}
                                  className="w-16 bg-eden-900 border border-yellow-900/50 rounded p-2 text-xs text-yellow-100 text-center"
                              />
                              <select 
                                  value={formData.limit?.type || 'cenas'} 
                                  onChange={(e) => updateLimit('type', e.target.value)}
                                  className="flex-1 bg-eden-900 border border-yellow-900/50 rounded p-2 text-xs text-yellow-100"
                              >
                                  <option value="cenas">Cenas</option>
                                  <option value="usos">Usos</option>
                              </select>
                          </div>
                      </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="bg-yellow-900/20 p-3 rounded border border-yellow-500/20">
                      <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
                          <label className="text-[10px] text-yellow-200/60 uppercase font-bold">Contador de Tiros (0-10)</label>
                          <span className="text-xs font-mono text-yellow-400">{formData.shotCounter || 0}/10</span>
                      </div>
                      <input 
                          type="range" min="0" max="10" step="1"
                          value={formData.shotCounter || 0}
                          onChange={(e) => handleChange('shotCounter', Number(e.target.value))}
                          className="w-full accent-yellow-500"
                      />
                      <p className="text-[9px] text-yellow-100/40 mt-1 italic">
                          <Info size={10} className="inline mr-1"/>
                          Preencher 10 reduz a duração em 1 cena.
                      </p>
                  </div>
              </div>
          )}

          {formData.type === 'protection' && (
             <div className="bg-emerald-500/5 border border-emerald-500/20 rounded-xl p-4 space-y-4 animate-in slide-in-from-top-2">
                <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-emerald-400 uppercase flex items-center gap-2"><Shield size={14}/> Estatísticas de Defesa</h4>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                   <div className="space-y-1">
                      <label className="text-[10px] text-emerald-200/60 uppercase font-bold">Bônus de Defesa</label>
                      <input type="number" value={formData.defenseBonus || 0} onChange={(e) => handleChange('defenseBonus', Number(e.target.value))} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-emerald-900/50 rounded p-2 text-xs text-emerald-100" placeholder="+0"/>
                   </div>
                   <div className="space-y-1">
                      <label className="text-[10px] text-emerald-200/60 uppercase font-bold">Penalidade</label>
                      <input type="number" value={formData.penalty || 0} onChange={(e) => handleChange('penalty', Number(e.target.value))} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-emerald-900/50 rounded p-2 text-xs text-emerald-100" placeholder="0"/>
                   </div>
                   <div className="col-span-2 flex items-center gap-2">
                      <input type="checkbox" id="isHeavy" checked={formData.isHeavy || false} onChange={(e) => handleChange('isHeavy', e.target.checked)} className="w-4 h-4 rounded border-emerald-500 bg-eden-900 text-emerald-500 focus:ring-emerald-500"/>
                      <label htmlFor="isHeavy" className="text-xs text-emerald-100 cursor-pointer">É Proteção Pesada?</label>
                   </div>
                </div>
             </div>
          )}

          <div className="bg-black/20 rounded-xl border border-eden-700/50 p-4 space-y-3">
             <div className="flex justify-between items-center border-b border-eden-700/50 pb-2">
                <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/50 uppercase flex items-center gap-2"><Zap size={14}/> Efeitos & Automação</h4>
                <button onClick={() => { setEditingEffect(null); setShowEffectModal(true); }} className="text-xs bg-eden-800 text-energia px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-1 hover:bg-eden-700 transition-colors shadow-sm border border-eden-700"><Plus size={12}/> Novo Efeito</button>
             </div>
             <div className="space-y-2">
                {(formData.effects || []).map((eff: Effect) => (
                   <div key={eff.id} className="flex justify-between items-center bg-eden-900/80 p-3 rounded-lg border border-eden-700/50 hover:border-eden-600 transition-colors">
                      <div className="flex flex-col">
                         <span className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100">{eff.name || 'Sem nome'}</span>
                         <span className="text-[10px] text-eden-100/50">{eff.category} • {eff.targets.length} alvos</span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex gap-2">
                         <button onClick={() => { setEditingEffect(eff); setShowEffectModal(true); }} className="text-eden-100/50 hover:text-white p-1 hover:bg-white/10 rounded"><Edit2 size={14}/></button>
                         <button onClick={() => removeEffect(eff.id)} className="text-eden-100/50 hover:text-red-400 p-1 hover:bg-red-500/10 rounded"><Trash2 size={14}/></button>
                      </div>
                   </div>
                ))}
                {(!formData.effects || formData.effects.length === 0) && <p className="text-[10px] text-eden-100/30 italic text-center py-4 border border-dashed border-eden-800 rounded-lg">Sem efeitos configurados.</p>}
             </div>
          </div>

          <div className="space-y-1">
             <label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/60 uppercase">Descrição & Regras</label>
             <textarea value={formData.description} onChange={(e) => handleChange('description', e.target.value)} className="w-full h-24 bg-eden-950 border border-eden-700 rounded-lg p-3 text-sm text-eden-100 focus:border-energia outline-none resize-none" placeholder="Descreva o item..."/>
          </div>

        </div>

        <div className="p-4 border-t border-eden-700 bg-eden-800 rounded-b-2xl flex justify-end gap-3">
          <button onClick={onCancel} className="px-4 py-2 text-eden-100 hover:bg-eden-700 rounded-lg text-sm font-bold">Cancelar</button>
          <button onClick={() => onSave(formData)} disabled={!formData.name} className="px-6 py-2 bg-energia text-eden-900 rounded-lg text-sm font-black hover:bg-yellow-400 shadow-lg disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed">SALVAR ITEM</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {showEffectModal && (
         <EffectEditor effect={editingEffect} onSave={handleSaveEffect} onCancel={() => setShowEffectModal(false)} />
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default function Step6Inventory() {
  const { character, updateCharacter } = useCharacter();
  const items = character.inventory || [];
  
  const currentLoad = items.reduce((acc, item: any) => acc + ((item.space || 0) * (item.quantity || 1)), 0);
  const maxLoad = character.attributes.initial.FOR * 5 + (character.attributes.initial.FOR === 0 ? 2 : 0);
  
  const prestige = character.personal.prestigePoints || 0;
  const rank = [...RANKS].reverse().find(r => prestige >= r.minPP) || RANKS[0];

  const categoryCounts = items.reduce((acc, item) => {
    const cat = item.category;
    if (cat > 0) acc[cat] = (acc[cat] || 0) + (item.quantity || 1);
    return acc;
  }, {} as Record<number, number>);

  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
  const [isCreating, setIsCreating] = useState(false);
  const [editingItem, setEditingItem] = useState<any | null>(null);

  const handleSaveItem = (item: any) => {
    const finalItem = {
       ...item,
       space: item.space || 0,
       quantity: item.quantity || 1,
       isActive: item.isActive !== undefined ? item.isActive : true,
       modifiers: item.modifiers || []
    };

    if (editingItem) {
      const updatedList = items.map(i => i.id === item.id ? finalItem : i);
      updateCharacter(prev => ({ ...prev, inventory: updatedList }));
    } else {
      const newItem = { ...finalItem, id: generateId() };
      
      updateCharacter(prev => ({ ...prev, inventory: [...items, newItem] }));
    }
    setIsCreating(false);
    setEditingItem(null);
  };

  const handleDelete = (id: string) => {
    if (confirm("Tem certeza que deseja remover este item?")) {
      updateCharacter(prev => ({ 
        ...prev, 
        inventory: prev.inventory.filter(i => i.id !== id) 
      }));
    }
  };

  const handleDuplicate = (item: any) => {
      const copy = { ...item, id: generateId(), name: `${item.name} (Cópia)` };
      
      updateCharacter(prev => ({ ...prev, inventory: [...items, copy] }));
  };

  const filteredItems = items.filter(i => i.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()));

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col gap-4 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-right-8 duration-500 h-full pb-20">
      
      {}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 shrink-0">
         <div className="bg-eden-900/50 border border-eden-700 rounded-xl p-4 flex items-center justify-between">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
               <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-eden-800 flex items-center justify-center border border-eden-600 text-energia shadow-lg"><Crown size={20} /></div>
               <div><div className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-eden-100/50">Patente</div><div className="text-lg font-black text-eden-100 leading-none">{rank.name}</div></div>
            </div>
            <div className="text-right">
                <div className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-eden-100/50">Prestígio</div>
                <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-1 text-conhecimento font-mono font-bold">{prestige} <span className="text-[10px] text-eden-100/30">PP</span></div>
            </div>
         </div>
         <div className={`border rounded-xl p-4 flex items-center justify-between transition-colors ${currentLoad > maxLoad ? 'bg-red-900/20 border-red-500' : 'bg-eden-900/50 border-eden-700'}`}>
             <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
               <div className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center border shadow-lg ${currentLoad > maxLoad ? 'bg-red-900 text-red-200 border-red-500' : 'bg-eden-800 text-eden-100 border-eden-600'}`}><Scale size={20} /></div>
               <div>
                  <div className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-eden-100/50">Carga Total</div>
                  <div className={`text-lg font-black leading-none ${currentLoad > maxLoad ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-eden-100'}`}>{currentLoad} <span className="text-sm font-normal text-eden-100/40">/ {maxLoad}</span></div>
               </div>
            </div>
            {currentLoad > maxLoad && (<div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-red-400 text-xs font-bold animate-pulse"><AlertTriangle size={14} /> Sobrepeso</div>)}
         </div>
      </div>

      {}
      <div className="flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto pb-2 shrink-0">
          {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(cat => {
              const key = ['I', 'II', 'III', 'IV'][cat - 1] as keyof typeof rank.limit;
              const limit = rank.limit[key] || 0;
              const current = categoryCounts[cat] || 0;
              const isFull = current >= limit;
              return (
                  <div key={cat} className={`flex-1 min-w-[80px] bg-eden-900/40 border rounded-lg p-2 text-center flex flex-col justify-center ${isFull && current > 0 ? 'border-energia/50 bg-energia/5' : 'border-eden-700'}`}>
                      <span className="text-[9px] text-eden-100/40 font-bold uppercase">Cat {key}</span>
                      <span className={`text-sm font-mono font-bold ${isFull && current > 0 ? 'text-energia' : 'text-eden-100'}`}>{current} / {limit}</span>
                  </div>
              )
          })}
      </div>

      {}
      <div className="flex-1 bg-eden-900/30 border border-eden-700/50 rounded-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden min-h-[400px]">
          <div className="p-4 border-b border-eden-700/50 flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4 items-center justify-between">
              <h3 className="font-bold text-eden-100 flex items-center gap-2"><ShoppingBag size={18} className="text-energia" /> Inventário<span className="text-xs bg-eden-800 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-eden-100/50">{items.length} itens</span></h3>
              <div className="flex gap-2 w-full md:w-auto">
                 <input type="text" placeholder="Filtrar..." value={searchTerm} onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)} className="flex-1 md:w-48 bg-eden-950 border border-eden-700 rounded-lg px-3 py-1.5 text-sm text-eden-100 focus:border-energia outline-none"/>
                 <button onClick={() => setIsCreating(true)} className="bg-energia text-eden-900 px-4 py-1.5 rounded-lg font-bold text-sm hover:bg-yellow-400 flex items-center gap-2 shadow-lg hover:shadow-energia/20 transition-all"><Plus size={16} /> <span className="hidden md:inline">Criar Item</span></button>
              </div>
          </div>

          <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar p-4 space-y-3">
              {filteredItems.length === 0 ? (
                  <div className="h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-eden-100/20 gap-4"><ShoppingBag size={48} strokeWidth={1} /><p className="text-sm">Mochila vazia.</p><button onClick={() => setIsCreating(true)} className="text-energia hover:underline text-xs">Criar primeiro item</button></div>
              ) : (
                  filteredItems.map(item => {
                      const typeInfo = ITEM_TYPES.find(t => t.id === item.type) || ITEM_TYPES[5];
                      return (
                          <div key={item.id} className="group bg-eden-800/40 border border-eden-700 rounded-xl p-3 flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-3 items-start md:items-center hover:bg-eden-800 transition-colors">
                              <div className="flex items-center gap-3 flex-1">
                                  <div className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center border bg-eden-900/50 shrink-0 ${typeInfo.color.split(' ')[0]} ${typeInfo.color.split(' ')[1].replace('text-', 'border-')}`}><typeInfo.icon size={20} /></div>
                                  <div>
                                      <h4 className="font-bold text-eden-100 text-sm">{item.name}</h4>
                                      <div className="flex gap-2 text-[10px] text-eden-100/50 uppercase tracking-wide">
                                          <span>{typeInfo.label}</span><span>•</span><span>Cat {['0', 'I', 'II', 'III', 'IV'][item.category]}</span><span>•</span>
                                          {}
                                          <span>{item.space || 0}</span>
                                          {item.type === 'cursed' && <span className="text-purple-400 font-bold ml-1">• {(item as any).element}</span>}
                                          {item.type === 'ammo' && (item as any).calibre && <span className="text-yellow-400 ml-1">• {(item as any).calibre}</span>}
                                      </div>
                                  </div>
                              </div>
                              <div className="flex gap-1 ml-auto">
                                  <button onClick={() => { setEditingItem(item); setIsCreating(true); }} className="p-2 text-eden-100/50 hover:text-white hover:bg-eden-700 rounded-lg" title="Editar"><Settings size={16}/></button>
                                  <button onClick={() => handleDuplicate(item)} className="p-2 text-eden-100/50 hover:text-energia hover:bg-eden-700 rounded-lg" title="Duplicar"><Package size={16}/></button>
                                  <button onClick={() => handleDelete(item.id)} className="p-2 text-eden-100/50 hover:text-red-400 hover:bg-eden-700 rounded-lg" title="Excluir"><Trash2 size={16}/></button>
                              </div>
                          </div>
                      )
                  })
              )}
          </div>
      </div>

      {(isCreating || editingItem) && (
        <ItemForm initialData={editingItem || undefined} onSave={handleSaveItem} onCancel={() => { setIsCreating(false); setEditingItem(null); }} />
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

FILE: Step7Rituals.tsx
PATH: C:\Users\bruno\Downloads\eden-arquivos\src\components\wizard\Step7Rituals.tsx

import { useState } from 'react';
import { useCharacter } from '../../context/CharacterContext';
import type { UserRitual, ElementType, RitualVersion, Effect, Formula, FormulaTerm, Operation, EffectCategory, TargetType, Attribute, DamageType } from '../../types/systemData';
import { 
  Flame, Skull, Eye, Zap, Ghost, 
  BookOpen, Plus, X, Search, Settings, Trash2, AlertCircle, Calculator, Edit2, Book
} from 'lucide-react';

const ELEMENTS: ElementType[] = ['Conhecimento', 'Energia', 'Morte', 'Sangue', 'Medo'];

const ELEMENT_STYLES: Record<string, { color: string; border: string; bg: string }> = {
  Conhecimento: { color: 'text-amber-400', border: 'border-amber-500', bg: 'bg-amber-950/30' },
  Energia: { color: 'text-violet-400', border: 'border-violet-500', bg: 'bg-violet-950/30' },
  Morte: { color: 'text-zinc-400', border: 'border-zinc-500', bg: 'bg-zinc-950/30' },
  Sangue: { color: 'text-red-600', border: 'border-red-600', bg: 'bg-red-950/30' },
  Medo: { color: 'text-white', border: 'border-white', bg: 'bg-eden-950' },
};

const ELEMENT_ICONS: Record<string, any> = {
    Conhecimento: Eye,
    Energia: Zap,
    Morte: Skull,
    Sangue: Flame,
    Medo: Ghost
};

const SKILL_OPTIONS = ["Acrobacia", "Adestramento", "Artes", "Atletismo", "Atualidades", "Ciências", "Crime", "Diplomacia", "Enganação", "Fortitude", "Furtividade", "Iniciativa", "Intimidação", "Intuição", "Investigação", "Luta", "Medicina", "Ocultismo", "Percepção", "Pilotagem", "Pontaria", "Profissão", "Reflexos", "Religião", "Sobrevivência", "Tática", "Tecnologia", "Vontade"];
const CONDITIONS = ["Agarrado", "Alquebrado", "Apavorado", "Atordoado", "Cego", "Debilitado", "Doente", "Em Chamas", "Enjoado", "Enredado", "Exausto", "Fatigado", "Fraco", "Imóvel", "Inconsciente", "Indefeso", "Lento", "Machucado", "Morrendo", "Ofuscado", "Paralisado", "Petrificado", "Sangrando", "Surdo", "Surpreso", "Vulnerável"];
const PROFICIENCIES = ["Armas Simples", "Armas Táticas", "Armas Pesadas", "Proteções Leves", "Proteções Pesadas"];
const DAMAGE_TYPES: DamageType[] = ['balistico', 'corte', 'impacto', 'perfuracao', 'fogo', 'frio', 'eletricidade', 'quimico', 'conhecimento', 'energia', 'morte', 'sangue', 'medo'];

const generateId = () => Date.now().toString(36) + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2);




function FormulaBuilder({ formula, onChange }: { formula: Formula, onChange: (f: Formula) => void }) {
  const addTerm = () => {
    if (formula.terms.length >= 10) return;
    onChange({
      terms: [...formula.terms, { id: Date.now().toString(), type: 'fixed', value: 0 }],
      operations: formula.terms.length > 0 ? [...formula.operations, 'soma'] : [...formula.operations]
    });
  };

  const removeTerm = (index: number) => {
    const newTerms = formula.terms.filter((_, i) => i !== index);
    const newOps = formula.operations.filter((_, i) => i !== (index === 0 ? 0 : index - 1));
    onChange({ terms: newTerms, operations: newOps.slice(0, newTerms.length - 1) });
  };

  const updateTerm = (index: number, field: keyof FormulaTerm, value: any) => {
    const newTerms = [...formula.terms];
    newTerms[index] = { ...newTerms[index], [field]: value };
    onChange({ ...formula, terms: newTerms });
  };

  const updateOp = (index: number, op: Operation) => {
    const newOps = [...formula.operations];
    newOps[index] = op;
    onChange({ ...formula, operations: newOps });
  };

  const renderTermExtras = (term: FormulaTerm, index: number) => {
      switch (term.type) {
          case 'fixed': return <input type="number" value={term.value} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'value', Number(e.target.value))} className="w-16 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white placeholder-white/30" placeholder="0" />;
          case 'dice': return (
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1"><input type="number" value={term.value || 1} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'value', Number(e.target.value))} className="w-10 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white text-center" /><span className="text-white text-xs">d</span><select value={term.diceFace || 20} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'diceFace', Number(e.target.value))} className="w-12 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white">{[4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 20, 100].map(d => <option key={d} value={d}>{d}</option>)}</select></div>
          );
          case 'attribute': return <select value={term.attribute || 'AGI'} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'attribute', e.target.value)} className="w-20 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white">{['AGI', 'FOR', 'INT', 'PRE', 'VIG'].map(a => <option key={a} value={a}>{a}</option>)}</select>;
          case 'skill_total': case 'skill_training': return <select value={term.skill || SKILL_OPTIONS[0]} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'skill', e.target.value)} className="w-24 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white">{SKILL_OPTIONS.map(s => <option key={s} value={s}>{s}</option>)}</select>;
          case 'stat_max': case 'stat_current': case 'stat_temp': return <select value={term.stat || 'pv'} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'stat', e.target.value)} className="w-16 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white"><option value="pv">PV</option><option value="pe">PE</option><option value="san">SAN</option></select>;
          case 'count_paranormal_powers': case 'count_rituals': return <select value={term.element || 'Conhecimento'} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'element', e.target.value)} className="w-24 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white">{ELEMENTS.map(el => <option key={el} value={el}>{el}</option>)}</select>;
          case 'dr_value': return <select value={term.damageType || 'balistico'} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'damageType', e.target.value)} className="w-24 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1 text-xs text-white">{DAMAGE_TYPES.map(d => <option key={d} value={d}>{d}</option>)}</select>;
          default: return null;
      }
  };

  return (
    <div className="bg-eden-950/50 p-4 rounded-xl border border-eden-700 space-y-3">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between"><label className="text-xs uppercase font-bold text-energia flex items-center gap-2"><Calculator size={14} /> Fórmula do Valor</label><button onClick={addTerm} type="button" className="text-xs bg-eden-800 hover:bg-energia hover:text-eden-900 px-2 py-1 rounded transition-colors flex items-center gap-1"><Plus size={12} /> Add</button></div>
      <div className="space-y-2">
        {formula.terms.map((term, index) => (
          <div key={term.id} className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 bg-eden-900/30 p-2 rounded border border-eden-700/50">
            {index > 0 && <select value={formula.operations[index - 1]} onChange={(e) => updateOp(index - 1, e.target.value as Operation)} className="bg-eden-800 text-eden-100 text-[10px] p-1 rounded border border-eden-600 font-mono"><option value="soma">+</option><option value="subtracao">-</option><option value="multiplicacao">×</option><option value="divisao">÷</option></select>}
            <select value={term.type} onChange={(e) => updateTerm(index, 'type', e.target.value)} className="bg-eden-800 text-eden-100 text-xs p-1.5 rounded border border-eden-600 outline-none focus:border-energia max-w-[120px]">
              <option value="fixed">Valor Fixo</option><option value="dice">Dados</option><option value="attribute">Atributo</option><option value="skill_total">Perícia (Total)</option><option value="skill_training">Perícia (Treino)</option><option value="nex">NEX</option><option value="stat_max">Pontos Máx</option><option value="stat_current">Pontos Atuais</option><option value="stat_temp">Pontos Temp</option><option value="defense">Defesa</option><option value="displacement">Deslocamento</option><option value="pe_limit">Limite PE</option><option value="dr_value">Valor de RD</option><option value="count_paranormal_powers">Qtd Poderes</option><option value="count_rituals">Qtd Rituais</option><option value="prestige">Prestígio</option><option value="load_current">Carga Atual</option><option value="load_max">Carga Máx</option><option value="action_move">Ações Mov.</option><option value="action_std">Ações Padrão</option>
            </select>
            {renderTermExtras(term, index)}
            <button onClick={() => removeTerm(index)} className="p-1.5 text-red-400 hover:bg-red-400/10 rounded ml-auto"><Trash2 size={14} /></button>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}




function LearnedEntityBuilder({ data, onChange }: { data: any, onChange: (d: any) => void }) {
    const [showEffectModal, setShowEffectModal] = useState(false);
    const [editingEffect, setEditingEffect] = useState<Effect | null>(null);

    const handleSaveEffect = (eff: Effect) => {
        const effects = data.effects || [];
        const exists = effects.find((e: Effect) => e.id === eff.id);
        const newEffects = exists ? effects.map((e: Effect) => e.id === eff.id ? eff : e) : [...effects, eff];
        onChange({ ...data, effects: newEffects });
        setShowEffectModal(false);
        setEditingEffect(null);
    };

    const removeEffect = (id: string) => {
        onChange({ ...data, effects: (data.effects || []).filter((e: Effect) => e.id !== id) });
    };

    return (
        <div className="bg-eden-950/50 p-4 rounded-xl border border-eden-700 space-y-4 animate-in fade-in">
            <h4 className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100 uppercase border-b border-eden-700 pb-2 flex items-center gap-2"><Book size={14}/> Configurar Habilidade/Ritual Aprendido</h4>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                <div className="space-y-1"><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/50">Tipo</label><select value={data.type || 'ability'} onChange={e => onChange({...data, type: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white"><option value="ability">Habilidade</option><option value="ritual">Ritual</option></select></div>
                <div className="space-y-1"><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/50">Nome</label><input type="text" value={data.name || ''} onChange={e => onChange({...data, name: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white" placeholder="Nome..."/></div>
            </div>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-2">
                <input type="text" placeholder="Execução" value={data.execution} onChange={e => onChange({...data, execution: e.target.value})} className="bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1.5 text-xs text-white"/>
                <input type="text" placeholder="Alcance" value={data.range} onChange={e => onChange({...data, range: e.target.value})} className="bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1.5 text-xs text-white"/>
                <input type="text" placeholder="Alvo" value={data.target} onChange={e => onChange({...data, target: e.target.value})} className="bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1.5 text-xs text-white"/>
                <input type="text" placeholder="Duração" value={data.duration} onChange={e => onChange({...data, duration: e.target.value})} className="bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1.5 text-xs text-white"/>
            </div>
            {data.type === 'ritual' && (
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
                    <select value={data.element || 'Conhecimento'} onChange={e => onChange({...data, element: e.target.value})} className="bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1.5 text-xs text-white">{ELEMENTS.map(el => <option key={el} value={el}>{el}</option>)}</select>
                    <select value={data.circle || 1} onChange={e => onChange({...data, circle: Number(e.target.value)})} className="bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-1.5 text-xs text-white">{[1,2,3,4].map(c => <option key={c} value={c}>{c}º</option>)}</select>
                </div>
            )}
            <div className="space-y-1"><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/50">Descrição / Regras</label><textarea value={data.description || ''} onChange={e => onChange({...data, description: e.target.value})} className="w-full h-16 bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded p-2 text-xs text-white resize-none" placeholder="Descrição completa..."/></div>
            <div className="bg-eden-950/30 p-2 rounded border border-eden-700/50">
                <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-2"><label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/50 uppercase">Efeitos (Recursivo)</label><button onClick={() => { setEditingEffect(null); setShowEffectModal(true); }} className="text-[10px] bg-eden-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-white flex items-center gap-1">+ Efeito</button></div>
                {data.effects?.map((eff: Effect) => (
                    <div key={eff.id} className="flex justify-between items-center bg-eden-900 p-1.5 rounded mb-1 border border-eden-700"><span className="text-[10px] text-white font-bold">{eff.name}</span><div className="flex gap-1"><button onClick={() => { setEditingEffect(eff); setShowEffectModal(true); }} className="text-eden-100/50 hover:text-white"><Edit2 size={12}/></button><button onClick={() => removeEffect(eff.id)} className="text-eden-100/50 hover:text-red-400"><Trash2 size={12}/></button></div></div>
                ))}
            </div>
            {showEffectModal && <EffectEditor effect={editingEffect} onSave={handleSaveEffect} onCancel={() => setShowEffectModal(false)} />}
        </div>
    );
}




function EffectEditor({ effect, onSave, onCancel }: { effect: Effect | null, onSave: (e: Effect) => void, onCancel: () => void }) {
  const { character } = useCharacter(); 
  const [data, setData] = useState<Effect>(effect || {
    id: Date.now().toString(), name: '', category: 'add_fixed', value: { terms: [{ id: '1', type: 'fixed', value: 0 }], operations: [] }, targets: [], description: '', generalChangeMode: '' 
  });

  const CATEGORIES: {val: EffectCategory, label: string}[] = [
    { val: 'add_fixed', label: 'Adição Fixa' }, { val: 'add_damage', label: 'Adição de Dano' }, { val: 'add_action', label: 'Adição de Ações' }, { val: 'add_dr', label: 'Adição de RD' },
    { val: 'add_immunity', label: 'Imunidade' }, { val: 'add_vulnerability', label: 'Vulnerabilidade' }, { val: 'change_dice', label: 'Mudança de Dados' }, { val: 'change_step', label: 'Mudança de Passo' },
    { val: 'change_general', label: 'Mudança Geral' }, { val: 'proficiency', label: 'Proficiência' }, { val: 'learning', label: 'Aprendizado' }, { val: 'affinity', label: 'Afinidade' }, { val: 'manual', label: 'Manual' }
  ];

  const userWeapons = character.inventory.filter(i => i.type === 'weapon');
  const userRituals = character.rituals || [];
  
  const userAbilities = character.abilities || []; 
  
  const userItems = character.inventory || [];

  const getValidTargets = (category: EffectCategory) => {
      switch(category) {
          case 'add_fixed': return [
              { val: 'test_attribute', label: 'Teste Atributo' }, { val: 'test_skill', label: 'Teste Perícia' }, { val: 'test_attack', label: 'Ataque' }, { val: 'heal', label: 'Cura' },
              { val: 'item_category', label: 'Categoria Item' }, { val: 'item_bonus', label: 'Bônus Item' }, { val: 'item_space', label: 'Espaço Item' }, { val: 'displacement', label: 'Deslocamento' }, 
              { val: 'pv_max', label: 'PV Máx' }, { val: 'pe_max', label: 'PE Máx' }, { val: 'san_max', label: 'SAN Máx' }, { val: 'defense', label: 'Defesa' }, { val: 'ritual_dt', label: 'DT Ritual' }, { val: 'load_max', label: 'Carga Máx' }
          ];
          case 'add_damage': return [{ val: 'damage_roll', label: 'Rolagem Dano' }];
          case 'add_action': return [{ val: 'action_move', label: 'Ação Movimento' }, { val: 'action_std', label: 'Ação Padrão' }];
          case 'change_dice': return [{ val: 'test_attribute', label: 'Teste Atributo' }, { val: 'test_skill', label: 'Teste Perícia' }, { val: 'test_attack', label: 'Ataque' }];
          case 'change_step': return [{ val: 'range_standard', label: 'Alcance (Padrão)' }, { val: 'range_ritual', label: 'Alcance (Ritual)' }, { val: 'credit_limit', label: 'Limite de Crédito' }];
          case 'change_general': return [{ val: 'ritual_duration', label: 'Duração Ritual' }, { val: 'ritual_target', label: 'Alvo/Área Ritual' }, { val: 'weapon_dice', label: 'Dado Arma' }];
          default: return [];
      }
  };

  const validTargets = getValidTargets(data.category);
  const showTargetsList = validTargets.length > 0;
  const hideFormula = ['manual', 'affinity', 'proficiency', 'learning', 'change_general', 'add_immunity', 'add_vulnerability'].includes(data.category);

  const addTarget = () => setData(prev => ({ ...prev, targets: [...prev.targets, { id: Date.now().toString(), type: validTargets[0]?.val as TargetType }] }));
  const addSpecialTarget = () => setData(prev => ({ ...prev, targets: [...prev.targets, { id: Date.now().toString(), type: 'dr', damageType: 'balistico' }] }));
  const getMeta = () => { try { return data.generalChangeMode ? JSON.parse(data.generalChangeMode) : {} } catch { return {} } };
  const setMeta = (obj: any) => setData({...data, generalChangeMode: JSON.stringify({...getMeta(), ...obj})});

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[80] flex items-center justify-center bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-md p-4 overflow-y-auto">
      <div className="bg-eden-900 w-full max-w-4xl rounded-2xl border border-eden-600 shadow-2xl flex flex-col max-h-[95vh]">
        <div className="p-4 border-b border-eden-700 flex justify-between items-center bg-eden-800 rounded-t-2xl">
          <h3 className="font-bold text-lg text-white flex items-center gap-2"><Zap className="text-energia"/> Editor de Efeito</h3>
          <button onClick={onCancel}><X /></button>
        </div>
        <div className="p-6 space-y-6 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar flex-1">
          <div className="space-y-1"><label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Nome do Efeito</label><input type="text" value={data.name} onChange={e => setData({...data, name: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded-lg p-2 text-white font-bold" placeholder="Ex: Aumento de Força..."/></div>
          <div className="space-y-2"><label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Categoria</label><select value={data.category} onChange={(e) => setData({...data, category: e.target.value as EffectCategory, targets: [], generalChangeMode: ''})} className="w-full bg-eden-900 border border-eden-700 rounded-lg p-3 text-white">{CATEGORIES.map(c => <option key={c.val} value={c.val}>{c.label}</option>)}</select></div>

          {data.category === 'add_damage' && (
              <div className="space-y-2 animate-in fade-in">
                  <label className="text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/70 uppercase">Tipo do Dano Adicional</label>
                  <select value={getMeta().damageType || 'balistico'} onChange={e => setMeta({damageType: e.target.value})} className="w-full bg-eden-950 border border-eden-700 rounded p-3 text-white capitalize">{DAMAGE_TYPES.map(d => <option key={d} value={d}>{d}</option>)}</select>
                  <div className="flex gap-2 items-center text-xs text-eden-100/50"><input type="checkbox" checked={!!getMeta().multipliable} onChange={e => setMeta({multipliable: e.target.checked})}/> Multiplicável no Crítico?</div>
              </div>
