FILE: Home.tsx
PATH: C:\Users\bruno\Downloads\eden-arquivos\src\pages\Home.tsx
========================================

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { collection, getDocs, query, orderBy, deleteDoc, doc } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from '../config/firebase';
import { Sword, Shield, Plus, Scroll, Ghost, Loader2, Trash2, AlertTriangle, Book, X } from 'lucide-react';

export default function Home() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  
  const [characters, setCharacters] = useState<any[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  
  const [deletingChar, setDeletingChar] = useState<any | null>(null);
  const [confirmName, setConfirmName] = useState('');

  useEffect(() => {
    async function fetchPublicCharacters() {
      try {
        const q = query(collection(db, "characters"), orderBy("createdAt", "desc"));
        const querySnapshot = await getDocs(q);
        
        const chars: any[] = [];
        querySnapshot.forEach((doc) => {
          const data = doc.data();
          
          if (!data.isPrivate) {
             chars.push({ ...data, id: doc.id });
          }
        });
        
        setCharacters(chars);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Erro ao buscar fichas:", error);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    }

    fetchPublicCharacters();
  }, []);

  const handleDelete = async () => {
      if (!deletingChar) return;
      
      const charName = deletingChar.personal?.name || deletingChar.info?.name || "Desconhecido";

      if (confirmName !== charName) {
          alert("O nome inserido não corresponde ao do agente.");
          return;
      }

      try {
          await deleteDoc(doc(db, "characters", deletingChar.id));
          
          setCharacters(prev => prev.filter(c => c.id !== deletingChar.id));
          setDeletingChar(null);
          setConfirmName('');
      } catch (error) {
          console.error("Erro ao excluir:", error);
          alert("Erro ao excluir ficha.");
      }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex flex-col bg-eden-900 text-eden-100 font-sans">
      
      {}
      <div className="bg-eden-800 border-b border-eden-700 py-6 md:py-12 px-4 text-center relative overflow-hidden shrink-0">
        <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-[url('https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/cubes.png')] opacity-5 pointer-events-none"></div>
        <h1 className="flex items-center justify-center gap-1 text-3xl md:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-br from-eden-1 to-eden-2 mb-1 md:mb-2 relative z-10">
        EDEN<img src="https://img.icons8.com/?size=512&id=8SkEP8nszFSJ&format=png&color=fa8805" alt="Ícone Customizado" className="w-10 h-10 md:w-20 md:h-20"/>
        </h1>
      </div>

      <main className="flex-1 w-full max-w-6xl mx-auto p-4 md:p-8">
        
        {}
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-3 md:gap-6 mb-8 md:mb-12">
            
            {}
            <button 
                onClick={() => navigate('/criar')}
                className="col-span-1 group relative overflow-hidden p-4 md:p-8 bg-eden-800/50 border border-eden-700 hover:border-green-500/50 rounded-2xl text-left flex flex-col justify-between hover:bg-eden-800 transition-all"
            >
                <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 p-4 opacity-10 group-hover:opacity-20 transition-opacity pointer-events-none hidden md:block">
                    <Plus size={100} />
                </div>
                <div className="p-2 md:p-3 bg-eden-900/80 rounded-lg w-fit mb-2 md:mb-4 text-green-500">
                    <Sword size={20} className="md:w-8 md:h-8" />
                </div>
                <div>
                    <h3 className="text-sm md:text-2xl font-bold mb-0 md:mb-1 text-white group-hover:text-green-400">Ficha Pública</h3>
                    <p className="text-eden-100/50 text-[10px] md:text-sm hidden md:block">Criar agente visível para todos.</p>
                </div>
            </button>

            {}
            <button 
                onClick={() => navigate('/mestre')}
                className="col-span-1 group relative overflow-hidden p-4 md:p-8 bg-eden-800/50 border border-eden-700 hover:border-red-500/50 rounded-2xl text-left flex flex-col justify-between hover:bg-eden-800 transition-all"
            >
                <div className="p-2 md:p-3 bg-eden-900/80 rounded-lg w-fit mb-2 md:mb-4 text-red-500">
                    <Shield size={20} className="md:w-8 md:h-8" />
                </div>
                <div>
                    <h3 className="text-sm md:text-2xl font-bold mb-0 md:mb-1 text-white group-hover:text-red-400">Escudo do Mestre</h3>
                    <p className="text-eden-100/50 text-[10px] md:text-sm hidden md:block">Área restrita.</p>
                </div>
            </button>
             
            {}
            <button 
                onClick={() => navigate('/catalogo')}
                className="col-span-1 group relative overflow-hidden p-4 md:p-8 bg-eden-800/50 border border-eden-700 hover:border-blue-500/50 rounded-2xl text-left flex flex-col justify-between hover:bg-eden-800 transition-all"
            >
                <div className="p-2 md:p-3 bg-eden-900/80 rounded-lg w-fit mb-2 md:mb-4 text-blue-400">
                    <Book size={20} className="md:w-8 md:h-8" />
                </div>
                <div>
                    <h3 className="text-sm md:text-2xl font-bold mb-0 md:mb-1 text-white group-hover:text-blue-400">Catálogo</h3>
                    <p className="text-eden-100/50 text-[10px] md:text-sm hidden md:block">Consultar regras.</p>
                </div>
            </button>

        </div>

        <h2 className="text-lg md:text-2xl font-bold text-eden-100 mb-3 md:mb-6 flex items-center gap-2 md:gap-3 border-b border-eden-700 pb-2 md:pb-4">
            <Scroll className="text-conhecimento w-4 h-4 md:w-6 md:h-6" /> Arquivos da Ordem
        </h2>

        {loading ? (
            <div className="flex justify-center py-20 text-eden-100/30">
                <Loader2 size={32} className="animate-spin md:w-12 md:h-12" />
            </div>
        ) : characters.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="text-center py-12 md:py-20 bg-eden-800/30 rounded-2xl border border-dashed border-eden-700">
                <Ghost className="mx-auto mb-4 text-eden-100/20 w-10 h-10 md:w-16 md:h-16" />
                <p className="text-xs md:text-lg text-eden-100/50">Nenhum agente público encontrado.</p>
            </div>
        ) : (
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-3 md:gap-4 pb-8">
                {characters.map(char => {
                    
                    const name = char.personal?.name || char.info?.name || "Desconhecido";
                    const portrait = char.personal?.portraitUrl || char.info?.portraitUrl;
                    const nex = char.personal?.nex || char.progression?.nex || 0;
                    const cls = char.personal?.class || char.progression?.class || "Mundano";

                    return (
                    <div 
                        key={char.id}
                        onClick={() => navigate(`/ficha/${char.id}`)}
                        className="relative flex items-center gap-3 md:gap-4 p-3 md:p-4 bg-eden-800 border border-eden-700 rounded-xl hover:border-eden-500 hover:bg-eden-700 transition-all group cursor-pointer shadow-sm active:scale-[0.98]"
                    >
                        <div className="w-10 h-10 md:w-16 md:h-16 rounded-full bg-eden-900 overflow-hidden border-2 border-eden-600 group-hover:border-eden-400 shrink-0">
                            {portrait ? (
                                <img src={portrait} alt={name} className="w-full h-full object-cover" />
                            ) : (
                                <div className="w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center text-eden-100/20"><Ghost className="w-5 h-5 md:w-8 md:h-8" /></div>
                            )}
                        </div>
                        
                        <div className="min-w-0 flex-1 pr-8">
                            <h4 className="font-bold text-sm md:text-lg text-eden-100 truncate group-hover:text-white">{name}</h4>
                            <div className="flex gap-2 text-[10px] md:text-xs text-eden-100/50 font-mono uppercase mt-0.5 md:mt-1">
                                <span className="bg-eden-900 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">{nex}%</span>
                                <span className="self-center">•</span>
                                <span className="truncate text-energia font-bold">{cls}</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        {}
                        <button 
                            onClick={(e) => {
                                e.stopPropagation();
                                setDeletingChar(char);
                                setConfirmName('');
                            }}
                            className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-2 rounded-lg text-eden-100/30 hover:text-red-500 hover:bg-red-500/10 transition-all z-10"
                            title="Excluir Ficha"
                        >
                            <Trash2 size={18} />
                        </button>
                    </div>
                )})}
            </div>
        )}
      </main>

      {}
      {deletingChar && (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4 animate-in fade-in">
              <div className="bg-eden-900 border border-red-500/50 w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl shadow-2xl p-6 relative">
                  <button 
                    onClick={() => setDeletingChar(null)}
                    className="absolute top-4 right-4 text-eden-100/50 hover:text-white"
                  >
                      <X size={24}/>
                  </button>

                  <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center mb-6">
                      <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-red-500/10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-red-500 mb-4">
                          <AlertTriangle size={32}/>
                      </div>
                      <h3 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white mb-2">Excluir Agente?</h3>
                      <p className="text-eden-100/60 text-sm">
                          Esta ação é irreversível. A ficha de <strong className="text-white">{deletingChar.personal?.name || deletingChar.info?.name}</strong> será apagada permanentemente.
                      </p>
                  </div>

                  <div className="space-y-4">
                      <div>
                          <label className="block text-xs font-bold text-eden-100/50 uppercase mb-1">
                              Digite <span className="text-white select-all">"{deletingChar.personal?.name || deletingChar.info?.name}"</span> para confirmar:
                          </label>
                          <input 
                              type="text" 
                              value={confirmName}
                              onChange={(e) => setConfirmName(e.target.value)}
                              placeholder={deletingChar.personal?.name || deletingChar.info?.name}
                              className="w-full bg-eden-950 border border-eden-700 rounded-xl p-3 text-center font-bold text-eden-100 focus:border-red-500 outline-none transition-colors"
                              autoFocus
                              style={{ colorScheme: 'dark' }}
                          />
                      </div>

                      <div className="flex gap-3">
                          <button 
                              onClick={() => setDeletingChar(null)}
                              className="flex-1 py-3 rounded-xl font-bold bg-eden-800 text-eden-100 hover:bg-eden-700 transition-colors"
                          >
                              Cancelar
                          </button>
                          <button 
                              onClick={handleDelete}
                              disabled={confirmName !== (deletingChar.personal?.name || deletingChar.info?.name)}
                              className="flex-1 py-3 rounded-xl font-bold bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-500 transition-colors disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
                          >
                              <Trash2 size={18}/> Excluir
                          </button>
                      </div>
                  </div>
              </div>
          </div>
      )}

    </div>
  );
}


========================================
FILE: Sheet.tsx
PATH: C:\Users\bruno\Downloads\eden-arquivos\src\pages\Sheet.tsx
========================================

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useParams, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { doc, getDoc, updateDoc } from 'firebase/firestore';
import { db } from '../config/firebase';
import { 
  Shield, Brain, Zap, Eye, BicepsFlexed, ArrowLeft, Edit2, Save, 
  Swords, Backpack, Dice5, Plus, BookOpen, Play, User, Users, PenTool, Loader2, Ghost, RefreshCw,
  SkipForward 
} from 'lucide-react';

import { CharacterProvider, useCharacter } from '../context/CharacterContext';
import type { CharacterSheet } from '../types/characterSchema';
import type { Attribute } from '../types/systemData'; 
import type { CombatState } from '../components/sheet/SheetCombat'; 

import SheetStatus from '../components/sheet/SheetStatus';
import SheetConditions from '../components/sheet/SheetConditions';
import SheetSkills from '../components/sheet/SheetSkills';
import SheetInventory from '../components/sheet/SheetInventory';
import SheetRituals from '../components/sheet/SheetRituals';
import SheetCombat from '../components/sheet/SheetCombat';
import SheetDescription from '../components/sheet/SheetDescription';
import SheetTeam from '../components/sheet/SheetTeam';
import SheetAbilities from '../components/sheet/SheetAbilities';
import SheetNotes from '../components/sheet/SheetNotes';
import LevelUpModal from '../components/leveling/LevelUpModal'; 

const ATTR_CONFIG: Record<string, { label: string, icon: any, color: string }> = {
  AGI: { label: 'AGI', icon: Zap, color: 'text-yellow-400' },
  FOR: { label: 'FOR', icon: BicepsFlexed, color: 'text-red-500' },
  INT: { label: 'INT', icon: Brain, color: 'text-blue-400' },
  PRE: { label: 'PRE', icon: Eye, color: 'text-purple-400' },
  VIG: { label: 'VIG', icon: Shield, color: 'text-green-500' },
};
const ATTRIBUTE_ORDER: Attribute[] = ['AGI', 'FOR', 'INT', 'PRE', 'VIG'];
const TABS_CONFIG = [
  { id: 'skills', label: 'Perícias', icon: Dice5 },
  { id: 'inventory', label: 'Inventário', icon: Backpack },
  { id: 'rituals', label: 'Rituais', icon: BookOpen },
  { id: 'combat', label: 'Combate', icon: Swords },
  { id: 'description', label: 'Descrição', icon: User },
  { id: 'team', label: 'Equipe', icon: Users },
  { id: 'abilities', label: 'Habilidades', icon: Zap },
  { id: 'notes', label: 'Anotações', icon: PenTool },
] as const;

function SheetContent() {
  const { id } = useParams();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const { character, vars, updateCharacter } = useCharacter(); 
  
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false); 

  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<typeof TABS_CONFIG[number]['id']>('skills');
  const [isEditingHeader, setIsEditingHeader] = useState(false);
  const [tempName, setTempName] = useState('');
  const [tempPlayer, setTempPlayer] = useState('');

  const [showLevelUp, setShowLevelUp] = useState(false);
  const [targetLevel, setTargetLevel] = useState(0);

  const [combatState, setCombatState] = useState<CombatState>({
      expandedWeapon: null,
      attackMode: {},
      unbridledMode: {},
      rollResult: null,
      damageMode: 'roll',
      attachedAmmo: {},
      ammoCounters: {},
      ammoLeftovers: {},
      ammoSceneTracker: {}
  });

  
  useEffect(() => {
    let isMounted = true;
    if (!id) return;
    async function loadData() {
      try {
        const docRef = doc(db, "characters", id!);
        const docSnap = await getDoc(docRef);
        if (docSnap.exists() && isMounted) {
          const rawData = docSnap.data();
          const safeStatus = {
             ...rawData.status,
             pv: typeof rawData.status?.pv === 'number' ? { current: rawData.status.pv, temp: 0 } : (rawData.status?.pv || { current: 1, temp: 0 }),
             pe: typeof rawData.status?.pe === 'number' ? { current: rawData.status.pe, temp: 0 } : (rawData.status?.pe || { current: 1, temp: 0 }),
             san: typeof rawData.status?.san === 'number' ? { current: rawData.status.san, temp: 0 } : (rawData.status?.san || { current: 1, temp: 0 }),
             sustainedIds: rawData.status?.sustainedIds || []
          };
          const data: CharacterSheet = {
              ...rawData,
              personal: rawData.personal || rawData.info || {}, 
              status: safeStatus,
              inventory: rawData.inventory || [],
              skills: rawData.skills || {},
              conditions: rawData.conditions || [],
              resistances: rawData.resistances || [] 
          } as CharacterSheet;
          updateCharacter(data);
          setTempName(data.personal.name);
          setTempPlayer(data.personal.player);
          setTimeout(() => { if (isMounted) setLoading(false); }, 150);
        } else if (isMounted) { navigate('/'); }
      } catch (error) { if (isMounted) setLoading(false); }
    }
    loadData();
    return () => { isMounted = false; };
  }, [id, navigate]);

  
  useEffect(() => {
    if (loading || !id || !character.personal.name) return; 
    const timer = setTimeout(async () => {
      setIsSaving(true);
      try {
        const dataToSave = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(character));
        await updateDoc(doc(db, "characters", id), dataToSave);
      } finally { setIsSaving(false); }
    }, 1500);
    return () => clearTimeout(timer);
  }, [character, id, loading]);

  
  const handleBack = () => {
    if (isSaving && !confirm("Eden ainda está sincronizando seus dados. Deseja sair mesmo assim?")) return;
    navigate('/');
  };

  const saveHeader = () => {
    updateCharacter(prev => ({ ...prev, personal: { ...prev.personal, name: tempName, player: tempPlayer } }));
    setIsEditingHeader(false);
  };

  const changePP = () => {
    const val = prompt("Definir Pontos de Prestígio (PP):", character.personal.prestigePoints.toString());
    if (val !== null && !isNaN(parseInt(val))) {
      updateCharacter(prev => ({ ...prev, personal: { ...prev.personal, prestigePoints: parseInt(val) } }));
    }
  };

  const handleNextTurn = () => {
      const sustainedCount = character.status.sustainedIds?.length || 0;
      updateCharacter(prev => {
          const currentPE = prev.status.pe?.current ?? 0;
          let updatedConditions = prev.conditions.map(c => {
              if (c.duration === 'turnos') { return { ...c, turnsRemaining: c.turnsRemaining - 1 }; }
              return c;
          });
          updatedConditions = updatedConditions.filter(c => !(c.duration === 'turnos' && c.turnsRemaining <= 0));
          return {
            ...prev,
            status: { ...prev.status, pe: { ...prev.status.pe, current: Math.max(0, currentPE - sustainedCount) } },
            conditions: updatedConditions
          };
      });
  };

  const handleEndScene = () => {
      if(!confirm("Encerrar a Cena atual?\n\nIsso removerá todas as condições com duração 'Cena'.")) return;
      updateCharacter(prev => ({
          ...prev,
          conditions: prev.conditions.filter(c => c.duration !== 'cena')
      }));
  };

  const handleUndoLevel = () => {
      if(confirm("Desfazer nível?")) {
        updateCharacter(prev => ({ ...prev, personal: { ...prev.personal, nex: Math.max(5, prev.personal.nex - 5) } }));
      }
  };

  if (loading) return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-eden-900 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4">
      <Loader2 className="animate-spin text-energia w-12 h-12"/>
      <span className="text-eden-100/40 font-black uppercase tracking-widest animate-pulse">Sincronizando Eden...</span>
    </div>
  );

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-eden-900 text-eden-100 pb-20 overflow-x-hidden">
      <div className={`fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 transition-opacity duration-500 ${isSaving ? 'opacity-100' : 'opacity-0'}`}>
        <div className="bg-eden-800/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-eden-600 px-4 py-2 rounded-full flex items-center gap-2 shadow-2xl">
          <RefreshCw size={14} className="animate-spin text-energia" />
          <span className="text-[10px] font-black text-eden-100/60 uppercase tracking-tighter">Sincronizando...</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <header className="bg-eden-800/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-eden-700 p-3 md:p-4 sticky top-0 z-40 shadow-lg">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto space-y-4">
            <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-4">
                {}
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3 w-full lg:w-auto">
                    <button onClick={handleBack} className="p-2 hover:bg-eden-700 rounded-full text-eden-100/50"><ArrowLeft size={24} /></button>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3 min-w-0">
                        <div className="w-12 h-12 md:w-16 md:h-16 rounded-full border-2 border-eden-500 bg-eden-900 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden shrink-0">
                            {character.personal.portraitUrl ? <img src={character.personal.portraitUrl} className="w-full h-full object-cover" alt="Portrait" /> : <Ghost size={24} className="text-eden-700"/>}
                        </div>
                        <div className="min-w-0">
                            {isEditingHeader ? (
                                <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
                                    <input value={tempName} onChange={e => setTempName(e.target.value)} className="bg-eden-950 border border-eden-600 rounded px-2 py-0.5 text-white text-sm font-bold outline-none" />
                                    <button onClick={saveHeader} className="bg-energia text-eden-900 text-[10px] font-bold rounded px-2 py-0.5 flex items-center gap-1 w-fit"><Save size={10}/> SALVAR</button>
                                </div>
                            ) : (
                                <div className="group flex flex-col">
                                    <h1 className="text-sm md:text-xl font-black uppercase flex items-center gap-2 text-white truncate">
                                        {character.personal.name || "Sem Nome"}
                                        <button onClick={() => setIsEditingHeader(true)} className="opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity text-eden-100/30"><Edit2 size={14}/></button>
                                    </h1>
                                    <span className="text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/40 uppercase tracking-widest truncate">{character.personal.class}</span>
                                </div>
                            )}
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                {}
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between w-full lg:w-auto bg-eden-950/60 px-4 py-2 md:px-8 md:py-3 rounded-xl border border-eden-700/50 gap-4 md:gap-8 overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar">
                    {ATTRIBUTE_ORDER.map((key) => {
                        const { color, label, icon: Icon } = ATTR_CONFIG[key];
                        
                        const val = vars.ATTRS[key] || 0;
                        return (
                            <div key={key} className="flex flex-col items-center shrink-0">
                                <span className={`text-[8px] md:text-[10px] font-black ${color} flex items-center gap-1 uppercase opacity-80`}><Icon size={10} /> {label}</span>
                                <div className="text-xl md:text-3xl font-black text-eden-100 leading-none">{val}</div>
                            </div>
                        );
                    })}
                </div>

                {}
                <div className="flex gap-2 w-full lg:w-auto">
                    <button onClick={handleEndScene} className="flex-1 lg:flex-none h-10 md:h-14 px-3 bg-cyan-950/30 border-2 border-cyan-800 text-cyan-400 rounded-xl font-bold flex items-center justify-center gap-2 hover:bg-cyan-900/50 hover:border-cyan-500 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-cyan-900/10" title="Encerrar Cena">
                        <SkipForward size={16} fill="currentColor" /> 
                        <span className="hidden md:inline whitespace-nowrap text-[10px] md:text-xs">FIM CENA</span>
                    </button>

                    <button onClick={handleNextTurn} className="flex-1 lg:flex-none h-10 md:h-14 px-4 bg-eden-800 border-2 border-eden-600 rounded-xl font-bold flex items-center justify-center gap-2 hover:bg-eden-700 hover:text-white text-eden-100 transition-colors text-xs">
                        <Play size={16} fill="currentColor" /> <span className="whitespace-nowrap">TURNO</span>
                    </button>
                    
                    <button onClick={() => { setTargetLevel(character.personal.nex + 5); setShowLevelUp(true); }} className="flex-1 lg:flex-none h-10 md:h-14 px-4 bg-energia text-eden-900 rounded-xl font-black text-xs shadow-lg shadow-energia/20 flex items-center justify-center gap-1 hover:bg-energia/80 transition-all">
                        <Plus size={16} strokeWidth={4} /> NEX UP
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            {}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 md:flex items-center md:justify-between bg-eden-950/40 border border-eden-700/50 rounded-xl px-4 py-2 md:py-3 gap-2">
                <div className="flex flex-col items-center md:flex-1 relative group">
                     <span className="text-[8px] md:text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/40 uppercase">NEX</span>
                     <div className="text-sm md:text-2xl font-black text-white">{character.personal.nex}%</div>
                     <button onClick={handleUndoLevel} className="absolute -bottom-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 text-[8px] text-red-500 font-bold bg-eden-900 px-1 rounded z-10">DESFAZER</button>
                </div>
                <div className="flex flex-col items-center md:flex-1 cursor-pointer hover:bg-eden-800/50 rounded transition-colors" onClick={changePP}>
                     <span className="text-[8px] md:text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/40 uppercase">Prestígio (PP)</span>
                     <div className="text-sm md:text-2xl font-black text-conhecimento">{character.personal.prestigePoints}</div>
                </div>
                <div className="flex flex-col items-center md:flex-1">
                     <span className="text-[8px] md:text-[10px] font-bold text-eden-100/40 uppercase">Limite PE</span>
                     <div className="text-sm md:text-2xl font-black text-yellow-500">{vars.PE.limit}</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
      </header>

      <main className="max-w-7xl mx-auto p-4 md:p-6 grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 items-start">
        <div className="lg:col-span-4 space-y-6">
          <SheetStatus />
          <SheetConditions />
        </div>

        <div className="lg:col-span-8 space-y-6">
          <div className="flex md:grid md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-8 gap-2 bg-eden-800 p-2 rounded-xl border border-eden-700 shadow-sm overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar">
             {TABS_CONFIG.map((tab) => (
                 <button key={tab.id} onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab.id)} className={`py-3 px-4 md:px-0 rounded-lg text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-tighter flex flex-col items-center gap-1.5 transition-all shrink-0 md:shrink-1 ${activeTab === tab.id ? 'bg-eden-900 text-white border border-eden-600 shadow-inner' : 'text-eden-100/40 border border-transparent hover:bg-eden-700/50'}`}>
                    <tab.icon size={16} /> <span className="whitespace-nowrap">{tab.label}</span>
                 </button>
             ))}
          </div>
          <div className="bg-eden-800 border border-eden-700 p-4 md:p-6 rounded-xl min-h-[600px] shadow-sm">
             {activeTab === 'skills' && <SheetSkills />}
             {activeTab === 'inventory' && <SheetInventory />}
             {activeTab === 'rituals' && <SheetRituals />}
             {activeTab === 'combat' && <SheetCombat combatState={combatState} setCombatState={setCombatState} />}
             {activeTab === 'description' && <SheetDescription />}
             {activeTab === 'team' && <SheetTeam />}
             {activeTab === 'abilities' && <SheetAbilities />}
             {activeTab === 'notes' && <SheetNotes />}
          </div>
        </div>
      </main>
      
      {showLevelUp && <LevelUpModal targetNex={targetLevel} onConfirm={() => setShowLevelUp(false)} onCancel={() => setShowLevelUp(false)} />}
    </div>
  );
}

export default function Sheet() {
  return (
    <CharacterProvider>
      <SheetContent />
    </CharacterProvider>
  );
}


========================================
FILE: characterService.ts
PATH: C:\Users\bruno\Downloads\eden-arquivos\src\services\characterService.ts
========================================

import { db } from '../config/firebase';
import { collection, addDoc, serverTimestamp } from 'firebase/firestore';
import type { CharacterSheet } from '../types/characterSchema';


const CLASS_STATS = {
  combatente: { pv: 20, pe: 2, san: 12 },
  especialista: { pv: 16, pe: 3, san: 16 },
  ocultista: { pv: 12, pe: 4, san: 20 },
  mundano: { pv: 8, pe: 1, san: 8 }
};


const sanitizeObject = (obj: any): any => {
  return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(obj));
};

export const saveCharacter = async (characterData: CharacterSheet) => {
  try {
    
    const cls = characterData.personal.class || 'mundano';
    
    
    const stats = CLASS_STATS[cls as keyof typeof CLASS_STATS] || CLASS_STATS['mundano'];
    
    
    const vig = characterData.attributes.initial.VIG;
    const pre = characterData.attributes.initial.PRE;

    
    
    
    const startPV = stats.pv + vig;
    const startPE = stats.pe + pre;
    const startSAN = stats.san;

    
    const cleanCharacterData = sanitizeObject(characterData);

    
    const finalData = {
      ...cleanCharacterData,
      
      
      status: {
        ...cleanCharacterData.status,
        pv: startPV,
        pe: startPE,
        san: startSAN,
        
        sustainedIds: cleanCharacterData.status.sustainedIds || []
      },

      
      createdAt: serverTimestamp(),
      updatedAt: serverTimestamp(),
      userId: 'guest_user', 
    };

    
    const docRef = await addDoc(collection(db, "characters"), finalData);
    console.log("Ficha salva com ID: ", docRef.id);
    return docRef.id;

  } catch (e) {
    console.error("ERRO CRÍTICO AO SALVAR: ", e);
    throw e;
  }
};


========================================
FILE: characterSchema.ts
PATH: C:\Users\bruno\Downloads\eden-arquivos\src\types\characterSchema.ts
========================================

import type { AnyUserItem, UserRitual, UserOrigin, Effect, TeamRole, Attribute } from './systemData';





export interface TextObject {
  id: string;
  x: number;
  y: number;
  text: string;
  color: string;
  fontSize: number;
  align: 'left' | 'center' | 'right';
  width: number;
  height: number;
  borderColor?: string;
  backgroundColor?: string;
}

export interface ImageObject {
  id: string;
  x: number;
  y: number;
  src: string;
  width: number;
  height: number;
}

export interface NotePage {
  id: number;
  title?: string;
  drawing: string;
  texts: TextObject[];
  images: ImageObject[];
}





export interface CharacterAttributes {
  initial: Record<Attribute, number>;
  nexIncreases: Record<Attribute, number>;
}

export interface CharacterPersonal {
  name: string;
  player: string;
  age: number;
  gender: string;
  origin: string; 
  class: 'combatente' | 'especialista' | 'ocultista' | 'mundano';
  trail: string;
  nex: number;
  xp: number;
  prestigePoints: number;
  patent: string;
  
  
  portraitUrl?: string;
  appearance?: string;
  personality?: string;
  history?: string;
  archetype?: string; 
  campaign?: string;
}

export interface CharacterCondition {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description?: string;
  duration: string; 
  turnsRemaining: number; 
  isActive: boolean;
  effects: Effect[]; 
}

export interface CharacterSkill {
  training: number; 
  otherBonus: number; 
  customName?: string; 
}

export interface TeamStrategy {
    role: TeamRole;
    roleAbilities: { 
        id: string; 
        name: string; 
        currentLevel: number; 
    }[];
    favoriteFormations: string[]; 
    isFormationActive: boolean;
    loneWolf: { 
        isActive: boolean; 
        extraPowersChosen: { 
            nexSource: number;
            powerId: string; 
            powerName: string;
        }[]; 
    };
}





export interface CharacterSheet {
  id: string;
  userId: string;
  
  personal: CharacterPersonal;
  attributes: CharacterAttributes;
  
  
  status: {
    pv: { current: number; temp: number };
    pe: { current: number; temp: number };
    san: { current: number; temp: number };
    sustainedIds: string[]; 
    dyingRounds: number; 
    isDying: boolean;
  };

  
  inventory: AnyUserItem[];
  rituals: UserRitual[];
  
  
  customOrigin?: UserOrigin; 
  
  
  teamStrategy: TeamStrategy;
  
  
  conditions: CharacterCondition[];
  
  
  skills: Record<string, CharacterSkill>;
  
  
  classPowers: { 
      id: string; 
      name: string; 
      effects?: Effect[]; 
      
      customDescription?: string;
  }[]; 
  
  otherPowers: { 
      id: string; 
      name: string; 
      source: string; 
      effects?: Effect[]; 
  }[];

  
  proficiencies: string[]; 

  
  attacks: any[]; 
  resistances: { name: string; value: number; type: string }[];

  
  notes: NotePage[];
}





export const initialCharacterState: CharacterSheet = {
  id: '',
  userId: '',
  personal: { 
    name: '', player: '', origin: '', class: 'mundano', trail: '', nex: 5, prestigePoints: 0,
    age: 0, gender: '', portraitUrl: '', appearance: '', personality: '', history: '', patent: 'Recruta', xp: 0
  },
  status: { 
    pv: { current: 1, temp: 0 }, 
    pe: { current: 1, temp: 0 }, 
    san: { current: 1, temp: 0 },
    sustainedIds: [],
    dyingRounds: 0,
    isDying: false
  },
  attributes: {
    initial: { AGI: 1, INT: 1, VIG: 1, PRE: 1, FOR: 1 },
    nexIncreases: { AGI: 0, INT: 0, VIG: 0, PRE: 0, FOR: 0 }
  },
  inventory: [],
  rituals: [],
  conditions: [],
  skills: {}, 
  notes: [],
  classPowers: [],
  otherPowers: [],
  proficiencies: [],
  attacks: [],
  resistances: [],
  teamStrategy: { 
    role: 'polivalente', 
    roleAbilities: [], 
    favoriteFormations: [], 
    isFormationActive: false, 
    loneWolf: { isActive: false, extraPowersChosen: [] } 
  }
};


========================================
FILE: systemData.ts
PATH: C:\Users\bruno\Downloads\eden-arquivos\src\types\systemData.ts

export type Attribute = 'AGI' | 'FOR' | 'INT' | 'PRE' | 'VIG';

export type TeamRole = 
  | 'tanque' | 'suporte' | 'curandeiro' | 'oportunista' 
  | 'investigador' | 'terapeuta' | 'sabotador' | 'polivalente' 
  | 'lobo_solitario';

export type DamageType = 
  | 'balistico' | 'corte' | 'impacto' | 'perfuracao' 
  | 'fogo' | 'frio' | 'eletricidade' | 'quimico' 
  | 'conhecimento' | 'sangue' | 'morte' | 'energia' | 'medo'
  | 'mental' | 'paranormal'; 

export type ElementType = 'Sangue' | 'Morte' | 'Conhecimento' | 'Energia' | 'Medo';

export type DiceFace = 2 | 3 | 4 | 6 | 8 | 10 | 12 | 20 | 100;

export type ItemType = 'weapon' | 'protection' | 'ammo' | 'accessory' | 'explosive' | 'general' | 'cursed';

export type Range = 'curto' | 'medio' | 'longo' | 'extremo' | 'adjacente' | 'nenhum' | 'pessoal' | 'toque' | 'ilimitado';

export type WeaponHand = 'one' | 'two' | 'light'; 





export type Operation = 'soma' | 'subtracao' | 'multiplicacao' | 'divisao';

export type FormulaValueType = 
  | 'fixed' | 'attribute' | 'dice' | 'skill_total' | 'skill_training'
  | 'stat_max' | 'stat_current' | 'stat_temp' | 'displacement' | 'defense'
  | 'nex' | 'pe_limit' | 'dr_value' | 'weapon_damage' | 'count_abilities'
  | 'count_class_powers' | 'count_origin_powers' | 'count_team_powers'
  | 'count_paranormal_powers' | 'count_rituals' | 'prestige'
  | 'load_current' | 'load_max' | 'action_move' | 'action_std';

export interface FormulaTerm {
  id: string;
  type: FormulaValueType;
  value?: number;           
  diceFace?: DiceFace;      
  attribute?: Attribute;    
  skill?: string;           
  stat?: 'pv' | 'pe' | 'san'; 
  element?: ElementType;    
  damageType?: DamageType;  
  weaponId?: string;        
}

export interface Formula {
  terms: FormulaTerm[];
  operations: Operation[]; 
}





export type EffectCategory = 
  | 'add_fixed' | 'add_damage' | 'add_action' | 'add_dr' | 'add_immunity' | 'add_vulnerability'
  | 'change_dice' | 'change_step' | 'change_general' | 'proficiency' 
  | 'learning' | 'affinity' | 'manual';

export type TargetType = 
  | 'test_attribute' | 'test_skill' | 'test_attack' | 'heal' 
  | 'item_category' | 'item_bonus' | 'item_space' | 'dr' 
  | 'displacement' | 'stat' | 'defense' | 'ritual_dt' 
  | 'load_current' | 'load_max' | 'damage_roll' 
  | 'range_standard' | 'range_ritual' | 'credit_limit' 
  | 'ritual_duration' | 'ritual_resist_skill' | 'ritual_resist_result'
  | 'ritual_target' | 'ritual_execution' 
  | 'weapon_dice'
  | 'action_move' | 'action_std'
  | 'pv_max' | 'pv_current' | 'pv_temp'
  | 'pe_max' | 'pe_current' | 'pe_temp'
  | 'san_max' | 'san_current' | 'san_temp';

export interface EffectTarget {
  id: string;
  type: TargetType;
  
  skill?: string;
  attribute?: Attribute;
  weaponId?: string; 
  ritualId?: string; 
  itemId?: string;   
  abilityId?: string; 
  
  damageType?: DamageType; 
  condition?: string; 
}

export interface Effect {
  id: string;
  name: string; 
  category: EffectCategory;
  value: Formula; 
  targets: EffectTarget[];
  isMultipliable?: boolean; 
  generalChangeMode?: string; 
  description?: string;
  isActive?: boolean;
}





interface BaseUserItem {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  type: ItemType;
  category: number; 
  weight: number; 
  quantity: number; 
  isActive?: boolean; 
  description: string;
  isCustom: boolean;
  effects: Effect[];
  modifications: { id: string; name: string; effects: Effect[]; }[];
  curses: { id: string; name: string; element: ElementType; effects: Effect[]; }[];
}

export interface UserWeapon extends BaseUserItem {
  type: 'weapon';
  weaponType: 'melee' | 'ranged';
  hand: WeaponHand;
  damage: { diceCount: number; diceFace: DiceFace; type: DamageType; };
  critical: { range: number; multiplier: number; };
  range: Range; 
  ammoType?: string; 
}

export interface UserProtection extends BaseUserItem {
  type: 'protection';
  defenseBonus: number; 
  damageReduction?: { value: number; type: DamageType | 'all'; };
  penalty?: number; 
  isHeavy: boolean; 
}

export interface UserAmmo extends BaseUserItem {
  type: 'ammo';
  calibre: string; 
  limit: {
    type: 'cenas' | 'usos'; 
    value: number; 
    max: number;   
  };
  shotCounter: number; 
}

export interface UserExplosive extends BaseUserItem {
  type: 'explosive';
  damage: {
    diceCount: number;
    diceFace: DiceFace;
    type: DamageType;
  };
  area?: string; 
  dt?: number | Attribute;
}

export interface UserCursedItem extends BaseUserItem {
  type: 'cursed';
  element: ElementType;
}

export interface UserAccessory extends BaseUserItem { type: 'accessory'; }
export interface UserGeneralItem extends BaseUserItem { type: 'general'; }

export type AnyUserItem = 
  | UserWeapon | UserProtection | UserAmmo | UserExplosive 
  | UserAccessory | UserGeneralItem | UserCursedItem;





export interface RitualVersion {
    isActive: boolean;
    cost: number;
    execution: string; 
    range: string;
    target: string;
    duration: string;
    resistance: string;
    description: string;
    effects: Effect[];
    requiredCircle?: 2 | 3 | 4;
    affinity?: ElementType; 
}

export interface UserRitual {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  element: ElementType;
  circle: 1 | 2 | 3 | 4;
  description?: string; 
  normal: RitualVersion;
  discente: RitualVersion;
  verdadeiro: RitualVersion;
}

export interface UserOrigin {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  source: string; 
  description: string;
  trainedSkills: string[];
  power: {
    name: string;
    description: string;
    effects: Effect[];
  };
}


========================================
FILE: characterFormulas.ts
PATH: C:\Users\bruno\Downloads\eden-arquivos\src\utils\characterFormulas.ts
========================================

import type { CharacterSheet } from '../types/characterSchema';
import type { 
    Effect, Formula, Attribute 
} from '../types/systemData';
import { TEAM_ROLES } from '../data/teamPowers';


const CLASS_STATS: Record<string, { pvInit: number, pvNex: number, peInit: number, peNex: number, sanInit: number, sanNex: number }> = {
  'combatente': { pvInit: 20, pvNex: 4, peInit: 2, peNex: 2, sanInit: 12, sanNex: 3 },
  'especialista': { pvInit: 16, pvNex: 3, peInit: 3, peNex: 3, sanInit: 16, sanNex: 4 },
  'ocultista': { pvInit: 12, pvNex: 2, peInit: 4, peNex: 4, sanInit: 20, sanNex: 5 },
  'mundano': { pvInit: 8, pvNex: 2, peInit: 1, peNex: 1, sanInit: 8, sanNex: 1 },
};

const SKILL_MAP: Record<string, Attribute> = {
  'Acrobacia': 'AGI', 'Adestramento': 'PRE', 'Artes': 'PRE', 'Atletismo': 'FOR', 'Atualidades': 'INT',
  'Ciências': 'INT', 'Crime': 'AGI', 'Diplomacia': 'PRE', 'Enganação': 'PRE', 'Fortitude': 'VIG',
  'Furtividade': 'AGI', 'Iniciativa': 'AGI', 'Intimidação': 'PRE', 'Intuição': 'INT', 'Investigação': 'INT',
  'Luta': 'FOR', 'Medicina': 'INT', 'Ocultismo': 'INT', 'Percepção': 'PRE', 'Pilotagem': 'AGI',
  'Pontaria': 'AGI', 'Profissão': 'INT', 'Reflexos': 'AGI', 'Religião': 'PRE', 'Sobrevivência': 'INT', 
  'Tática': 'INT', 'Tecnologia': 'INT', 'Vontade': 'PRE'
};


export interface CalculatedVariables {
  
  ATTRS: Record<Attribute, number>;
  
  
  PV: { max: number; current: number; temp: number };
  PE: { max: number; current: number; temp: number; limit: number };
  SAN: { max: number; current: number; temp: number };
  
  
  DEF: number;
  RD: Record<string, number>;
  IMUNIDADES: string[];
  VULNERABILIDADES: string[];
  
  
  DESLOCAMENTO: number;
  ACOES: { movimento: number; padrao: number; reacao: number };
  
  
  SKILLS: Record<string, { total: number; dice: number; trainingBonus: number; otherBonus: number }>;
  
  
  NEX: number;
  PATENTE: string;
  LIMITE_CREDITO: string;
  CARGA: { atual: number; max: number };
  
  
  PROFICIENCIAS: string[];
  HABILIDADES_ATIVAS: { source: string; name: string; description: string }[];
  
  
  NM_ORIGEM: string;
  NM_CLASSE: string;
  NM_TRILHA: string;
  PERSONAGEM: string;
  JOGADOR: string;
  PROTEC: string;
  DT_RITUAL: number;
  
  
  CT_LIMITS: { I: number, II: number, III: number, IV: number };
}


const solveFormula = (
    formula: Formula, 
    context: CalculatedVariables, 
    char: CharacterSheet,
    targetType?: string
): number => {
    let result = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < formula.terms.length; i++) {
        const term = formula.terms[i];
        let val = 0;

        switch (term.type) {
            case 'fixed': val = term.value || 0; break;
            case 'attribute': val = context.ATTRS[term.attribute || 'AGI']; break;
            case 'dice': 
                
                val = Math.floor(((term.diceFace || 20) + 1) / 2) * (term.value || 1);
                break;
            case 'skill_total': 
                val = context.SKILLS[term.skill || 'Luta']?.total || 0; 
                break;
            case 'skill_training': 
                val = context.SKILLS[term.skill || 'Luta']?.trainingBonus || 0; 
                break;
            case 'stat_max': 
                if (term.stat === 'pv') val = context.PV.max;
                if (term.stat === 'pe') val = context.PE.max;
                if (term.stat === 'san') val = context.SAN.max;
                break;
            case 'stat_current':
                if (term.stat === 'pv') val = char.status.pv.current;
                if (term.stat === 'pe') val = char.status.pe.current;
                if (term.stat === 'san') val = char.status.san.current;
                break;
            case 'nex': val = context.NEX; break;
            case 'pe_limit': val = context.PE.limit; break;
            case 'displacement': val = context.DESLOCAMENTO; break;
            case 'defense': val = context.DEF; break;
            case 'load_max': val = context.CARGA.max; break;
            case 'load_current': val = context.CARGA.atual; break;
            case 'action_move': val = context.ACOES.movimento; break;
            case 'action_std': val = context.ACOES.padrao; break;
            
            case 'count_rituals':
                val = char.rituals.filter(r => r.element === term.element).length;
                break;
            case 'count_paranormal_powers':
                 val = 0; 
                 break;
            
            default: val = term.value || 0;
        }

        if (i === 0) {
            result = val;
        } else {
            const op = formula.operations[i - 1];
            if (op === 'soma') result += val;
            if (op === 'subtracao') result -= val;
            if (op === 'multiplicacao') result *= val;
            if (op === 'divisao') {
                
                result = Math.floor(result / (val || 1)); 
            }
        }
    }

    
    if (targetType === 'displacement') {
        result = Math.floor(result / 1.5) * 1.5;
    }

    return result;
};


export const calculateVariables = (char: CharacterSheet): CalculatedVariables => {
    
    const statsClass = CLASS_STATS[char.personal.class.toLowerCase()] || CLASS_STATS['mundano'];
    const nex = char.personal.nex;
    const nexFactor = Math.floor(nex / 5);

    
    const PP = char.personal.prestigePoints;
    let PATENTE = 'Recruta';
    let LIMITE_CREDITO = 'Baixo';
    if (PP >= 200) { PATENTE = 'Agente de Elite'; LIMITE_CREDITO = 'Ilimitado'; }
    else if (PP >= 100) { PATENTE = 'Oficial de Operações'; LIMITE_CREDITO = 'Alto'; }
    else if (PP >= 50) { PATENTE = 'Agente Especial'; LIMITE_CREDITO = 'Médio'; }
    else if (PP >= 20) { PATENTE = 'Operador'; LIMITE_CREDITO = 'Médio'; }

    
    let CT_I = 2, CT_II = 0, CT_III = 0, CT_IV = 0;
    if (PATENTE !== 'Recruta') { CT_I = 3; }
    if (PATENTE === 'Operador') { CT_II = 1; }
    if (PATENTE === 'Agente Especial') { CT_II = 2; CT_III = 1; }
    if (PATENTE === 'Oficial de Operações') { CT_II = 3; CT_III = 2; CT_IV = 1; }
    if (PATENTE === 'Agente de Elite') { CT_II = 3; CT_III = 3; CT_IV = 2; }

    const ctx: CalculatedVariables = {
        ATTRS: { ...char.attributes.initial }, 
        PV: { max: 0, current: char.status.pv.current, temp: char.status.pv.temp },
        PE: { max: 0, current: char.status.pe.current, temp: char.status.pe.temp, limit: Math.floor(nex / 5) },
        SAN: { max: 0, current: char.status.san.current, temp: char.status.san.temp },
        DEF: 10,
        RD: {},
        IMUNIDADES: [],
        VULNERABILIDADES: [],
        DESLOCAMENTO: 9,
        ACOES: { movimento: 1, padrao: 1, reacao: 1 },
        SKILLS: {},
        NEX: nex,
        PATENTE,
        LIMITE_CREDITO,
        CARGA: { atual: 0, max: 0 },
        PROFICIENCIAS: [...char.proficiencies],
        HABILIDADES_ATIVAS: [],
        
        
        NM_ORIGEM: char.personal.origin,
        NM_CLASSE: char.personal.class,
        NM_TRILHA: char.personal.trail,
        PERSONAGEM: char.personal.name,
        JOGADOR: char.personal.player,
        PROTEC: '',
        DT_RITUAL: 0,
        CT_LIMITS: { I: CT_I, II: CT_II, III: CT_III, IV: CT_IV }
    };

    
    let activeEffects: { source: string, effect: Effect }[] = [];

    
    if (char.customOrigin?.power?.effects) {
        activeEffects.push(...char.customOrigin.power.effects.map(e => ({ source: 'Origem', effect: e })));
    }
    
    
    char.inventory.forEach(item => {
        
        if (item.effects && (item.type === 'general' || item.isActive)) {
             activeEffects.push(...item.effects.map(e => ({ source: item.name, effect: e })));
        }
        item.curses?.forEach(curse => {
             
             if (item.type === 'general' || item.isActive) {
                 activeEffects.push(...curse.effects.map(e => ({ source: `${item.name} (Maldição)`, effect: e })));
             }
        });
        
        
        ctx.CARGA.atual += item.weight * item.quantity;
    });

    
    char.classPowers.forEach(p => {
        if (p.effects) activeEffects.push(...p.effects.map(e => ({ source: p.name, effect: e })));
    });
    char.otherPowers.forEach(p => {
        if (p.effects) activeEffects.push(...p.effects.map(e => ({ source: p.name, effect: e })));
    });

    
    char.conditions.forEach(c => {
        if (c.isActive && c.effects) {
             activeEffects.push(...c.effects.map(e => ({ source: c.name, effect: e })));
        }
    });

    
    const roleData = TEAM_ROLES.find(r => r.id === char.teamStrategy.role);
    if (roleData) {
        if (roleData.id === 'lobo_solitario' && roleData.passiveEffects) {
             activeEffects.push(...roleData.passiveEffects.map(e => ({ source: 'Lobo Solitário', effect: e })));
        }
        char.teamStrategy.roleAbilities.forEach(selAbility => {
            const abilityDef = roleData.abilities?.find(a => a.id === selAbility.id);
            if (abilityDef) {
                const levelData = abilityDef.levels[selAbility.currentLevel];
                if (levelData && levelData.effects) {
                    activeEffects.push(...levelData.effects.map(e => ({ source: `${abilityDef.name} ${selAbility.currentLevel}`, effect: e })));
                }
            }
        });
    }

    

    
    const attrKeys: Attribute[] = ['AGI', 'FOR', 'INT', 'PRE', 'VIG'];
    attrKeys.forEach(k => ctx.ATTRS[k] += (char.attributes.nexIncreases[k] || 0));

    
    ctx.PV.max = statsClass.pvInit + (statsClass.pvNex * (nexFactor - 1)) + (ctx.ATTRS.VIG * nexFactor);
    ctx.PE.max = statsClass.peInit + (statsClass.peNex * (nexFactor - 1)) + (ctx.ATTRS.PRE * nexFactor);
    ctx.SAN.max = statsClass.sanInit + (statsClass.sanNex * (nexFactor - 1));
    ctx.CARGA.max = (ctx.ATTRS.FOR * 5) + (ctx.ATTRS.FOR === 0 ? 2 : 0);
    ctx.DEF = 10 + ctx.ATTRS.AGI;

    
    Object.keys(SKILL_MAP).forEach(skillName => {
        const attrKey = SKILL_MAP[skillName];
        const baseAttr = ctx.ATTRS[attrKey];
        const skillData = char.skills[skillName];
        const trainingLevel = skillData?.training || 0;
        
        let trainingBonus = 0;
        if (trainingLevel === 1) trainingBonus = 5;
        if (trainingLevel === 2) trainingBonus = 10;
        if (trainingLevel === 3) trainingBonus = 15;

        ctx.SKILLS[skillName] = {
            dice: baseAttr,
            trainingBonus,
            otherBonus: skillData?.otherBonus || 0,
            total: trainingBonus + (skillData?.otherBonus || 0)
        };
    });

    
    activeEffects.forEach(({ effect, source }) => {
        const val = solveFormula(effect.value, ctx, char);

        if (effect.category === 'add_fixed' || effect.category === 'add_action') {
            effect.targets.forEach(t => {
                if (t.type === 'pv_max') ctx.PV.max += val;
                if (t.type === 'pv_temp') ctx.PV.temp += val;
                if (t.type === 'pe_max') ctx.PE.max += val;
                if (t.type === 'pe_temp') ctx.PE.temp += val;
                if (t.type === 'san_max') ctx.SAN.max += val;
                if (t.type === 'san_temp') ctx.SAN.temp += val;
                
                if (t.type === 'defense') ctx.DEF += val;
                if (t.type === 'displacement') ctx.DESLOCAMENTO += val;
                if (t.type === 'load_max') ctx.CARGA.max += val;
                
                if (t.type === 'action_move') ctx.ACOES.movimento += val;
                if (t.type === 'action_std') ctx.ACOES.padrao += val;

                if (t.type === 'test_skill' && t.skill && ctx.SKILLS[t.skill]) {
                    ctx.SKILLS[t.skill].total += val;
                }
                if (t.type === 'test_attribute' && t.attribute) {
                    Object.keys(ctx.SKILLS).forEach(s => {
                        if (SKILL_MAP[s] === t.attribute) ctx.SKILLS[s].total += val;
                    });
                }
                
                if (t.type === 'dr' && t.damageType) {
                    ctx.RD[t.damageType] = (ctx.RD[t.damageType] || 0) + val;
                }
            });
        }
        
        if (effect.category === 'change_dice') {
            const valDice = solveFormula(effect.value, ctx, char);
            effect.targets.forEach(t => {
                if (t.type === 'test_skill' && t.skill && ctx.SKILLS[t.skill]) {
                    ctx.SKILLS[t.skill].dice += valDice;
                }
            });
        }

        if (effect.category === 'proficiency' && effect.generalChangeMode) {
             try {
                 const meta = JSON.parse(effect.generalChangeMode);
                 if (meta.proficiency) ctx.PROFICIENCIAS.push(meta.proficiency);
             } catch {}
        }

        if (effect.category === 'add_immunity') {
             effect.targets.forEach(t => {
                 if (t.damageType) ctx.IMUNIDADES.push(t.damageType);
                 if (t.condition) ctx.IMUNIDADES.push(t.condition);
             });
        }

        if (effect.category === 'learning' && effect.generalChangeMode) {
             try {
                 const meta = JSON.parse(effect.generalChangeMode);
                 if (meta.learnedEntity) {
                     ctx.HABILIDADES_ATIVAS.push({ 
                         source: source, 
                         name: meta.learnedEntity.name,
                         description: meta.learnedEntity.description 
                     });
                 }
             } catch {}
        }
    });

    
    if (ctx.PV.max < 1) ctx.PV.max = 1;
    if (ctx.PE.max < 0) ctx.PE.max = 0;
    
    ctx.DESLOCAMENTO = Math.floor(ctx.DESLOCAMENTO / 1.5) * 1.5;

    ctx.PROTEC = char.inventory
        .filter(i => i.type === 'protection' && i.isActive)
        .map(i => i.name)
        .join(', ');

    let bonusDT = 0;
    activeEffects.forEach(({effect}) => {
        if (effect.category === 'add_fixed') {
             const val = solveFormula(effect.value, ctx, char);
             effect.targets.forEach(t => {
                 if (t.type === 'ritual_dt') bonusDT += val;
             });
        }
    });
    ctx.DT_RITUAL = 10 + ctx.PE.limit + ctx.ATTRS.PRE + bonusDT;

    return ctx;
};


========================================
FILE: App.tsx
PATH: C:\Users\bruno\Downloads\eden-arquivos\src\App.tsx
========================================

import { BrowserRouter, Routes, Route } from 'react-router-dom';
import Home from './pages/Home';
import CreateSheet from './pages/CreateSheet';
import Sheet from './pages/Sheet';
import DMScreen from './pages/DMScreen';

function App() {
  return (
    <BrowserRouter>
      <Routes>
        <Route path="/" element={<Home />} />
        <Route path="/criar" element={<CreateSheet />} />
        <Route path="/ficha/:id" element={<Sheet />} />
        <Route path="/mestre" element={<DMScreen />} />
      </Routes>
    </BrowserRouter>
  );
}

export default App;


========================================
FILE: main.tsx
PATH: C:\Users\bruno\Downloads\eden-arquivos\src\main.tsx
========================================

import React from 'react'
import ReactDOM from 'react-dom/client'
import App from './App.tsx'
import './index.css'
import { CharacterProvider } from './context/CharacterContext'

ReactDOM.createRoot(document.getElementById('root')!).render(
  <React.StrictMode>
    <CharacterProvider>
      <App />
    </CharacterProvider>
  </React.StrictMode>,
)
